en.st_bolt_carrier_6: Sliding Bolt Carrier with Locking Bolt (Carrier)
en.st_ied_descr:
An improvised explosive device designed to disperse hazardous chemical agents upon detonation, creating an area of toxic contamination. Its use poses both immediate and long-term threats, making it a highly dangerous weapon in unconventional warfare.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  Explosive
  •  Triggering Mechanism: Proximity
en.mutant_lurker_meat_description:
Tough, sinewy meat carved from a Lurker, best suited for stew due to its rubbery consistency. Note that consuming uncooked mutant meat always carries the risk of contamination or radiation exposure.
 
 WARNING: Raw Meat
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  High-tier Mutant Meat
  •  Cookable
en.st_wpn_aks74_descr:
Developed in the early 1970s by Mikhail Kalashnikov to replace the AKM, the AK-74 is an adaptation of the 7.62x39mm AKM assault rifle and features several important design improvements including the use of the newer, high velocity 5.45x39mm round. Compared with the preceding AKM, it has better effective firing range, accuracy and reliability. All AKS-74 rifles came with a side-folding metal shoulder stock.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  origin: Russia
  •  manufacturer: Izhmash
en.st_wpn_mp7_descr_new:
A compact personal defense weapon designed for high mobility and effectiveness in close-quarters combat. Featuring a lightweight polymer frame, low recoil, and a high rate of fire, it allows for rapid target acquisition and superior control. Its modular design supports various attachments, making it a versatile choice for special forces, law enforcement, and security personnel.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  Origin: Germany
  •  Manufacturer: Heckler & Koch
en.st_addon_scope_e0t2_mag_descr:
A compact holographic sight with a low-profile housing and intuitive controls for instinctive aiming at close range. Paired with a 3x flip-to-side magnifier, the kit lets the shooter quickly switch from reflex engagement to short-to-medium-range identification and precision follow-ups without changing optics.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  Origin: United States
  •  Manufacturer: EOTech
  •  Magnification: 1x / 3x
  •  Magnifier flip: set in MCM — Magnifier Switch
en.st_wpn_eft_rsh12_descr: The powerful RSh-12 (Revolver Shturmovoy 12 - "Assault Revolver 12") revolver, manufactured by KBP Instrument Design Bureau, designed for use by special forces. Despite the powerful 12.7x55 mm caliber, RSh-12 has less recoil than many other large-caliber revolvers and pistols, since the shot is fired from the bottom chamber of the cylinder. \n \n
en.st_wpn_akms_bas_descr:
An improved version of the AK-47 rifle featuring detailed improvements and enhancements that optimized the rifle for mass production. Among these changes, the AKM's weight was reduced, the accuracy during automatic fire was increased and several reliability issues were addressed. All AKMS rifles came equipped with an under-folding metal shoulder stock in place of the fixed wooden stock.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  origin: Soviet Union
  •  manufacturer: Tula Arms Plant
en.st_prt_o_ballistic_4: Kevlar K129 Plates w/ Carbon-fiber Composite
en.st_up_stamina_1_descr: Special mounts attached to the bodysuit allow for carried weight to feel lighter.
en.st_tomato_descr:
Canned, sliced and diced tomatoes often used for enhancing the flavor of basic meals. They bring a hint of freshness to the otherwise bland culinary options available.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  Food
en.st_grenade_f1_descr:
A Soviet anti-personnel fragmentation grenade based on the French F1 grenade with a kill zone of around 4 meters. Contains a 60-gram charge of TNT with a notched, steel exterior to promote fragmentation that is capable of piercing medium level body armor.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  explosive
  •  origin: Soviet Union
en.ammo-9x18-pmm_descr:
This round contains a bullet with enhanced stopping power thanks to its hollow point. Ineffective against body armour, but high damage against flesh.
 
 -  Armor penetration power (AP): none (10) 
 -  Nominal stopping power (DMG): 33
en.ammo-7.62x54-7n1_descr:
A 7.62x54 calibre sniper round with a steel penetrator specially designed for the SVD. It's steel core is made to pierce light armors. Very common in the zone, these bullets are quite cheap.
 
 -  Armor penetration power (AP): BR3 (30) 
 -  Nominal stopping power (DMG): 62
en.st_cocaine_descr:
Small aluminium case containing cocaine and the tools facilitating use. Cocaine is a powerful nervous system stimulant. Its effects can last from 15-30 minutes to an hour, depending on the route of administration. Cocaine increases alertness, induces feelings of well-being, competence and sexuality. Anxiety, paranoia and restlessness are common side effects. With excessive dosage, tremors, convulsions and increased body temperature are observed. Bandits are known for sniffing this drug right before launching an assault or ambush.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  • very potent stimulant
  • very potent dizziness removal
  • first aid H••• T•••
en.st_wpn_pb_descr:
The PB (Pistolet Besshumnyj or Silent Pistol) was developed in 1967 for Spetsnaz units of the Soviet Army and KGB operatives. The pistol is based on a modified Makarov PM and features a unique integrated two-part suppressor that reduces bullet velocity to below subsonic levels.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  origin: Belgium
  •  manufacturer: FN Herstal
en.st_wpn_raptr_descr:
An automatic mag–fed shotgun born in and tailored to the specific needs of the Zone. Its high rate of fire, large magazine and unparalleled ergonomics have granted it the nickname "Bloodsucker Killer". It is considered as one of the finest 12x70mm weapons available in the Zone.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  origin: Ukraine
  •  manufacturer: Unknown
en.st_up_shock_1_descr: A thin layer of constantan is capable of isolating against electricity.
en.st_meat_bloodsucker_descr:
A small dense, iron-rich stew made from the sinewy flesh of a Bloodsucker, spiced with various herbs and mushrooms.
 
 NOTE: The quality and healthiness of a meal is determined by how it is prepared.
  •  Zone-produced meals, while less contaminated, are still unhealthy.
  •  Stewed meals require the addition of clean water and are significantly less contaminated.
  •  Purified meals required the addition of vodka and are not only radiation-free but provide revitalizing effects.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  High-tier Cooked Meal
en.st_grenade_rgd5_descr:
A post-World War II Soviet anti-personnel fragmentation grenade with a small kill zone of around 3 meters. Contains a 110-gram charge of TNT with an internal fragmentation liner that produces fragments capable of piercing medium level body armor.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  explosive
  •  origin: Soviet Union
en.ammo-5.45x39-fmj_descr:
Military 5.45x39 calibre 7N6 was the first standard issue round for automatic rifles of Warsaw Pact countries using the new intermediate cartridge. Provides better accuracy than the 7.62 calibre round thanks to reduced recoil and a 100-metre increase in range.
 
 -  Armor penetration power (AP): BR2 (27) 
 -  Nominal stopping power (DMG): 38
en.st_up_1921_b8_descr: Installation of imported, higher quality parts to increase reliability.
en.st_af_tapeworm_descr:
While its structure seems impossibly fragile, this artefact, made of pure quartz, is actually quite resilient. If its user is attacked, the artefact will temporarily paralyze the threat.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  Perk Artefact
en.st_wpn_ak5c_bas_5c_tik_descr:
A version of the FN FNC assault rifle made for the Swedish Armed Forces and modified to adapt to the partially subarctic Swedish climate. The AK 5C is the modernized version of the original AK 5 with improvements including a new rail system, iron sights and bolt catch. This model has been extensively modified.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  origin: Sweden
  •  manufacturer: Carl Gustafs Stads Gevarsfaktori
en.st_wpn_scar_siber_black_descr:
In early 2004, USSOCOM issued a design request for a family of assault rifles using two different calibers while keeping the parts and ergonomics nearly-identical; hence the Special Operations Forces Combat Assault Rifle "SCAR" was born into service. Firing the long-range, hard-hitting 7.62x51mm NATO cartridge, the selective-fire FN SCAR-H's innovative gas-operated, short-stroke piston system reduces fouling for greater reliability.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  origin: Belgium
  •  manufacturer: FN Herstal, FN America
en.mutant_krovosos_meat_description:
Flesh cut from a slain Bloodsucker, its rubbery, stringy texture making it unappealing and thus not suited for eating. Note that consuming uncooked mutant meat always carries the risk of contamination or radiation exposure.
 
 WARNING: Raw Meat
 
  •  High-tier Mutant Meat
  •  Cookable
en.st_wpn_fort12_descr:
A semi-automatic pistol designed for military and law enforcement, known for its durability, reliability, and ease of handling. Its ergonomic grip and simple operation make it a practical choice for both professional and civilian users. Widely adopted due to its balance of accuracy and affordability, it remains a staple sidearm in security forces.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  Origin: Ukraine
  •  Manufacturer: RPC Fort
en.ammo-7.62x39_fmj_descr:
7.62x39 Full Metal Jacket is one of the most commonly used types of ammunition, especially in Africa and in the Middle East. Some nicknamed it the "Round of the Revolution" due to its favored use by both terrorist and criminal organizations. Due to the sheer power of the round most military organizations have turned to using additional steel plates to counter 7.62x39 as there is a high probability of encountering it in combat situations.
 
 -  Armor penetration power (AP): BR3 (30) 
 -  Nominal stopping power (DMG): 45
en.st_af_night_star_descr:
This glowing artefact can generate a local directed low-gravity field. Widely used by stalkers along with Gravi, a similar artefact, to increase maximum load. 
Due to its beautiful inner core it is highly sought after by jewellers all over the world, however it is best to proceed with caution as unskilled treatment can cause the artefact to explode with power sufficient to level a small building. It is thus highly advised to perform the polishing by means of specialised machinery, which minimises the probability of explosion. Moreover, only the outer core of the artefact emits radiation. 
Nightstar will also absorb toxic and chemical agents from the environment, which makes it a valuable artefact for artefact hunters, although the amount of toxicity absorbed is negligible. It is, however, relatively cheap and even stalkers with pretty tight budgets can afford it if opportunity to buy it arises. 
That being said, Nightstar emits odour of burning flesh when in the closest proximity of heat source. Prolonged exposure may enhance its flammability and cause it to ignite. 

 Does NOT degrade over time.
en.st_wpn_ithacam37_extmag_descr:
One of most recognized pump-action shotguns of the United States owning the longest production run for a pump-action shotgun in history, the Ithaca M37 was designed for police, military and general civilian use. It utilizes a novel combination ejection and loading port on the bottom of the weapon, leaving the sides closed to the elements. The "Defense" model includes room for 7-rounds and uses polymer instead of wood, with a stainless-steel finish to reduce weight and improve reliability.
 
 CHARACTERISTICS:
  •  Origin: United States
  •  Manufacturer: Ithaca Gun Company
en.ammo-12x76-dart_descr:
12 gauge dart round, normally used for hunting big game but also suitable for other purposes, including puncturing armour.
 
 -  Armor penetration power (AP): BR4 (42) 
 -  Nominal stopping power (DMG): 74
en.st_wpn_saiga12s_m1_descr:
Saiga-12 shotgun issued to research personnel in the Zone. Purchased by the Ecologists to ensure their safety, it is used primarily for defending against aggressive mutants during field expeditions. The robust build and reliable firepower make it a practical choice for scientists venturing into dangerous areas.
 
PROPERTIES:
 •  origin: Russia
 •  manufacturer: Izhmash
en.st_addon_scope_descr:
First introduced in the early 1960s, the PSO-1 became the iconic optic of the Soviet marksman. Issued alongside the SVD rifle, it saw widespread use across Eastern Europe and various Cold War conflicts. Its distinctive reticle combines a chevron for aiming with a built-in rangefinding scale, allowing shooters to quickly estimate distances without extra equipment.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  Origin: Soviet Union/Russia
  •  Manufacturer: NPZ
  •  Magnification: 4x
  •  Reticle illumination: press Mark Switch key
en.st_wpn_aug_9mm_descr:
The AUG (Armee-Universal-Gewehr) is the standard small arm of many Armed Forces and Special Units all over the world since 1977. It is famous for its modular concept “Bullpup“ design, making it a short, well-balanced rifle with high accuracy and reliability. The A3 9mm variant features a Picatinny rail on top of the receiver, an external bolt release and has been rechambered for use with 9mm Parabellum.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  Origin: Austria
  •  Manufacturer: Steyr Arms
en.mutant_dog_meat_description:
Meat harvested from feral Zone dogs, stringy and unpleasant but occasionally eaten as a cheap alternative to the more popular boar meat. Note that consuming uncooked mutant meat always carries the risk of contamination or radiation exposure.
 
 WARNING: Raw Meat
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  Low-tier Mutant Meat
  •  Cookable
en.st_af_ah_o2_descr:
An artefact created in fire anomalies consisting of mostly iron, bismuth, cadmium and nickel. If broken, the interior resembles an infinite fractal.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  Artefact
en.st_af_lighthouse_descr:
The Beacon, or Lighthouse, is a yo-yo-shaped fibrous mass containing a very dense, continuously orbiting ball. If its user kills another being, they will be instantly teleported to the exact place where the victim's life ended.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  Perk Artefact
en.st_af_eye_descr:
This artefact, which resembles the human eye, considerably increases metabolism of the body, helping wounds heal quicker. Experienced stalkers say that Eye also brings luck. Irrespective of the validity of that statement, its positive effects are indeed quite potent. 
This artefact soothes the pain and is extremely useful when treating wounds. 
When worn, it is known to slightly counter harmful effects of psy-anomalies or psy-waves of certain mutants. 
These beneficial qualities, however, come at a price. This artefact is extremely dangerous when exposed to chemical anomalies as it amplifies their toxicity and increases their potency. It is hence highly recommended to keep the artefact in your backpack, never on the body, when exploring toxic areas unless you have a death wish. 
The artefact is also known colloquially as "copper eye" as it conducts electricity and amplifies its dangerous effects in the same way as copper does. 

 Does NOT degrade over time.
en.st_up_armor_2_descr: Polycarbonate plates don't last long, but they're more reliable than Kevlar thanks to improved bullet impulse negation.
en.st_wpn_ak101_descr:
An assault rifle of the Kalashnikov series marketed at those looking for a weapon that combines the logistical compatibility and familiarity of the 5.56x45mm NATO round with the reliability of a Kalashnikov. The design of this rifle is similar to the AK-74 and is designed with modern and composite materials, including plastics that reduce weight and improve accuracy.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  origin: Russia
  •  manufacturer: Kalashnikov Concern
en.st_wpn_ithacam37_sawnoff_descr:
One of most recognized pump-action shotguns of the United States owning the longest production run for a pump-action shotgun in history, the Ithaca 37 was designed for police, military and general civilian use. It utilizes a novel combination ejection and loading port on the bottom of the weapon, leaving the sides closed to the elements. This stock has been unofficially sawn-off to reduce weight.
 
 CHARACTERISTICS:
  •  Origin: United States
  •  Manufacturer: Ithaca Gun Company
en.st_addon_scope_march_f_shorty_alt_descr: A compact kit pairing the March-F Shorty LPVO with a canted red-dot for instant close-quarters aiming and quick transition to magnified precision.\n \n
en.st_conserva_descr:
A tin of preserved tuna fish in oil, providing a lightweight and protein-rich meal option. Its compact size makes it convenient for carrying during long treks.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  Food
en.st_af_tlf_lost_soul_descr: Although this artifact resembles a common Soul artifact, it possesses extraordinary properties. It provides greater telepathic protection and has no negative effects.
en.st_wpn_fal_descr:
One of the most widely used, recognized and popular automatic rifles in history, the FN FAL has seen use by more than 90 countries. Because of its prevalence and widespread usage among the military of many NATO and first world countries during the Cold War, it was given the title "The right arm of the Free World".
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  origin: Belgium
  •  manufacturer: FN Herstal
en.st_drug_radioprotector_descr:
B190 Indraline radioprotectant, included in medkits issued to nuclear power plant personnel. Used in the Zone instead of the excessively toxic PC1 cysteamine hydrochloride, repeated use of which often caused death. Reduces the effects of gamma radiation on live tissue. Best consumed before exposure, as effects are not instant, but the drug lasts a long time. Take one capsule at a time.
 
 PROPERTIES:
en.st_cigar1_descr:
A pack of aged cigarettes produced during the Soviet era, remarkably preserved and still carrying the distinct, harsh flavor reminiscent of the USSR’s golden years. Despite their age, the unique blend of low-grade tobacco and paper filters keeps the signature Soviet taste intact, evoking a sense of nostalgia among older inhabitants of the Zone.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  Stimulant
  •  Alcohol Sobering Effect
en.st_af_sponge_descr:
Sponge has always been under debate among the Ecologists. Some suggest that this artefact is driven from basic form of organisms, while others believe its an advanced life form with self-awareness inherited from living creatures. 
Despite the theories surrounding the artefact, all can agree on one thing: it moves. The sponge sometimes tries to "grab" an object it touches. Putting it in a container might be a hard task, as if it wants to escape. 
This artefact acts as a powerful resistor and will absorb even lethal doses of electricity. On the other hand, it will catch fire when exposed to open flame or even spontaneously combust. 

 Does NOT degrade over time.
en.st_knife_combat_descr:
A multi-purpose military bayonet designed for mounting on rifles, while also serving as a standalone combat and utility knife. Its serrated edge, sturdy design, and ability to function as a wire cutter make it a highly adaptable tool in both combat and survival situations.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  Use: Field Dressing Mutants
  •  Melee Weapon
  •  Light Attack Power: 48
  •  Heavy Attack Power: 87
  •  Armor Penetration: 35
  •  Cuts Thick Mutant Skin?: YES
  •  Mutant Pelt Quality: 65% - 85%
en.st_wpn_ak105_swamp_descr:
A carbine version of the AK-74M rifle, the AK-105, like the AK-104, features a shortened barrel and is ideal for close quarters combat. The rifle is designed with modern and composite materials to significantly reduce weight and improve accuracy. A monster of a weapon, the "Swamp Thing" is fitted with an Elcan scope, side-mounted sight, laser module, extended magazine and a collection of additional alterations to make this weapon handle like a dream.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  origin: Russia
  •  manufacturer: Izhmash
  •  tactical kit upgrade
en.st_protein_descr:
A compact bar combining the indulgence of chocolate with the nutritional benefits of protein. Ideal for quick consumption, it offers a sweet treat alongside essential nutrients. Useful on longer trips when you're on the go and need to eat something fast.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  Food
en.st_mint_descr:
Mint-flavored Altoids imported from outside the Zone. While not a meal, they offer a brief respite from the monotony of survival rations. Highly refreshing.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  Food
en.st_knifebf4_descr:
A tactical military knife designed for durability and effectiveness in hand-to-hand combat. Featuring a sharp, reinforced blade, it is built for both utility and close-quarters engagements.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  Use: Field Dressing Mutants
  •  Melee Weapon
  •  Light Attack Power: 52
  •  Heavy Attack Power: 97
  •  Armor Penetration: 35
  •  Cuts Thick Mutant Skin?: YES
  •  Mutant Pelt Quality: 75% - 98%
en.st_drink_crow_descr:
"The Beak" is a potent concoction of Zone-distilled vodka and the ground beak of a black male crow that has lived in the Zone for over 15 years, believed to contain enriched proteins capable of cleansing radiation from the body. Despite its rumored restorative properties and the fleeting sensation of euphoria it provides, the drink is notorious for its unpleasant taste.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  Drink
  •  Stimulant
  •  Alcohol
en.st_addon_scope_compm4s_descr:
A military-grade red dot sight with an incredibly long battery life, designed for extreme durability and precision. It is widely used by armed forces due to its rugged build and reliable performance.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  Origin: United States
  •  Manufacturer: Aimpoint
  •  Magnification: 1.0x
en.ammo-12x70-buck_descr:
Standard 12 gauge shell filled with 8 mm shot. Highly lethal at close range. Only suitable for use with smoothbore weapons.
 
 -  Armor penetration power (AP): None (3 x 9) 
 -  Nominal stopping power (DMG): 200 (22.2 x 9) 
 
SPECIAL:
 
 -  expanding cloud of pellets, short eff. range
en.st_salicidic_acid_descr:
An iron ampoule designed as field equipment for military field personnel for instant pain reduction. It contains a powerful dose of metamizole mixed with an antihemorrhagic drug. Metamizole is one of the strongest Non-Steroidal Anti-Inflammatory Drugs (NSAIDs), especially effective at easing aches and pains as well as reducing fevers. It is also useful as anti-inflammatory drug when used in higher doses. May cause some delayed side effects such as leucopenia or agranulocytosis, so it should be used with moderation. Injected into an arm or a thigh. Its availability in the Zone is limited due to the difficulty of smuggling the medicine across military cordons.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  • Large damage resistance bonus (10%)
  • first aid H•• T•• A•• L••
en.st_wpn_dvl10_m1_descr:
A modular, lightweight and compact rifle developed for special service and combat missions where exceptional accuracy and range are needed. The Urbana comes equipped with a special carbon fiber tube barrel and proprietary titanium suppressor to provide increased strength and survivability of the weapons system, as well as reduced muzzle flash and sound propagation.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  origin: Russia
  •  manufacturer: Lobaev Arms
  • Increased penetration: +5
en.st_bolt_11: Supercharger with Hammer from a Double-barrel Shotgun [R] (Bolt)
en.st_wpn_bizon_descr:
Developed at the request of the Russian Ministry of Internal Affairs for counter-terrorist and law enforcement units that needed a lightweight weapon capable of fast and accurate fire at close ranges. The Bizon is most notable for it's distinctive under-barrel helical magazine.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  origin: Russia
  •  manufacturer: Izhmash
en.st_yadylin_descr:
A semi-drug based on morphine. It allows the user to quickly dull pain and increase production of adrenaline, aiding the user in withstanding even the most intense battles. It is popular among stalkers, often used as a recreation drug among criminal groups, and is allegedly being supplied to the Monolith.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  • causes severe dizziness
  • post-heals H•••• T•••• A•• L••
en.st_wpn_sig550_sniper_descr:
A marksman variant of the popular SG 550 rifle, the 550-1 constitutes a perfect middle ground between a sniper and an assault rifle while retaining the strong points of both types of weaponry. Though it is somewhat lacking in stopping power and accuracy when compared to a dedicated sniper rifle, it retains the reliability and build quality of the SG 550.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  origin: Switzerland
  •  manufacturer: Swiss Arms AG
en.st_prt_o_ballistic_6: Kevlar AP Plates w/ Reinforced Titanium Composite
en.st_wpn_g36new_descr:
Created to replace the aging G3, the G36 continues to set the standard in the field of assault rifles with unprecedented reliability. Lightweight, accurate and simple in maintenance, it has found its way into the hands of various law enforcement agencies worldwide.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  origin: Germany
  •  manufacturer: Heckler & Koch
en.st_caffeine_descr:
Caffeine and sodium benzoate which cause central nervous to work with highest effectiveness possible at a given time. Reduce sleepiness to a large degree. Take two tablets at one time.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  • stimulant
  • dizziness removal
en.st_addon_scope_kit_sa5x_spec_descr:
A comprehensive upgrade package that includes grips, rails, stocks, and other enhancements to improve weapon ergonomics, control, and overall combat effectiveness.
 
 KIT INCLUDES:
  •  Fab AG FAL Pistol Grip
  •  SA-58 Extreme Duty Dust Cover
  •  Picatinny Rail
  •  Vltor CASV Foregrip
  •  21" Barrel
  •  DSA BRS Stock
  •  Aimpoint T1 Sight
  •  Elcan SpecterDR DFOV14-C2 Sight
 
 COMPATIBILITY:
  •  SA-58 AUS
en.st_af_ice_descr:
Also colloquially known as "Radioactive Snowflake". At first glance, this artefact resembles a white Kolobok. 
Thanks to its unique properties, the artefact can significantly increase the bearer's muscle tone, thus greatly improving stamina recovery. Due to its high radioactivity, stalkers in possession of it are sometimes jokingly referred to as "Radioactive Snowflakes". 
When faced with the decision whether to carry it on the belt during a mission, you have to carefully weigh its pros and cons: does it pay to have greater endurance and high protection against electricity at the cost of being constantly exposed to its deadly radiation? Even if you are determined to take it with you, it should be noted that it is not to be used on long excursions to the Zone. 
Snowflake, however, holds a big downside: it interacts with surrounding energy sources by absorbing and amplifying their effects. For this reason, approaching heat sources, toxic areas and psy-fields while holding this artefact is a suicide. 
It is as light as a snowflake and very easy to carry around. 

 Does NOT degrade over time.
en.st_vodka_descr:
Nemiroff is a Ukrainian producer of alcoholic beverages, based in the town of Nemyriv in the Vinnytska oblast. Specializing in vodkas and other spirits, they are considered one of the best vodkas in the world and by extension, in the Zone.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  Drink
  •  Alcohol
en.st_bread_descr:
A simple loaf of bread, offering a basic yet essential component of a Stalker's diet. Its versatility makes it a common accompaniment to other food items found in the Zone.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  Food
en.st_gas_tube_10: Ejector from Over-under Double-barrel Shotgun [R] (Gas Tube)
en.st_meat_dog_descr:
Lean and fibrous cuts from the flesh of the Zone’s wild dogs. Their sharp, gamy flavor is complimented with various herbs. A cheap alternative to the more popular boar beef.
 
 NOTE: The quality and healthiness of a meal is determined by how it is prepared.
  •  Zone-produced meals, while less contaminated, are still unhealthy.
  •  Stewed meals require the addition of clean water and are significantly less contaminated.
  •  Purified meals required the addition of vodka and are not only radiation-free but provide revitalizing effects.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  Cooked Meal
en.st_chocolate_p_descr:
Half of a confectionery treat, offering a brief moment of indulgence. While not of premium quality, it satisfies sweet cravings in the bleakness of the Zone. Brings back many fond childhood memories, which may help soothe the pain of living in the harsh and unforgiving conditions of the Zone.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  Food
en.st_af_fonar_descr:
An artefact with the appearance of a melting pyramid of ice; formed in electrical anomalies. Equipping it causes the artefact to "show" its wearer the location of valuables, using both visible light and RF waves.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  Perk Artefact
en.st_addon_scope_kit_aus_tri_descr:
A comprehensive upgrade package that includes grips, rails, stocks, and other enhancements to improve weapon ergonomics, control, and overall combat effectiveness.
 
 KIT INCLUDES:
  •  Fab AG FAL Pistol Grip
  •  SA-58 Extreme Duty Dust Cover
  •  Picatinny Rail
  •  Vltor CASV Foregrip
  •  21" Barrel
  •  DSA BRS Stock
  •  Aimpoint T1 Sight
  •  Trijicon ACOG Sight
 
 COMPATIBILITY:
  •  SA-58 AUS
en.st_wpn_adar2_15_descr:
A civilian semi-automatic rifle produced in Russia, heavily based on the AR-15 platform. Known for its precision and lightweight design, it uses wooden furniture and is chambered in 5.56x45mm NATO. Its combination of modern performance and traditional aesthetics makes it popular among sport shooters and civilian firearms enthusiasts.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  Origin: Russia
  •  Manufacturer: Molot Oruzhie
en.st_meat_snork_descr:
A grotesque delicacy, cooked until the skin cracks and the meat pulls away from the bone. Most stalkers eat it on a dare or include it in their meals to show their superiority over others.
 
 NOTE: The quality and healthiness of a meal is determined by how it is prepared.
  •  Zone-produced meals, while less contaminated, are still unhealthy.
  •  Stewed meals require the addition of clean water and are significantly less contaminated.
  •  Purified meals required the addition of vodka and are not only radiation-free but provide revitalizing effects.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  Cooked Meal
en.st_wpn_sig220_n_u2p2g0r_descr:
Often considered the best out-of-the-box .45 caliber double-action pistol available, the P220 is known for accuracy that parallels that of competition handguns. An instant success, it has been adopted by the Swiss and Japanese SDF and many European police organizations. The "Custom Nine" has been fitted with a threaded barrel, tritium sights, laser designator and 19-round magazine, among other various internal modifications.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  origin: West Germany, Switzerland
  •  manufacturer: SIG Sauer
  •  tactical kit upgrade
en.st_up_autd_a2_descr: The fashion for plastic components has not only paid off, but it has also become quite a popular upgrade.
en.st_addon_scope_infiltrator_tactical_kit_:
Infiltrator Tactical Kit for Steyr AUG in 9mm cal. The kit includes Long Heavy Barrel (508mm), Low-profile VLTOR receiver with Corvus Defensio tactical rail, Voodoo-s thermal sight with ACOG (TA47C Reticle) and MAWL-C1+ Laser sight. 
 
 Features: 
  •  Significantly increased accuracy.
  •  Significantly increased bullet flight speed and effective weapon range.
  •  Increased weapon damage.
en.st_addon_scope_mark8_rmr_descr: A compact combat kit pairing the Leupold Mark 8 CQBSS low-power variable optic with a canted 1x red-dot for instant close-quarters aiming and sustained precision at longer ranges.\n \n
en.st_wpn_ak74m_beard_descr:
An improved version of the AK-74 and the service rifle of the Russian Federation, designed with modern and composite materials to significantly reduce weight and improve accuracy. Each AK-74M is fitted with a side-rail bracket for mounting optics. The "Venom" was made at Skadovsk and Yanov Station on request by Beard for a lightweight and dependable AK74M varient. It has been equipped with a laser designator, extended magazine and tweaked for better reliability within the Zone's harsh conditions.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  origin: Russia
  •  manufacturer: Kalashnikov Concern
en.st_af_soul_descr:
Soul is a unique organic artefact with properties just as unique: it secretes slimy goo that dramatically increases recovery rate of wounds. Thanks to its reasonable price and attractive appearance, this artefact is a valuable collector's item. 
Applying its gooey substance to wounds will soothes the pain and speeds up healing process. \It also reduces the effects of psy-waves and their damage to one's brain. But it should be known that Soul drains power from its user. The artefact does not have high density and thus is not very heavy. 

 Does NOT degrade over time.
en.ammo-gauss_cardan_descr:
These lower-capacity cells use capsulated fragments of the "Flash" artefact as their power source. Their lower capacity is due to makeshift production conditions and lack of specialised equipment.
 
 -  Armor penetration power (AP): REDACTED 
 -  Nominal stopping power (DMG): REDACTED 
 
SPECIAL:
 
 -  technological item
 -  prototype
en.st_addon_sil_45_descr:
A sound suppressor specifically designed for .45 ACP firearms, reducing noise and muzzle flash for improved stealth. Its subsonic-friendly design makes it ideal for tactical and covert operations where discretion is crucial.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  Origin: United States
 COMPATIBILITY:
  •  .45
en.mutant_tushkano_meat_description:
A small portion of meat from the rodent-like Tushkano, barely enough for a meal. While relatively safe compared to larger mutants, it’s often considered scavenger food. Note that consuming uncooked mutant meat always carries the risk of contamination or radiation exposure.
 
 WARNING: Raw Meat
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  Low-tier Mutant Meat
  •  Cookable
en.st_wpn_abakan_n_descr:
Designed as a potential replacement to the AK-74 series of rifles, it failed to fill its intended role due to its complex design and price. Still in use as a limited special purpose weapon, the AN-94 offers a unique two-shot burst function at a stated 1800 rounds per minute with the unique feature of delaying recoil for the first two rounds. Capable of a hyperburst fire mode.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  origin: Russia
  •  manufacturer: Izhmash
en.st_af_vaselisk_descr:
If you found this. something has gone horribly wrong.
 
 PROPERTIES:
en.st_prt_o_retardant_18: Insulating Constantan Inserts w/ Fiberglass Coating
en.st_addon_scope_lazup_generic_descr:
COMPATIBILITY:
 
 •  Multiple weapons with picatinny or compatible rail.
 
  Used for aimed shooting from any position. Can be used with NVGs for easier targeting.
en.st_wpn_m82_descr:
A recoil-operated, semi-automatic, anti-materiel sniper rifle engineered as the first shoulder fired semi-automatic capable of firing 50 BMG. The M82 has been proven in combat in every environment from the snow covered mountains, to the desolate deserts and everything in between. Its low recoil and reliable power delivers on target with every pull of the trigger. Despite being designated as an anti-materiel rifle, the M82 is often deployed as an anti-personnel system. More than just a rifle, the M82 is an American icon.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  origin: United States
  •  manufacturer: Barrett Firearms Manufacturing
en.st_wpn_mp5_nimble_descr:
One of the most famous and widespread firearms of its class, the MP5's compactness, accuracy and reliability have made it a favorite of numerous military, law enforcement, intelligence and security organizations the world over. The A3 variant is fitted with a retractable metal stock further increasing the weapon's CQB capabilities. The "Frasier" features a vertical foregrip and fires the more powerful .45 ACP.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  origin: West Germany
  •  manufacturer: Heckler & Koch
en.st_wpn_akm_bas_descr:
An improved version of the AK-47 rifle featuring detailed improvements and enhancements that optimized the rifle for mass production. Among these changes, the AKM's weight was reduced, the accuracy during automatic fire was increased and several reliability issues were addressed.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  origin: Soviet Union
  •  manufacturer: Tula Arms Plant
en.st_drug_antidot_descr:
The IP2 antitoxin is a complex drug comprising several antidotes, including metoclopramidum, pyridoxine, thiamine, riboxin and other pharmaceuticals. The drug is used to inject a range of antibiotics to neutralize natural poisons, together with synthetic poison absorbers, into the bloodstream. IP2 is not particularly popular in the Zone as most stalkers rely on a gas mask and a protective suit. However, there are still those who have a few units of this antidote stashed for emergency situations. The effects of the drug are long-lasting. Take one capsule at a time.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  • post-heals H••• T•••
en.st_prt_o_ballistic_7: Kevlar K119 Plates w/ Polycarbonate Inserts
en.ammo-12.7x55-fmj_descr:
The full metal jacket 12.7x55mm subsonic cartridge is used in the VKS bullpup sniper rifle. The cartridge can carry a projectile weighing between from 59 grams (911 grains) and 76 g (1173 grains), yielding massive amounts of kinetic energy.
 
 -  Armor penetration power (AP): BR4 (38) 
 -  Nominal stopping power (DMG): 73
en.st_wpn_mp412_descr:
A Russian .357 double-action revolver most notable for its unique break-action chamber and automatic ejector. Though it was designed for export (REvolver for eXport), it never was put into full production due to lack of a market and restrictive gun import laws in the United States.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  origin: Russia
  •  manufacturer: Izhmekh Mechanical Plant
en.st_af_generator_descr:
Generates weak electric currents and a small electromagnetic field. When its bearer is exerting energy, the Generator will capture some of that energy and disperse it to nearby batteries.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  Perk Artefact
en.st_wpn_colt1911_descr:
Designed by John Browning, the M1911 is an extremely reliable and robust pistol that remained the standard-issue side arm of the US military from 1911 to 1985. To this day, it remains very popular for military, police and civilian use around the world.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  origin: United States
  •  manufacturer: Colt Manufacturing Company
en.ammo-9x18-fmj_descr:
A full metal jacket round with a steel penetrator and a lead core under a metal jacket. Provides good stopping power but is ineffective against body armour.
 
 -  Armor penetration power (AP): BR1 (15) 
 -  Nominal stopping power (DMG): 18
en.ammo_12.7x55_ap_descr:
The armour-piercing 12.7x55mm subsonic cartridge is used in the VKS bullpup sniper rifle. The cartridge can carry a projectile weighing between from 59 grams (911 grains) and 76 g (1173 grains), yielding massive amounts of kinetic energy.
 
 -  Armor penetration power (AP): BR6 (75) 
 -  Nominal stopping power (DMG): 73
en.mutant_psysucker_meat_description:
Similar to Bloodsuckers, Psysucker meat has a rubbery, stringy texture and is thus not suited for eating. Note that consuming uncooked mutant meat always carries the risk of contamination or radiation exposure.
 
 WARNING: Raw Meat
 
  •  High-tier Mutant Meat
  •  Cookable
en.st_wpn_steyr_scout_descr:
Developed together with the American legend, Marine Lieutenant Colonel Jeff Cooper, the Scout is a combination of future oriented design and innovative technical solutions. Versatile, lightweight and accurate up to 800m, it is the epitome of fine craftsmanship in a rifle. This model is chambered in 5.56x45mm.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  Origin: Austria
  •  Manufacturer: Steyr Mannlicher
en.st_wpn_usp_match_descr:
A semi-automatic pistol designed as an improvement of the USP featuring a weighted barrel extension, polygonal rifling and an adjustable trigger that improves weapon accuracy and performance. Used by special forces and competitive shooters worldwide, the USP Match considered a top-of-the-line weapon able to compete with the elite.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  origin: Germany
  •  manufacturer: Heckler & Koch
en.st_wpn_vintorez_m1_descr:
Intended for various Spetsnaz troops of the Soviet Army, KGB and MVD, the VSS is quite popular among its users for its stealthy capabilities, integral suppressor and the great lethality of the heavy 9x39mm round. The "Savant" is an early prototype including a vertical foregrip, laser designator and significantly modified internals.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  origin: Soviet Union
  •  manufacturer: Tula Arms Plant
en.st_wpn_vz61_descr:
Originally chambered for .32 ACP (vz.61), it was developed for use with security forces and was adopted by the Czechoslovak Army in 1961 as a personal sidearm for lower-ranking army staff, vehicle drivers, armoured vehicle personnel and special forces. Although mass production of the model vz.68 never took place, a large number of pre-production vz.68 models made their way into the Zone.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  origin: Czechoslovak Socialist Republic
  •  manufacturer: Ceska zbrojovka Uhersky Brod
en.st_addon_scope_leupold_descr:
Built for military use under U.S. contracts, the Mark 8 CQBSS squeezes a 1–8x zoom into a compact, 34 mm-tube chassis, giving a low-power close-quarters window and a full 8x for longer shots. It uses a first-focal-plane LED-illuminated reticle for fast transitions and repeatable hits in mixed environments.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  Origin: United States
  •  Manufacturer: Leupold
  •  Magnification: 1–8x
en.st_wpn_ak12_descr:
The standard service assault rifle of the Russian army, designed to replace older AK-74M and AK-100 series rifles. This model is the pinnacle of AK system development, different from the previous generations by its elaborate ergonomics, all-day usability and increased accuracy and precision. Capable of a hyperburst fire mode.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  origin: Russia
  •  manufacturer: Izhmash
en.st_af_compass_descr:
A very rare artefact. It's been several years since one was found. 
It can locate gaps in anomaly fields. It is believed that it can help one traverse the most complex anomaly fields completely unharmed. However, very few know how to handle it properly. 
The Compass showed few unique properties under last experiments. It can interact to moving objects, causing some to completely disappear. Or perhaps teleport? 
It also weakens the body by draining stamina and increasing bleeding rate constantly. But the biggest draw however, is the dangerous radiation output this artefact emits comparing to the artefact radiation scale. 
Holding this artefact near the body will cause death in matter of few minutes.
en.st_addon_scope_aimpoint_pro_descr:
The Patrol Rifle Optic (PRO) is a durable and cost-effective red dot sight designed for law enforcement and tactical use. It features a long battery life, waterproof housing, and a 2 MOA dot for precise aiming.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  Origin: United States
  •  Manufacturer: Aimpoint
  •  Magnification: 1.0x
en.st_up_stvp_b2_descr: A more modern and comfortable handle simplifies weapon handling.
en.st_wpn_m249_descr:
The M249 is a belt fed, American adaptation of the Belgian FN Minimi machine gun that has seen action in every major conflict involving the United States since the U.S. invasion of Panama in 1989. The M249 SAW provides infantry squads with a high rate of machine gun fire, combined with the accuracy and portability of a rifle.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  origin: United States
  •  manufacturer: FN Herstal
en.ammo-9x19-pbp_descr:
This 9x19 calibre jacketed hollow-point bullet with an expanding hollow has high stopping power and low ricochet propensity. Used by police and for self-defense. Ineffective against body armour due to its low penetration potential, but flesh damage. One of the cheapest ammo to efficiently kill mutants in the zone.
 
 -  Armor penetration power (AP): none (10) 
 -  Nominal stopping power (DMG): 40
en.st_up_pri_c3_descr: Installation of a mobile component into the stock, which creates a counter-effect when the weapon is fired.
en.st_up_zath_b2_descr: A moving parts buffer evenly distributes recoil throughout the weapon when it is fired, making it less pronounced.
en.st_ied_rpg_descr:
An improvised explosive device utilizing an OG-7V warhead, repurposed to deliver devastating fragmentation effects against personnel and light vehicles. Its makeshift nature allows for concealed placement or remote detonation, making it a dangerous and unpredictable battlefield threat.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  Explosive
  •  Triggering Mechanism: Proximity
en.st_prt_o_ballistic_8: Kevlar K119 Plates w/ Carbon-fiber Inserts
en.st_addon_scope_pso-1m2-01_descr:
A higher-magnification spin on the classic PSO formula, the POSP 6x24 was tailored as much for hunters and sport shooters as for military users. Its familiar chevron reticle and stadiametric scale make quick range estimates easy at game-hunting distances, and the slightly longer tube gives cleaner shots on small-to medium-sized targets. Built for export, the POSP found a wide civilian market — prized for its ruggedness, simple controls, and PSO-style ballistic aids that translate neatly from the field to the hunt.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  Origin: Belarus
  •  Manufacturer: Zenit-BelOMO
  •  Magnification: 6x
  •  Reticle illumination: press Mark Switch key
en.st_wpn_mk14_descr:
The Mk 14 Enhanced Battle Rifle is an American military selective-fire battle rifle and a designated marksman rifle originally built for USSOCOM. Known for it's incredible long range accuracy, modularity and controllable recoil, the EBR is a favorite among many.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  origin: United States
  •  manufacturer: Naval Surface Warfare Center Crane Division
en.st_up_usm_b2_descr: Allows the rate of fire to be increased at the cost of accuracy and reliability.
en.st_wpn_ak74u_snag_descr:
The AKS-74U bridges the tactical deployment gap between a submachine gun and an assault rifle and was intended as a compact but relatively powerful automatic alternative to the AKS-74. It is significantly lighter and more maneuverable in tight quarters while still boasting the reliability of a Kalashnikov. This special variant comes with a 45 round RPK magazine and an integrated Kobra sight and suppressor.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  origin: Russia
  •  manufacturer: Kalashnikov Concern
en.st_wpn_g36new_k_descr:
Created to replace the aging G3, the G36 continues to set the standard in the field of assault rifles with unprecedented reliability. Lightweight, accurate and simple in maintenance, it has found its way into the hands of various law enforcement agencies worldwide. The 'K' model features a shorter barrel and forend and includes a flash suppressor and bottom rail for attaching tactical accessories.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  origin: Germany
  •  manufacturer: Heckler & Koch
en.st_wpn_aug_thales_descr:
Developed as an improvement of the Australian F88 Austeyr, the EF88 is the most modern AUG on the market. Featuring better ergonomics and increased reliability, recoil control and accuracy, the EF88 is an incredibly unique and rare weapon.
 
 CHARACTERISTICS:
  •  Origin: Austria
  •  Manufacturer: Thales Australia
en.st_up_barp_b2_descr: Separators take on some of the recoil.
en.st_up_auth_a1_descr: An active counter-weight moves from the bolt frame, partially compensating for recoil.
en.st_wpn_k98_descr:
One of the final developments in the long line of Mauser military rifles and the standard service rifle of the German Wehrmacht, the Kar98 was selected by Nazi Germany for its exceptional accuracy and effectiveness in long distance situations. In skilled hands with a ZF39 telescopic sight, these rifles had an effective range of up to 1000 meters. This model has been fitted with a sniper scope by MARCH, Japan.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  origin: Nazi Germany
  •  manufacturer: Mauser
en.st_wpn_umirotvoritel_bas_descr:
An unknown weapon. Appears faulty as squeezing the trigger does nothing. After close inspection, it does not appear to fire rounds based on ignition but instead by electro-magnetic force.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  origin: Unknown
  •  manufacturer: Unknown
en.st_bolt_carrier_7: Lever-type Bolt Carrier with Locking Wedge (Carrier)
en.st_wpn_thompson_1921_descr:
A high-quality, early variant of the famous Thompson submachine gun, known for its smooth operation, high rate of fire, and classic drum magazine. Originally intended for law enforcement and civilian markets, the "Chicago Typewriter" became infamous during the Prohibition era as a weapon of choice for gangsters and lawmen alike. Its finely machined components and distinct design make it a highly sought-after collector’s firearm.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  Origin: United States
  •  Manufacturer: Auto-Ordnance Company
en.ammo-5.45x39-ap_descr:
Military 5.45x39 calibre 7N22 armour-piercing round for automatic rifles of Warsaw Pact countries. The bullet contains a hard-alloy armour-piercing penetrator. Effective against body armour.
 
 -  Armor penetration power (AP): BR5 (47) 
 -  Nominal stopping power (DMG): 36
en.st_wpn_usp_descr:
Originally designed for the American market, the United States law enforcement and military provided much of the design criteria for the USP. Used by many police and special forces units worldwide, the Universal Self-Loading Pistol is known as an accurate and reliable handgun able to withstand extreme punishment and adverse conditions.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  origin: Germany
  •  manufacturer: Heckler & Koch
en.st_wpn_mosin_k_descr:
The Mosin-Nagant is a rugged, bolt-action rifle known for its long-range accuracy and powerful 7.62?54mmR round. It has always been a trusted relic favored by sharpshooters, hunters, and old-school stalkers who value simplicity, durability, and raw stopping power over modern flash.
 
 ATTACHMENTS: PU Scope, KZRZP suppressor
en.st_wpn_hpsa_descr:
A single-action, semi-automatic pistol based on the ideas of American firearms inventor John Browning. Browning died in 1926 before finishing a production version, but FN arms designer Dieudonne Saive completed the pistol's development. The Hi-Power pistol was noted for its 13-round magazine, twice that of contemporary designs such as the Luger or Mauser 1910. Despite its venerable age, the Browning HP enjoys popularity around the world.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  origin: Belgium, United States
  •  manufacturer: Browning Arms, FN Herstal
en.ammo-7.62x25-p_descr:
The 7.62x25mm cartridge is a Russian bottle-necked pistol cartridge widely used in former Soviet satellite states, China and Pakistan among other countries. A Lot of these rounds are still available in the Zone. This 7.62x25mm Tokarev cartridge comprises a bullet with lead round nose, polymer coated (LRNPC) bullet intended for sport shooting and hunting. By design, this cartridge provides a considerable stopping power effect as well as causing substantial adverse effects on the target after impact, this is at the cost of penetration capabilities, even against basic ballistic protection. 
 
 -  Armor penetration power (AP): None (8) 
 -  Nominal stopping power (DMG): 30
en.st_medkit_army_descr:
A specialized medical kit for providing first aid to combat casualties. The kit includes blood coagulants based on menadione, painkillers, antibiotics and immunostimulants, as well as a kit for removing bullets and fragments from the body. This medkit is issued primarily to army personnel such as Spetsnaz units venturing deep into the Zone and is popular among Duty forces.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  • first aid H••••••• T••••••• A••• L•••
en.st_up_bleed_2_descr: A generation B injector that regularly introduces a coagulation agent into the bloodstream when blood pressure drops significantly.
en.st_wpn_ak74_descr:
Developed in the early 1970s by Mikhail Kalashnikov to replace the AKM, the AK-74 is an adaptation of the 7.62x39mm AKM assault rifle and features several important design improvements including the use of the newer, high velocity 5.45x39mm round. Compared with the preceding AKM, it has better effective firing range, accuracy and reliability. The AK-74N variant comes with a side dovetail rail for mounting optical sights.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  origin: Russia
  •  manufacturer: Izhmash
en.st_medkit_science_descr:
A medical kit designed specifically for use in the Zone. The kit contains products for handling wounds, as well as preventing the development of radiation poisoning and reducing accumulated radiation in the body. Contains Vikasolum, Batilolum and Naphazoline, unlike other medkits.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  • first aid H••••••••• T••••••••• A•••• L••••
en.st_af_fire_descr:
This artefact forms in areas of high thermal activity. Produces powerful infrared emissions which intensify metabolic processes, healing wounds before its bearer's very eyes. 
Its healing capabilities are even stronger than in case of the Eye as stalkers in possession of this artefact are said to have survived being wounded by chimeras. Thanks to that, it has earned the reputation of a miraculous artefact. 
Many stalkers owe it their lives, and most veteran mutant hunters carry it in case they run into danger. However, it shares not only positive but also negative properties of its cousin: entering a psy-field with this artefact on the belt is suicide. It will absorb psy energy and emitting it at a considerable rate. 
Also, it is highly advised to proceed with caution when planning to bring the artefact to the market as prolonged exposure to even minimal amounts of radioactive materials can result in death of the user. 
It can also be used as a reusable medkit of sorts since it heals wounds very quickly. 

 Does NOT degrade over time.
en.st_wpn_scar_siber_m2_custom_descr:
In early 2004, USSOCOM issued a design request for a family of assault rifles using two different calibers while keeping the parts and ergonomics nearly-identical; hence the Special Operations Forces Combat Assault Rifle "SCAR" was born into service. Firing the long-range, hard-hitting 7.62x51mm NATO cartridge, the selective-fire FN SCAR-H's innovative gas-operated, short-stroke piston system reduces fouling for greater reliability. This model has been extensively modified.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  origin: Belgium
  •  manufacturer: FN Herstal, FN America
en.ammo-gauss_descr:
Batteries that use a capsulated fragment of the "Flash" artefact as their power source. Manufactured using hi-tech equipment.
 
 -  Armor penetration power (AP): REDACTED 
 -  Nominal stopping power (DMG): REDACTED 
 
SPECIAL:
 
 -  technological item
 -  prototype
en.st_af_oasis_heart_descr:
This artefact was found at the centre of the legendary Oasis. It appears that the Heart is a crystallised plant, which has acquired the healing properties of the Oasis. 
Not only it dramatically increases recovery rate of wounds and healing process, but also provides the body with strong source of energy. It is a true miracle. 
That being said, the Oasis is very sensitive to outer sources of energy and surrounding environment. For this reason, interacting with anomaly fields will bring death to the holder. 

 Does NOT degrade over time.
en.st_trigger_components_5: Double-fire Mode Trigger Mechanism with Firing Pin (Trigger)
en.st_analgetic_descr:
Non-steroidal anti-inflammatory drug from the group of phenylacetic acid derivatives. The effect of the drug dulls the user's nervous activity. Because of the huge number of side effects, such as headache, dizziness, drowsiness, and in some cases memory disorders, disorientation, irritability, it is not used for medicinal purposes in most countries. However, in the Zone it has become popular due to a side effect expressed in violation of the sensitivity of the central nervous system, which allows it to withstand severe injuries, such as gunshot and shrapnel wounds.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  • Average damage resistance bonus (5%)
  • causes slight dizziness
  • first aid H•••• T•••• A•• L••
en.st_up_opt_dynamo_hand3_descr: Extra nikodimovich magnets on the rotor of the motor, increases the efficiency of the generator.
en.st_up_binoc_b3_gamma_descr: An improvement to the night vision technology, introducing better system light gain, system resolution and photo-sensitivity to increase the visual quality, as well as a white phosphor display for better acuity and reduced eye impairment.
en.st_flask_descr:
A portable flask filled with clean, safe-to-drink water. Essential for quenching thirst without the risk of radiation exposure from contaminated sources.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  Drink
en.st_wpn_k98_mod_descr:
A directly-modified version of the WWII German sniper rifle Mauser Karabiner 98k. The wooden stock was replaced with a more ergonomic polymer one. The rifle is equipped with an excellent sniper scope manufactured by MARCH, Japan.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  origin: Nazi Germany
  •  manufacturer: Mauser
  • Increased penetration: +5
en.st_wpn_fnc_descr:
A selective fire, gas-operated assault rifle developed as a less expensive alternative to the M16. Using mostly pressed steel and plastic components, the FN FNC is surprisingly light and controllable and when comparing its cost to similar imports, the true value of the rifle becomes even more apparent.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  origin: Belgium
  •  manufacturer: FN Herstal
en.st_prt_o_ballistic_9: Grade-B Polyethylene Plates w/ Expanded Carrier
en.st_up_arty_3_descr: Installation of a two-compartment armor attachment module.
en.st_wpn_g3sg1_descr:
In the world of battle rifles, the Heckler and Koch G3 is an important part of firearms history, known for being incredibly durable, reliable and decently accurate. The G3SG1 is a G3A3 that has been hand picked and modified for accuracy. Adopted by several nations as a designated marksman rifle for military use, its similarity to the G3 makes it easier to train soldiers that already have experience with the standard G3.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  origin: Germany
  •  manufacturer: Heckler & Koch
en.st_wpn_m16a2_descr:
The M16 is the U.S. military designation for a family of rifles derived from the ArmaLite AR-15 that have been the primary infantry rifle of the United States military since the 1960s. It is a lightweight, air cooled, gas operated, assault rifle with a rotating bolt. The A2 variant is the second generation in the M16 series and a significant upgrade over the A1, with notable upgrades being a semi-auto and three-round burst fire selector, use of the improved 5.56x45mm cartridge and an improved handguard, pistol grip, buttstock and heavy barrel.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  origin: United States
  •  manufacturer: Colt Manufacturing Company, FN Herstal
en.ammo-7.92x33_ap_descr:
7.92x57 SA is a round that was used by the British military against armoured targets. It features a hardened steel core which gives it higher piercing capabilities. Used primarily for long range shots, the grain quality of this round is higher than the standard. This cartridge is supported by several sniper rifles.
 
 -  Armor penetration power (AP): BR4 (39) 
 -  Nominal stopping power (DMG): 69
en.st_up_pri_a1_descr: A pneumatic stock is used to reduce recoil during burst fire.
en.ammo_23_eco_descr:
A special cartridge designed for the needs of the scientific staff located in the Zone. Depending on the task, it is filled with different types of solutions. Requires very careful handling. How to use: very slowly put into the weapon.
 
 •  Highest pierced armour class: none
 •  Tissue damage rating: none
 
SPECIAL:
 
 •  Using a thin wolfram needle, it pierces the skin of the mutants to inject the solution.
en.st_vodka_quality_descr:
A sturdy metal flask filled with Stolichnaya vodka, often referred to as "Stoli"; a vodka brand with Russian origins, now produced in Latvia. It has a storied history and is known for its classic taste and wide international distribution. Whether used to steady nerves, relax or to celebrate, this iconic Soviet spirit remains a reliable companion in the Zone.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  Drink
  •  Alcohol
en.st_wpn_galil_descr:
Designed for operation in arid conditions, the Galil is noted for its reliability in combat conditions, and ease of maintenance. It has a line chambered for 5.56x45mm and one for 7.62x51mm.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  origin: Israel
  •  manufacturer: Israel Military Industries
en.st_addon_scope_spectre_tactical_kit_desc:
Infiltrator Tactical Kit for Steyr AUG in 9mm cal. The kit includes extended barrel (417mm), Custom Spectre Tactical black stock, Etherium Holo sight with 3X Magnifier and MAWL-C1+ Laser sight. 
 
 Features: 
  •  Slightly increased accuracy.
  •  Slightly increased bullet flight speed and effective weapon range.
  •  Slight increased weapon damage.
en.st_meat_psysucker_descr:
A heavily boiled stew made from Psysucker meat, loaded with herbs to counteract its unsettling origins. Despite being deemed safe to eat, some stalkers report vivid, intrusive dreams after consuming it, but this is only speculation.
 
 NOTE: The quality and healthiness of a meal is determined by how it is prepared.
  •  Zone-produced meals, while less contaminated, are still unhealthy.
  •  Stewed meals require the addition of clean water and are significantly less contaminated.
  •  Purified meals required the addition of vodka and are not only radiation-free but provide revitalizing effects.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  High-tier Cooked Meal
en.ammo-og-7b_descr:
Fragmentation warhead for anti-personnel warfare used with the RPG-7 grenade launcher. The main purpose of the warhead is to kill enemies in cover outside the range of hand grenades.
 
 -  Blast power: high
 -  Blast radius: 5.6 m
 -  Fragments' radius: 41 m
 -  Av. number of fragments: 153 (small shrapnels)
 -  Explosion delay: none (explodes on impact)
en.ammo_338_federal_descr:
The .338 Federal is a rifle cartridge based on the .308 Winchester case necked up to .33 caliber. It was created by Federal Cartridge and Sako in 2006 and intended as a big game cartridge with reasonable recoil for lightweight rifles.
 
 •  Highest pierced armour class: BR1 (8) 
 •  Tissue damage rating: 606
en.st_wpn_m16_descr:
The M16 is the U.S. military designation for a family of rifles derived from the ArmaLite AR-15 that have been the primary infantry rifle of the United States military since the 1960s. It is a lightweight, air cooled, gas operated, assault rifle with a rotating bolt. The A4 variant is the fourth generation in the M16 series and comes with a removable carrying handle and Picatinny rail for mounting optics and other devices.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  origin: United States
  •  manufacturer: Colt's Manufacturing Company, FN Herstal
en.st_addon_sil_lapu7_descr:
A hunting suppressor designed for the Remington M700, offering noise reduction to minimize disturbance while maintaining accuracy.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  Origin: United States
 
 COMPATIBILITY:
  •  Remington M700 "Deer Hunter"
en.st_wpn_aps_bas_apsabigo_descr:
The Stechkin APS is a Russian selective fire machine pistol, bearing the name of its designer Igor Stechkin. Originally chambered for 7.62x25mm Tokarev, the pistol was changed to use 9x18mm as it became clear that this cartridge was set to become the new service ammunition for handguns in the Soviet Army. In 1951, the Stechkin was introduced into the Soviet military arsenal, replacing the aging TT-33.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  origin: Soviet Union
  •  manufacturer: Tula Arms Plant
en.st_antibio_chlor_descr:
An antibiotic. Crystalline powder of golden yellow colour, bitter taste, soluble in water. This is one of the first open antibiotics (after penicillin).
 Chlorotetracycline hydrochloride has a bacteriostatic effect on gram-positive and gram-negative microbes, rickettsia and some large viruses.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  • causes slight dizziness
  • post-heals A•
en.st_addon_scope_specterdr_descr:
Developed in the 1990s by Ernst Leitz Canada (ELCAN) for military contracts, the SpecterDR (Dual Role) is a rugged optic offering both a true 1x window for close-quarters and a 4x tube for mid-range engagements without swapping sights. A mechanical throw-lever on the side shifts the internal optics, toggling magnification while maintaining zero. Favored for its versatility, it is built to withstand hard use and make transitions seamless in combat.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  Origin: Canada
  •  Manufacturer: ELCAN
  •  Magnification: 1x / 4x
  •  Reticle illumination: press Mark Switch key
en.st_wpn_sig220_n_descr:
Often considered the best out-of-the-box .45 caliber double-action pistol available, the P220 is known for accuracy that parallels that of competition handguns. An instant success, it has been adopted by the Swiss and Japanese SDF and many European police organizations.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  origin: West Germany, Switzerland
  •  manufacturer: SIG Sauer
en.st_wpn_mp5sd_descr:
One of the most famous and widespread firearms of its class, the MP5's compactness, accuracy and reliability have made it a favorite of numerous military, law enforcement, intelligence and security organizations the world over. The A3 variant is fitted with a retractable metal stock further increasing the weapon's CQB capabilities. The SD6 variant comes with a retractable buttstock, integrated suppressor and 3-round burst fire select.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  origin: West Germany
  •  manufacturer: Heckler & Koch
en.st_af_black_angel_descr:
This artefact resembles a luminous clump of roots. When undisturbed, it will begin to release pure water vapor. When a person uses it, there is a small chance that any harm or pain inflicted upon them will instead be inflicted upon the attacker.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  Perk Artefact
en.st_up_stk_b2_descr: A more convenient handle shape, which allows for better handling of the weapon when firing on the move.
en.st_af_grapes_descr:
An amber-like mass with a slight yellow-green hue. Its user will feel more satisfied and healthier after eating.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  Perk Artefact
en.st_af_signet_descr:
The Signet, or Amulet, appears to be a simple stone several precise holes bored through it. Some Stalkers believe it brings good luck. In reality, it provides its user with a greater sense of well-being and allows the body to heal wounds faster when near a fire.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  Perk Artefact
en.st_wpn_l85_descr:
Once the standard weapon for the British armed forces, now replaced by the L85A2 and A3 respectively, the L85A1 shares the same general performance as its younger brothers but suffered numerous reliability-related issues.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  origin: United Kingdom
  •  manufacturer: RSAF Enfield, Royal Ordnance, Heckler & Koch
en.st_addon_scope_1pn93n2_1gs_descr:
A thermal reinterpretation of the 1PN93 family, it swaps the traditional image-intensifier tube for a mid-wave thermal sensor, turning heat signatures into a clear sight picture day or night. Heavier and more power-hungry than its NV cousins, it excels at spotting concealed or camouflaged targets through smoke and foliage and is typically issued in small numbers to reconnaissance and specialist sniper teams.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  Origin: Russia
  •  Manufacturer: NPZ
  •  Magnification: 4x
en.st_cuban_cigar_descr:
A luxurious Cuban cigar, renowned for its exceptional craftsmanship and rich, complex flavors. In the Zone, possessing one is a mark of distinction, often reserved for special occasions or significant trades.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  Stimulant
  •  Alcohol Sobering Effect
en.st_wpn_ak74u_m1_isg_descr:
A custom model developed on the foundation of the Draco AK by the American company Rifle Dynamics. It is one of the most high-quality and modern weapons in the Zone. Several shipments of Rifle Dynamics' AK variants were sent to Ukraine for weapons trials with the goal of adoption by Ukrainian Special Forces, Rifle Dynamics was looking to sell manufacturing licenses to Eastern European Powers. However the trials were cancelled and the AK12 2016 was adopted along with the AEK for special forces. Several of these Rifle Dynamics Demonstration and Trials guns have slowly made their way to the zone over the years and are exclusively used by ISG special units.
 
 ATTACHMENTS: 
  •  Devices: ATPIAL (Advanced Target Pointer Illuminator Aiming Laser) AN/PEQ-15 produced by L3 Insight Technologies. Tactical device that combines laser designators in both visible and IR band with IR searchlight. 
  •  Scopes: All scopes for picatinny.
  •  Silencer: Rifle Dynamics ISG Sound Suppressor
en.st_rebirth_descr:
Warning! Do not use in combination with any other drug as this may prove lethal. This powerful mixture contained in a small syringe will make you lose consciousness. But when you wake up (if you wake up), you will feel reborn. Inject the syringe into your thigh when sitting down.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  • causes extreme dizziness
  • first aid whole-body completely
  • post-heals H•••••••• T•••••••• A••••• L•••••
en.st_addon_scope_ekp8_18_descr:
A modern variant of the Kobra reflex sight, featuring an adjustable illuminated reticle and a rugged, military-grade design. It is commonly used on Russian rifles for fast and accurate aiming.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  Origin: Russia
  •  Manufacturer: Kobra
  •  Magnification: 1.0x
en.st_wpn_saiga12s_isg_descr:
A semi-automatic shotgun made in the U.S.A. but based on Russia’s popular line of Saiga hunting shotguns. The long stroke gas system of the legendary AK-47 is carried over to the KS-12 and provides reliable operation under extreme environmental conditions. This model includes a trigger mechanism which allows for two-round bursts.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  origin: United States, Russia
  •  manufacturer: Kalashnikov USA
en.st_wpn_desert_eagle_nimble_descr: This weapon was brought to the Zone by a stalker named Logan Williams. Disguised as a TIME photographer he managed to single-handedly enter the centre of Pripyat. His current whereabouts are unknown, but he is rumoured to work as an information broker specializing in all matters related to the Zone.\n \n
en.st_af_fuzz_kolobok_descr:
A relatively rare artefact forming in chemical areas, Kolobok is highly valued for its ability to heal most kinds of wounds and stop bleeding in a matter of minutes. 
For unknown reasons, scientists are spreading rumours among stalkers that the artefact modifies bearer's genetic code, which is unproven and should be regarded as conscious attempt at monopolizing the supply of the artefact by the scientific community. This does not, however, mean that it is completely harmless. 
One drawback of this artefact is the fact that it will interact to radioactive particles, so it is best to avoid radiation fields when in possession of the artefact, especially since its negative effects are not balanced with positive ones. It will also reduce energy recovery, which is the result of its sharp needle-like appendages. The needles cause small and quickly healing wounds which bring constant pain and itch, thus reducing stamina. 
This artefact also weakens protection against heat and acids due to its high flammability. 
Lightweight and not too much of a burden to carry around. 

 Does NOT degrade over time.
en.st_knife_6x4_descr:
A multi-purpose bayonet designed for mounting on rifles, featuring a sharp blade, a serrated edge, and a wire-cutting capability when paired with its scabbard. Its durable construction and versatility make it an essential tool for soldiers, useful in combat, survival, and utility tasks.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  Use: Field Dressing Mutants
  •  Melee Weapon
  •  Light Attack Power: 30
  •  Heavy Attack Power: 52
  •  Armor Penetration: 10
  •  Cuts Thick Mutant Skin?: NO
  •  Mutant Pelt Quality: 25% - 40%
en.st_up_weight_3_descr: Use of lighter materials to reduce weight.
en.st_tomahawk_descr:
A modern tactical tool designed for breaching, close combat, and survival applications, featuring a sharp axe head and a sturdy spike for versatility. Its durable construction and ergonomic grip make it a reliable choice for military, law enforcement, and outdoor use.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  Melee Weapon
  •  Light Attack Power: 90
  •  Heavy Attack Power: 137
  •  Armor Penetration: 35
en.st_af_skull_miser_descr:
The remains of a human head, disfigured and fossilized by the Zone. The teeth appear to be made of a pure crystal stone. If its bearer kills another person, their money may be duplicated.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  Perk Artefact
en.st_af_geliy_descr:
A product of electrical anomalies. It gives off a gaseous substance. If you found this. something has gone horribly wrong.
 
 PROPERTIES:
en.st_af_sun_descr:
A rare specimen generating an inexhaustible source of light. It allows a form of solar photosynthesis in its wearer.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  Perk Artefact
en.st_up_pri_b1_descr: A mobile shoulder rest considerably reduces recoil impact on the body.
en.st_addon_sil_black_box_descr:
A compact, high-performance suppressor by Advanced Armament Corporation, designed for superior suppression in tactical scenarios.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  Origin: United States
 
 COMPATIBILITY:
  •  9mm, .45
en.st_up_prih_c1_descr: A bolt assembly buffer position in the stock takes on and absorbs most of the recoil.
en.st_addon_sil_rotor_descr:
A high-efficiency muzzle brake designed to reduce recoil and muzzle rise for 7.62x54mm rifles, improving overall shot stability. Its precision-machined construction enhances durability and ensures minimal impact on accuracy.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  Origin: United States
 
 COMPATIBILITY:
  • 7.62mm
en.st_wpn_ks23_ecolog_descr:
At its core, the KS-23 is a manually-actuated, pump-action "shotgun" that fires unique 23mm shells. Though, while displaying an appearance more akin to a shotgun, the Russians designated the KS-23 as a "Special Carbine" due to its large-caliber rifled barrel when compared to the standard smoothbore barrels of conventional shotguns. The "Eco" was specifically modified for the needs of the scientific staff located within the Zone.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  origin: Soviet Union
  •  manufacturer: Tula Arms Plant
en.st_af_pin_descr:
A small artefact formed by thermal anomalies in the Zone under extreme temperatures. The look of this artefact suggests that it was an organ of a vascular plant. Further studies showed that other organic tissues are fused deep inside. 
The stem doesn't hold any useful properties. On the contrary, the small pins reduce temperature of user's body and cool all objects in their vicinity. 
This artefact offers a slight psy-protection as it will resonate under the influence of psy-waves. On the other hand, it is not recommended to approach chemical and acid anomalies when in possession of the artefact as it will increase the adverse effects of acids and toxins in user's bloodstream. 

 Does NOT degrade over time.
en.st_tobacco_descr:
A metal tin containing finely cut Russian tobacco, preserving its freshness in the Zone's harsh conditions. Ideal for those who prefer to roll their own cigarettes or use a pipe, it provides a robust and authentic flavor.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  Stimulant
  •  Alcohol Sobering Effect
en.st_bolt_carrier_1: Sliding Bolt Carrier with Turning Bolt Lock [R] (Carrier)
en.st_up_ret_c3_descr: Replacement of the return mechanism with a more powerful version comprising two guiding rods and return springs. Increases the weapon's rate of fire.
en.st_wpn_sks_molot_descr:
A semi-automatic, gas-operated, self-loading carbine used primarily during the Cold War, the SKS still sees service today with second-line and reserve army units. As it lacked a fire select and was limited to 10 rounds, it was made obsolete by the AK-47. This model has been modified to use 7.62x39mm.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  origin: Soviet Union
  •  manufacturer: Swiss Arms AG
en.ammo-9x18-ap_descr:
RG028 is a cartridge used for its armour penetration capabilities. The goal of the RG028 was to become a counter to body armour; for this reason, it's loaded with a hardened steel core. Unfortunately, the round itself isn't much of an improvement over the standard, it just has a stronger impact than typical 9x18 round.
 
 -  Armor penetration power (AP): BR3 (27) 
 -  Nominal stopping power (DMG): 18
en.st_ecologist_report_3_of_3_name: Walking Dead Findings Field Report 39B rev. 2 (part 3 of 3)
en.st_raisins_descr:
Dried grapes that serve as a lightweight and natural source of sugars. They provide a quick energy boost and a touch of sweetness to the diet. A good snack to have for the road.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  Food
en.st_wpn_remington700_descr:
Often regarded as the number one bolt-action of all time, the Model 700 is a top choice for many military and law enforcement officers. With unequalled precision paired with unmatched build quality and reliability, it remains an industry leader to this day though its design is almost 6 decades old.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  origin: United States
  •  manufacturer: Remington Arms
  • Increased penetration: +5
en.st_up_carry_1_descr: A system of mounts allows for weight to be distributed onto the body more evenly.
en.st_akvatab_descr:
Ibuprofen is a medication in the nonsteroidal anti-inflammatory drug (NSAID) class that is used for treating pain, fever, and inflammation. It is used as a general painkiller.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  • causes slight dizziness
  • post-heals  A•••• L••••
en.st_up_helm_burn_1_descr: Protective alloy frame to prevent thermal and electrical damage.
en.st_up_usm_a2_descr: One of the simplest and most popular modifications, which allows trigger resistance to be reduced. Simple and handy.
en.st_wpn_toz34_bull_descr:
Intended for professional and amateur hunting, the TOZ-34 is an over/under double-barreled shotgun that acquired the state quality mark of the USSR. It is heavy, dependable and packs a punch. The "Bull" was built with target aquisition in mind and features a red dot sight. If you need a hunting rifle to rival others, this may very well be your best choice.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  origin: USSR
  •  manufacturer: Tulsky Oruzheiny Zavod
en.st_wpn_streetsweeper_aim_descr:
A combat shotgun (also known as the Striker) designed for rapid-fire capability, featuring a unique revolving cylinder that allows for quick follow-up shots. Its robust construction and simple operation make it highly effective for close-quarters engagements and crowd control. With a fast-loading mechanism and semi-automatic action, it is favored for military, law enforcement, and security applications.
 This variant features an Aimpoint AB collimator sight and significantly increased muzzle energy and stopping power at the expense of rate of fire.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  Origin: South Africa
  •  Manufacturer: Various
en.st_af_itcher_descr:
A formation of thermal nature. The Itcher consists of two separated layers. The surface is a hard, dense metamorphic rock with deep scars covering the entire body. Completely inactive and doesn't hold any noticeable properties. On the other hand, the soft, yellow glowing core is from unknown organic nature. It actively consumes excessive heat and remains cool at all times. 
However, it is not recommended to approach chemical and acid anomalies when in possession of the artefact as it will increase the adverse effects of acids and toxins in user's bloodstream. 

 Does NOT degrade over time.
en.st_wpn_akm_descr:
An improved version of the AK-47 rifle featuring detailed improvements and enhancements that optimized the rifle for mass production. Among these changes, the AKM's weight was reduced, the accuracy during automatic fire was increased and several reliability issues were addressed.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  origin: Soviet Union
  •  manufacturer: Tula Arms Plant
en.st_up_usmp_b5_descr: A modular firing mechanism provides easier maintenance and parts replacement, as well as certain improvements in ease of use.
en.st_af_electra_moonlight_descr:
This unique electrostatic artefact can resonate under the influence of psy-waves. Stalkers have learned to fine-tune the artefact so that it resonates in opposite phase to the main source of emissions, thus significantly neutralizing their effects. This orb of considerable beauty also increases electrical protection by reducing conductivity in the body when exposed to high levels of electricity. 
It should be noted that Moonlight will catch fire when exposed to open flame or even spontaneously combust. 

 Does NOT degrade over time.
en.st_af_moh_descr:
