Unfortunately though, it loses out to modern pistols in its class in terms of weight, magazine size and general performance. The Custom includes a threaded barrel and tritium iron sights.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  origin: Soviet Union
  •  manufacturer: Izhevsk Mechanical Plant
en.st_wpn_pm_bas_actor_descr:
This Soviet legacy is one of the best compact self-defence handguns available. Small, highly reliable, easy to use and easy to maintain, the Pistol Makarova was selected because of its simplicity, easy manufacturing, accuracy and reasonable stopping power. Unfortunately though, it loses out to modern pistols in its class in terms of weight, magazine size and general performance. Some say this pistol was manufactured as a limited run of PMs. Others say its a handcrafted upgrade. Regardless of the truth, it is a fine weapon and comes with a pre-threaded barrel for easy suppressor installation.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  origin: Soviet Union
  •  manufacturer: Izhevsk Mechanical Plant
en.st_addon_scope_side_descr:
A side-mounted telescope designed for lever-action rifles, preserving the rifle’s classic profile while providing a long sight radius. The optic uses a straightforward reticle and reliable internals, reflecting early 20th-century design rather than modern tactical features.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  Origin: United States
  •  Manufacturer: Winchester or contemporary period optics makers
  •  Magnification: 4x
en.st_wpn_pm_actor_descr:
This Soviet legacy is one of the best compact self-defence handguns available. Small, highly reliable, easy to use and easy to maintain, the Pistol Makarova was selected because of its simplicity, easy manufacturing, accuracy and reasonable stopping power. Unfortunately though, it loses out to modern pistols in its class in terms of weight, magazine size and general performance. The "Ceremonial" was originally given to Alexander Degtyarev as a reward for "Successful execution of highly dangerous state orders, as well as valor and courage shown in the line of duty". Other than the addition of tritium iron sights, the pistol's differences are of little note.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  origin: Soviet Union
  •  manufacturer: Izhevsk Mechanical Plant

Unfortunately though, it loses out to modern pistols in its class in terms of weight, magazine size and general performance.

  •  origin: Soviet Union
  •  manufacturer: Izhevsk Mechanical Plant
en.st_wpn_pl15_pl15_scolaz_descr:
A Russian recoil-operated, locked-breech, semi-automatic pistol, using a modified Browning cam-lock system adapted from the Browning Hi-Power pistol. Built for police and military use, the PL-15's key focus was on ergonomics and safety. The "Bearcat" featuring an Aimpoint T1 scope and laser designator, among numerous other internal modifications. This is more than just a sidearm.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  origin: Russia
  •  manufacturer: Kalashnikov Concern
  •  tactical kit upgrade
en.st_wpn_pkp_siber_descr:
A modernized Russian general-purpose machine gun derived from the PKM, designed to provide sustained fire with improved barrel cooling for extended use. It retains the 7.62x54mmR caliber and belt-fed system but incorporates a fixed, non-replaceable barrel with enhanced heat dissipation. Widely used by Russian forces, the Pecheneg is valued for its durability, reliability, and adaptability in both defensive and offensive roles.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  Origin: Russian
  •  Manufacturer: Mikhail Kalashnikov
en.st_wpn_pkp_descr:
A modernized PKM machine gun chambered for the 7.62x54mm round, said to be more accurate than all its predecessors due to a heavier, non-removable forced air cooling barrel with radial cooling ribs and a unique handle which eliminates the haze effect from hot gases. Currently in use by Russian Army Spetsnaz and, though it was developed mainly for infantry use, is often fitted to light vehicles.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  origin: Russian
  •  manufacturer: Mikhail Kalashnikov
en.st_salmon_descr:
Slices of cured and smoked Ukrainian salmon, delivering a rich and savory flavor. Though a luxury, it provides valuable nutrients and a taste of normalcy.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  Food
en.st_wpn_pkm_zulus_descr:
A modernized and improved version of the PK, the PKM's upgrades were primarily aimed at reducing weight, facilitating easier operation and simplifying production. A very reliable machine gun that remains in use as a front-line infantry and vehicle-mounted weapon with Russia's armed forces. Equipped with a heavier barrel and Kobra sight, the "Zulu" has also been manually altered for a faster rate of fire and increased muzzle velocity.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  origin: Soviet Union
  •  manufacturer: Degtyaryov Plant
en.st_wpn_colt1911_duty_descr:
Designed by John Browning, the M1911 is an extremely reliable and robust pistol that remained the standard-issue side arm of the US military from 1911 to 1985. To this day, it remains very popular for military, police and civilian use around the world. The "Aries" has been modified with a feather-trigger for faster firing, lightweight parts for easier concealed carry and a tritium ironsight.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  origin: United States
  •  manufacturer: Colt Manufacturing Company
en.st_wpn_pkm_siber_descr:
A classic Soviet-era general-purpose machine gun chambered in 7.62x54mmR, renowned for its ruggedness, simplicity, and reliability in combat. Designed in the 1960s, it remains in service with military forces around the world due to its lightweight design for its class and ease of maintenance. Its belt-fed system and adaptability make it effective in a wide range of roles, from infantry support to vehicle-mounted operations.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  Origin: Soviet Union
  •  Manufacturer: Degtyaryov Plant
en.st_addon_scope_hamr_descr:
The Leupold Mark 4 HAMR (High Accuracy Multi-Range) 4x24 is a tactical fixed-power scope tailored for mid-range precision shooting. Its standout feature is the integrated DeltaPoint red-dot sight mounted atop the scope, allowing for rapid target acquisition in close quarters while maintaining accuracy at extended ranges. The scope boasts a rugged aluminum housing, Argon/Krypton gas blend for fogproofing, and lens coatings for enhanced durability and clarity. With a 4x magnification and an illuminated CM-R2 reticle, it's optimized for 5.56 NATO platforms, though it excels with various calibers. Designed for military and law enforcement applications, the HAMR offers a compact solution for versatile combat scenarios.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  Origin: United States
  •  Manufacturer: Leupold
  •  Magnification: 4x
en.st_wpn_pb_bas_descr:
The PB (Pistolet Besshumnyj or Silent Pistol) was developed in 1967 for Spetsnaz units of the Soviet Army and KGB operatives. The pistol is based on a modified Makarov PM and features a unique integrated two-part suppressor that reduces bullet velocity to below subsonic levels.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  origin: Belgium
  •  manufacturer: FN Herstal
en.st_up_auto_c4_descr: Upgrade of the weapon's automatic components that requires a number of parts to be replaced. Improves accuracy.
en.st_wpn_oc33_descr:
Developed to replace the Stechkin APS in special paramilitary units, the OTs-33 is a blowback-operated pistol capable of automatic and semi-automatic fire. The Pernach was specifically tasked with resolving the difficulty of controlling recoil in full-auto mode present in the Stechkin APS pistol and simplifying it for combat deployment. It is cheaper to manufacture, more controllable and boasts improved recoil.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  origin: Russia
  •  manufacturer: KBP Instrument Design Bureau
en.st_wpn_mp9_descr:
A lightweight and compact submachine gun designed for rapid-fire engagements in close-quarters combat. Featuring a folding stock, integrated suppressor compatibility, and a high rate of fire, it is ideal for special forces, law enforcement, and personal defense roles. Its modern polymer construction and ambidextrous controls make it an agile and reliable weapon for dynamic tactical scenarios.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  Origin: Switzerland
  •  Manufacturer: Brugger & Thomet
en.st_up_autd_a1_descr: Adjustment of components allows the weapon to last longer without jamming.
en.st_wpn_mp153_m1_descr:
The first semi-automatic shotgun designed and manufactured by the Izhevsk Mechanical Plant, the MP-153 is one of the most popular semi-automatic shotguns of Russian origin and is widely used for various game hunting. Developed alongside the pump action MP-133 shotgun, it shares many of its parts and is known for its reliability and solid, heavy construction. The "Carabineer" includes a muzzle break and Picatinny rail.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  origin: Russia
  •  manufacturer: Izhmekh Mechanical Plant
en.st_up_barp_c2_descr: Polygon rifling is usually performed to improve accuracy of sniper rifles.
en.st_wpn_mp133_bas_descr:
An evolution of the earlier IZh-81 pump action shotgun, the MP-133 was intended for civilian and security markets as a reliable and practical hunting and self-defence weapon.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  origin: Russia
  •  manufacturer: Izhmekh Mechanical Plant
en.st_wpn_mossberg590a1_wood_descr:
The Mossberg 590A1 is a hammerless pump-action shotgun designed by Carl Benson. Modified due to Navy requests, this improved model has an aluminum trigger guard and safety, a heavier barrel, and a bayonet lug. Intended for use under extreme conditions, this weapon became the standard shotgun in the United States military. The "Retrograde" combines modern performance with vintage walnut furniture, remaining a highly effective choice for home defense, combat, and collectors.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  Origin: United States
  •  Manufacturer: O.F. Mossberg & Sons
en.st_up_zat_b6_descr: On its way back to its starting position, the bolt redirects the air flow via the barrel chamber, cooling it.
en.st_wpn_m24_descr:
Known as the "Green Dragon", the M24 Sniper Weapon System is the military and police version of the Remington Model 700 rifle, currently used by the United States Army. It has the "long action" bolt version of the Remington 700 receiver but is chambered for the 7.62x51mm NATO cartridge and fitted with a Leupold 10x40mm scope.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  origin: United States
  •  manufacturer: Remington Arms
  • Increased penetration: +5
en.st_wpn_m4a1_siber_descr:
The M4 Carbine descends from a family of firearms tracing its lineage back to the original AR-15 by ArmaLite. It is a gas operated, air cooled, selective fire rifle, sharing 80% of its parts with the M16 assault rifle, though it is notably shorter and lighter. It has been adopted by United States Special Operations Command (USSOCOM) and is the preferred weapon of the U.S. Army Special Forces and Navy SEALs. The A1 variant strengthened the barrel and replaced the burst-fire fire select with a fully automatic option.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  origin: United States
  •  manufacturer: Colt's Manufacturing Company
en.st_wpn_toz106_m1_descr:
Widely known by its vernacular name, the Death of the Chairman for its compact size, the TOZ-106 is a bolt-action, single-barreled 20 gauge shotgun with a sliding breech bolt. Features an extended 4-round mag.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  origin: Russia
  •  manufacturer: Tulsky Oruzheiny Zavod
en.st_wpn_m4_ru556_descr:
A semi-automatic, piston-driven, gas-operated AR-15 style rifle. Lightweight and ergonomic, Ruger wanted to minimize the sharp impulse of the piston striking the bolt carrier typically found in short-stroke ARs, and instead used a two-stage design in which the piston delivers two smaller impulses to the operating rod instead. This design choice allows the weapon to be easier to handle and more accurate during sustained fire. Capable of a hyperburst fire mode.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  origin: United States
  •  manufacturer: Sturm, Ruger & Co.
en.st_wpn_m4_butcher_descr:
The M4 Carbine descends from a family of firearms tracing its lineage back to the original AR-15 by ArmaLite. It is a gas operated, air cooled, selective fire rifle, sharing 80% of its parts with the M16 assault rifle, though it is notably shorter and lighter. It has been adopted by United States Special Operations Command (USSOCOM) and is the preferred weapon of the U.S. Army Special Forces and Navy SEALs. The A1 variant strengthened the barrel and replaced the burst-fire fire select with a fully automatic option. The "Butcher" is a monstrosity of weapons built for unrelenting sustained fire.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  origin: United States
  •  manufacturer: Colt's Manufacturing Company
en.st_wpn_m98b_descr:
Barrett wanted to create a tactical firearm chambered for .338 Lapua Magnum but rather than modifying a hunting rifle, they created an original design for the M98B. Sporting a simple design, it is easy for users to disassemble and clean, and thanks to its durability, versatility, and accuracy, is popular among those who demand optimum performance with unmatched reliability.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  origin: United States
  •  manufacturer: Barrett Firearms Manufacturing
  • Increased penetration: +5
en.st_wpn_lr300_descr:
Based on the AR-15, the LR-300 is an excellent weapon system suitable for military use in close quarters battle. Its folding skeletal stock makes it ideal for aggressive and rapid building entries that require a compact yet powerful selective fire weapon. Ergonomic and lightweight, it is highly accurate but is sensitive to dirt and therefore, not ideal for tough field conditions. The ML variant has a Picatinny rail for accessory attachment.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  origin: United States
  •  manufacturer: Z-M Weapons
en.st_up_armor_1_descr: Reinforced plates that last longer but are less durable.
en.st_wpn_pp2000n_descr:
A lightweight and highly maneuverable submachine gun designed for rapid deployment and personal defense. Its compact frame, high rate of fire, and ease of control make it an excellent choice for law enforcement and special forces. Capable of mounting suppressors and optics, it provides adaptability for various tactical scenarios.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  Origin: Russia
  •  Manufacturer: KBP Instrument Design Bureau
en.st_up_auts_c3_descr: A stopping device affects the blowback mechanism, improving firing precision.
en.st_wpn_l85a2_descr:
Recognized for being extremely reliable and impressively accurate, the L85A2 is the standard weapon of the British armed forces and an improvement over the L85A1, fixing many of its design flaws. Notably, the A2 is extremely reliable over a range of climates and adverse conditions allowing it to be fielded for various operational scenarios.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  origin: United Kingdom
  •  manufacturer: Royal Ordnance, Heckler & Koch
en.st_wpn_l85_m3_descr:
Recognized for being extremely reliable and impressively accurate, the L85A2 is the standard weapon of the British armed forces and an improvement over the L85A1, fixing many of its design flaws. Notably, the A2 is extremely reliable over a range of climates and adverse conditions allowing it to be fielded for various operational scenarios. This model has been modified.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  origin: United Kingdom
  •  manufacturer: Royal Ordnance, Heckler & Koch
en.st_wpn_l85_m2_descr:
Recognized for being extremely reliable and impressively accurate, the L85A2 is the standard weapon of the British armed forces and an improvement over the L85A1, fixing many of its design flaws. Notably, the A2 is extremely reliable over a range of climates and adverse conditions allowing it to be fielded for various operational scenarios.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  origin: United Kingdom
  •  manufacturer: Royal Ordnance, Heckler & Koch
en.st_wpn_l85_m1_descr:
Recognized for being extremely reliable and impressively accurate, the L85A2 is the standard weapon of the British armed forces and an improvement over the L85A1, fixing many of its design flaws. Notably, the A2 is extremely reliable over a range of climates and adverse conditions allowing it to be fielded for various operational scenarios.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  origin: United Kingdom
  •  manufacturer: Royal Ordnance, Heckler & Koch
en.st_addon_scope_bravo4_descr:
A fixed 4x magnification prism sight designed for modern battle rifles. Its wide field of view facilitates rapid target acquisition and situational awareness. The sight features a horseshoe-dot reticle calibrated for 5.56/7.62 NATO rounds, and is built with a lightweight, durable magnesium housing. It often comes with a red-dot sight mounted on top for instant close-quarters aiming.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  Origin: Germany
  •  Manufacturer: Sig Sauer
  •  Magnification: 4x
en.st_wpn_akm_isg_descr:
A custom model developed on the foundation of the AKM by the American company Rifle Dynamics. It is one of the most high-quality and modern weapons in the Zone. Several shipments of Rifle Dynamics' AK variants were sent to Ukraine for weapons trials with the goal of adoption by Ukrainian Special Forces, Rifle Dynamics was looking to sell manufacturing licenses to Eastern European Powers. However the trials were cancelled and the AK12 2016 was adopted along with the AEK for special forces. Several of these Rifle Dynamics Demonstration and Trial guns have slowly made their way to the zone over the years and are exclusively used by ISG special units.
 
 ATTACHMENTS: 
  •  Devices: ATPIAL (Advanced Target Pointer Illuminator Aiming Laser) AN/PEQ-15 produced by L3 Insight Technologies. Tactical device that combines laser designators in both visible and IR band with IR searchlight. 
  •  Scopes: All scopes for picatinny.
  •  Silencer: Rifle Dynamics ISG Sound Suppressor
en.st_wpn_ks23_kaban_descr:
At its core, the KS-23 is a manually-actuated, pump-action "shotgun" that fires unique 23mm shells. Though, while displaying an appearance more akin to a shotgun, the Russians designated the KS-23 as a "Special Carbine" due to its large-caliber rifled 700mm barrel when compared to the standard smoothbore barrels of conventional shotguns. The Drozd is a more compact version of the KS-23, featuring both a slimmed down 510mm barrel and pistol grip in pleace of the stand buttstock.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  origin: Soviet Union
  •  manufacturer: Tula Arms Plant
en.st_wpn_ks23_23_up_descr:
At its core, the KS-23 is a manually-actuated, pump-action "shotgun" that fires unique 23mm shells. Though, while displaying an appearance more akin to a shotgun, the Russians designated the KS-23 as a "Special Carbine" due to its large-caliber rifled 700mm barrel when compared to the standard smoothbore barrels of conventional shotguns. The Shortie features a slimmed down 510mm barrel.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  origin: Soviet Union
  •  manufacturer: Tula Arms Plant
en.st_wpn_kriss_descr:
Invented by French engineer Renaud Kerbrat, the Vector uses an unconventional delayed blowback system to reduce recoil and muzzle climb by transferring energy downward rather than rearward. It is the ideal choice for law enforcement and military units seeking a controllable, compact weapon system for close quarter combat environments.
 
 CHARACTERISTICS:
  •  Origin: United States
  •  Manufacturer: Kriss USA, Inc.
en.st_wpn_korth_custom_descr:
A custom pistol made by the legendary, high-end firearms manufacturer, Korth. For some gun aficionados, nothing more needs to be said. Korth weapons are perhaps best known for having price tags that most people would find easier to associate with German cars than German guns, though the entry point is far more accessible. Simply put, Korth guns are legendary.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  origin: Germany
  •  manufacturer: Korth Waffen
en.st_wpn_korth_descr:
A custom pistol made by the legendary, high-end firearms manufacturer, Korth. For some gun aficionados, nothing more needs to be said. Korth weapons are perhaps best known for having price tags that most people would find easier to associate with German cars than German guns, though the entry point is far more accessible. Simply put, Korth guns are legendary.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  origin: Germany
  •  manufacturer: Korth Waffen
en.st_up_ret_c1_descr: Thickening of the sleeve allows barrel pressure to be increased, improving bullet speed.
en.st_wpn_ithacam37_trench_descr:
One of most recognized pump-action shotguns of the United States owning the longest production run for a pump-action shotgun in history, the Ithaca M37 was designed for police, military and general civilian use. It utilizes a novel combination ejection and loading port on the bottom of the weapon, leaving the sides closed to the elements. The "Trenchgun" model includes a bayonet lug and heatshield to help with weapon cooling.
 
 CHARACTERISTICS:
  •  Origin: United States
  •  Manufacturer: Ithaca Gun Company
en.st_wpn_ithacam37_stakeout_descr:
One of most recognized pump-action shotguns of the United States owning the longest production run for a pump-action shotgun in history, the Ithaca M37 was designed for police, military and general civilian use. It utilizes a novel combination ejection and loading port on the bottom of the weapon, leaving the sides closed to the elements. The "Stakeout" model features a shortened 330mm barrel and pistol grip stock.
 
 CHARACTERISTICS:
  •  Origin: United States
  •  Manufacturer: Ithaca Gun Company
en.st_addon_sil_pl15_descr:
A suppressor developed for the PL-15 pistol, providing effective sound dampening while maintaining compactness for tactical use.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  Origin: Russia
 
 COMPATIBILITY:
  •  Lebedev PL-15
en.ammo-9x39-ap_descr:
The SP-6 is a subsonic armour-piercing round with a jacketed soft point bullet with a hard steel core that protrudes from the casing. Requires a suppressor for stealth firing. Used by special services of Warsaw Pact countries. Effective against light body armour.
 
 -  Armor penetration power (AP): BR5 (55) 
 -  Nominal stopping power (DMG): 43 
 
SPECIAL:
 
 -  sub-sonic ammunition
 -  greatly increased projectile drop with distance
en.st_wpn_howa20_descr:
A a gas operated, select-fire assault rifle appearing to be an amalgam of many modern weapons such as the FN SCAR-16, SIG 516 and HK 416, with hardly any original features to distinguish it. However, this is not necessarily a bad thing as typical requirements for a military weapon tend to include reliability, durability, ease of maintenance and combat effectiveness; all of which the Howa Type 20 effectively check.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  origin: Japan
  •  manufacturer: Howa
en.st_wpn_hk417_descr:
A reliable, gas-operated, selective-fire rifle with a rotating bolt, intended for use in roles where the greater penetrative power, stopping power and range of the 7.62x51mm cartridge are required. It has been adopted for service by a number of armed forces, special forces and police organizations.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  origin: Germany
  •  manufacturer: Heckler & Koch
en.st_wpn_hk416_descr:
Developed for United States special operations forces as a major product improvement of the M4, the HK416 uses the proprietary gas piston system found on the G36 and therefore does not introduce propellant gases and carbon fouling back into the weapon’s interior, making it the most reliable of any M4/M16 type weapons. The rifle has been combat-proven and has rightfully gained worldwide attention of military and law enforcement.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  origin: Germany
  •  manufacturer:  Heckler & Koch
en.st_wpn_groza_guns_nimble_descr:
The Groza "Thunder" modular assault rifle was intended for various special forces in the Russian Army and Internal Affairs Ministry as a dedicated urban warfare weapon. It features a bullpup design with a 40mm grenade launcher located in place of the removable foregrip. The "Storm" is a heavy modification of the experimental Groza-1, featuring an extended magazine. It's a long-standing dream of every veteran Duty member given to only the most worthy of the group.
 
  PROPERTIES:
  •  origin: Russia
  •  manufacturer: TsKIB SOO
en.st_wpn_groza_guns_descr:
The Groza "Thunder" modular assault rifle was intended for various special forces in the Russian Army and Internal Affairs Ministry as a dedicated urban warfare weapon. It features a bullpup design with a 40mm grenade launcher located in place of the removable foregrip.
 
  PROPERTIES:
  •  origin: Russia
  •  manufacturer: TsKIB SOO
en.st_addon_scope_exps3_descr:
A compact holographic sight offering a selection of reticles designed for instinctive aiming in fast-paced engagements. The EXPS3 features side-mounted controls, a quick-detach mount, and a protective hood over the viewing window. Its design prioritizes speed and reliability, letting shooters engage targets rapidly without adjusting eye position, while built-in ruggedness ensures consistent performance under field stress.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  Origin: United States
  •  Manufacturer: EOTech
  •  Magnification: 1x
  •  Reticle switch: press Mark Switch key
en.st_wpn_glock17_m1_descr:
A classic polymer-framed, short recoil-operated pistol trusted by law enforcement officers and military personnel around the globe because of its unsurpassed reliability, optimal magazine capacity and low weight. The Glock 17 is easy to operate and maintain and is a versatile weapon that can be used for self-defense, target shooting, or combat situations. The "Bruder" has been equipped with an integrated base for sight installation, a tactical rubber grip and a threaded barrel among various intermal modifications.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  origin: Austria
  •  manufacturer: Glock Ges.m.b.H.
en.st_up_chem_2_descr: Even a simple plastic inner layer can protect the wearer from chemical hazards.
en.st_wpn_glock_descr:
Reliability, durability and simplicity have made the Glock 19 one of the most widely used sidearms in law enforcement. Due to its reduced dimensions when compared to the Glock 17, it is ideal for use as a backup weapon or for concealed carry purposes.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  origin: Austria
  •  manufacturer: Glock Ges.m.b.H.
en.st_af_monolith_descr: The origins of artefacts such as this one are a mystery, as they are rarely found outside the northernmost parts of the Zone. \nThis unique artefact projects a non-contact field that inhibits nearbly anomalous phenomena. This grants the wearer a notable level of protection against most of the Zone's environmental hazards. It is also one of the few active artefacts that can be safely handled without lead containers. However, when you hold it your flesh feels dry and flaky, your bones hard and stiff, the ligaments in your joints squeaky and brittle. Thick armour or great supernatural vitality would be needed by anyone intending to wear this artefact into battle.
en.st_wpn_gauss_bas_descr:
A highly experimental, extremely accurate, artefact-powered weapon made by an unknown party in the Zone. Instead of gunpowder, the gauss rifle utilizes electromagnetic forces to launch projectiles at incredible speeds similar to a railgun. Proportionate to its tremendous firepower, the recoil is surprisingly controllable. Among other weapons of its class, its accuracy and firepower is unmatched.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  origin: Russia
  •  manufacturer: Redacted
en.st_wpn_svd_m1_descr:
One of the most iconic sniper rifles despite not technically being a sniper rifle, the SVD was intended to provide precise, suppressive fire on enemy positions as well as pick off high value targets. However, this squad-level DMR was eventually pressed into service as a sniper by those with access to nothing else. Relatively light, precise and well-balanced, it unfortunately loses out to dedicated sniper rifles in performance.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  origin: Soviet Union
  •  manufacturer: Kalashnikov Concern
en.st_wpn_g36nimble_rwap_descr:
Created to replace the aging G3, the G36 continues to set the standard in the field of assault rifles with unprecedented reliability. Lightweight, accurate and simple in maintenance, it has found its way into the hands of various law enforcement agencies worldwide. The 'C' model features a shorter barrel, handguard and stock and includes a flash hider.
 This variant comes with a foregrip, laser sight and modified bolt for an increased rate of fire.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  Origin: Germany
  •  Manufacturer: Heckler & Koch
en.st_wpn_g36new_c_descr:
Created to replace the aging G3, the G36 continues to set the standard in the field of assault rifles with unprecedented reliability. Lightweight, accurate and simple in maintenance, it has found its way into the hands of various law enforcement agencies worldwide. The 'C' model features a shorter barrel, handguard and stock and includes a flash hider.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  origin: Germany
  •  manufacturer: Heckler & Koch
en.st_wpn_g36new_nimble_descr:
Created to replace the aging G3, the G36 continues to set the standard in the field of assault rifles with unprecedented reliability. Lightweight, accurate and simple in maintenance, it has found its way into the hands of various law enforcement agencies worldwide. This odd and unique model is similar to the G36K, but is much lighter with no reduction in accuracy or increase in recoil. The bolt has also been modified for increased rate of fire.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  origin: Germany
  •  manufacturer: Heckler & Koch
en.st_wpn_fn57_descr:
A delayed blowback, semi-automatic pistol designed as a complimentary sidearm for the FN P90 submachine gun as they both share the same 5.7x28mm cartridge. This allows the Five-seveN to provide good penetration against targets protected by body armor while keeping the weapon's weight, dimensions and recoil reasonable.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  origin: Belgium
  •  manufacturer: FN Herstal
en.st_wpn_g3_descr:
In the world of battle rifles, the Heckler and Koch G3 is an important part of firearms history, known for being incredibly durable, reliable and decently accurate. The A3 varient features a retractable stock.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  origin: Germany
  •  manufacturer: Heckler & Koch
en.st_wpn_fort21_descr:
A copy of the Jericho 941 based on the highly regarded CZ-75 short recoil system, the Fort-21 is a high-performance pistol developed for special forces and law enforcement, featuring a modular polymer frame and advanced recoil management. Designed for fast target acquisition, it supports various tactical attachments such as suppressors and optics. Its combination of reliability, low weight, and adaptability makes it an effective sidearm in high-risk scenarios.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  Origin: Ukraine
  •  Manufacturer: RPC Fort
en.st_wpn_fort17_descr:
A modernized polymer-framed pistol offering a lightweight design with enhanced recoil control and improved durability. Built for tactical applications, it features an ambidextrous safety and a high-capacity magazine for increased firepower. Its ergonomic build and low maintenance requirements make it a reliable sidearm for both self-defense and professional use.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  Origin: Ukraine
  •  Manufacturer: RPC Fort
en.st_wpn_fnp45_descr:
A recoil-operated, polymer-framed pistol that provides good accuracy, outstanding reliability and versatility in a weapon that is comfortable to handle. Created as a homage to John Browning of the M1911 in .45 ACP, it offers an impressive amount of ambidextrous features, even when compared to modern pistols.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  origin: United States, Belgium
  •  manufacturer: FNH USA
en.st_wpn_fn2000e_descr:
The aim of the FN F2000 was to produce a modular weapon offering all of the popular features of the modern assault rifle such as a compact bullpup layout, an ambidextrous frame and a design with plenty of available options and addons. So far, the FN F2000 rifle has found only a few buyers, including the Armed Forces of Slovenia and Belgian Special Operations Forces. Regardless, it is in no doubt a unique and futuristic-looking weapon, looking like something straight out of a sci-fi movie.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  origin: Belgium
  •  manufacturer: FN Herstal
en.st_wpn_famas3_descr:
Adopted by the French in 1978, the FAMAS has since became the standard French Army rifle. The weapon features a unique bullpup design, is very accurate and is easily controlled during its burst fire mode. Notably, the length of the weapon allows it to be used in roles that would ordinarily require a submachine gun.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  origin: France
  •  manufacturer: GIAT Industries
en.st_wpn_fal_sa58_osw_descr:
A assault-carbine variant of the paratrooper model FAL able to use any metric-measurement FAL magazines. Notable changes are the side-folding polymer stock and shorter barrel. While civilians are limited to semi-automatic, military and law enforcement variants are equipped with a full-auto option.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  origin: United States
  •  manufacturer: David Selvaggio Arms
en.st_wpn_dvl10_descr:
A modular, multi-purpose lightweight and compact rifle developed for special service and combat missions where exceptional modularity accuracy and range are required.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  origin: Russia
  •  manufacturer: Lobaev Arms
  • Increased penetration: +5
en.mdr_up_descr:
The Desert Tech MDR (Micro Dynamic Rifle) in STALKER GAMMA is a versatile, bullpup-configured rifle known for its compact design and exceptional modularity. Chambered for various calibers, it excels in both close-quarters and long-range combat. Its ambidextrous controls, lightweight frame, and high accuracy make it a reliable choice for those navigating the unpredictable dangers of the Zone. This version is chambered in 5.56x45 with a tan polymer body and has been permanently upgraded with the Special Upgrade Pack.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  Origin: United States
  •  Manufacturer: Desert Tech LLC
en.mdr_black_up_descr:
The Desert Tech MDR (Micro Dynamic Rifle) in STALKER GAMMA is a versatile, bullpup-configured rifle known for its compact design and exceptional modularity. Chambered for various calibers, it excels in both close-quarters and long-range combat. Its ambidextrous controls, lightweight frame, and high accuracy make it a reliable choice for those navigating the unpredictable dangers of the Zone. This version is chambered in 7.62x51 with a black polymer body and has been permanently upgraded with the Special Upgrade Pack.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  Origin: United States
  •  Manufacturer: Desert Tech LLC
en.mdr_black_descr:
The Desert Tech MDR (Micro Dynamic Rifle) in STALKER GAMMA is a versatile, bullpup-configured rifle known for its compact design and exceptional modularity. Chambered for various calibers, it excels in both close-quarters and long-range combat. Its ambidextrous controls, lightweight frame, and high accuracy make it a reliable choice for those navigating the unpredictable dangers of the Zone. This version is chambered in 7.62x51 with a black polymer body.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  Origin: United States
  •  Manufacturer: Desert Tech LLC
en.st_beans_descr:
Canned baked beans in a savory sauce, brought from outside the Zone. This staple offers a comforting taste reminiscent of home, providing sustenance during extended expeditions.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  Food
en.st_wpn_cz75_descr:
Developed by the Koucky brothers, this semi-automatic pistol was intended for the export market. The CZ-75 accumulated the best features from many preceding designs with the resulting pistol being aesthetically attractive, comfortable, accurate and reliable in operation.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  origin: Czechoslovak Socialist Republic
  •  manufacturer: Ceska zbrojovka
en.st_wpn_ak105_sp_descr:
A carbine version of the AK-74M rifle, the AK-105, like the AK-104, features a shortened barrel and is ideal for close quarters combat. The rifle is designed with modern and composite materials to significantly reduce weight and improve accuracy. The "Specialist" is a tactician's dream, featuring a foldable stock, canted sight, vertical foregrip and a multitude of modified internals.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  origin: Russia
  •  manufacturer: Izhmash
en.st_cigar3_descr:
Classic Camel flavor with a smooth finish. A solid choice for stalkers who like a bit of class with their radiation burns. Not imported into The Zone often, hence the price tag on it is fairly high.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  Stimulant
  •  Alcohol Sobering Effect
en.st_af_lobster_eyes_descr:
As the name suggests, this artefact has the shape of two eggs fused together. The outer surface is very thick, the high density of its formation might be the reason behind its deep colour. 
This artefact offers slightly more psy-protection than its cousin, Stone Flower. It resonates under the influence of psy-waves to some degree and absorbs the dangerous effect. 
Another positive property is the ability to consume excessive heat while remaining cool at all times. 
Due to its density of the surface, the Lobster Eyes is quite heavy. 

 Does NOT degrade over time.
en.st_up_add_b7_descr: A complex, integrated alteration of the weapon's mechanical and automated parts, which allows its calibre to be changed at the cost of reliability.
en.st_up_usm_c1_descr: Protective sputter makes misfiring due to firing mechanism malfunction impossible.
en.st_wpn_colt1911_merc_descr:
Designed by John Browning, the M1911 is an extremely reliable and robust pistol that remained the standard-issue side arm of the US military from 1911 to 1985. To this day, it remains very popular for military, police and civilian use around the world. The "Orion" has been modified with a a tritium ironsight and a heavier barrel and stock, greatly increasing its accuracy.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  origin: United States
  •  manufacturer: Colt Manufacturing Company
en.st_wpn_svi_descr:
A high-performance, custom-built semi-automatic pistol designed for competitive shooting and tactical applications. Featuring a modular frame, precision-machined components, and a finely tuned trigger, it offers exceptional accuracy and rapid follow-up shots. Its customizable nature allows shooters to tailor it for personal preferences, making it a top choice among professional marksmen and elite operators.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  Origin: United States
  •  Manufacturer: Strayer Voigt Inc
en.st_wpn_coonan357_descr:
A unique semi-automatic pistol designed to handle the power of a traditional revolver cartridge while maintaining the ergonomics of a 1911-style handgun. It features a distinctive delayed-blowback action, providing smooth operation and reduced recoil for a more controllable shooting experience. Compact yet powerful, it blends classic design with modern engineering for those seeking high-performance in a portable package.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  Origin: United States
  •  Manufacturer: Coonan
en.st_wpn_brn180_descr:
The BRN-180 is a modern take on the classic AR-180 rifle design, featuring a short-stroke gas piston system for reliable operation, this rifle offers shooters a lightweight and compact platform, perfect for tactical applications or sport shooting. Retaining the familiar ergonomics of the AR-15 platform while offering enhanced reliability and ease of maintenance, the BRN-180 is known for its accuracy and smooth shooting experience, making it a popular choice among firearms enthusiasts looking for a versatile and reliable rifle.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  Origin: United States
  •  Manufacturer: Brownells
en.st_wpn_bm16_full_alt_23_descr:
Intended for professional and amateur hunting, the TOZ-34 is an over/under double-barreled shotgun that acquired the state quality mark of the USSR. It is heavy, dependable and packs a punch. This peculiar TOZ-34 was modified to support larger rounds.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  origin: USSR
  •  manufacturer: Tulsky Oruzheiny Zavod
en.st_up_zat_c4_descr: A replacement of the automatic parts is more of an optimization than improvement of the gas piston. Provides a considerable increase in the weapon's rate of fire.
en.st_addon_scope_valday_ps320_descr:
A Russian take on the Elcan SpecterDR concept: a rugged dual-mode combat sight pairing a low-profile 1x window with a magnified 6x prism, switchable on the fly without re-zeroing. Built for mechanical reliability and quick transitions, it favors stout construction, simple selector controls and broad reticle holds suited to assault-rifle ergonomics rather than elaborate electronics.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  Origin: Russia
  •  Manufacturer: Valday
  •  Magnification: 1x / 6x
  •  Reticle illumination: press Mark Switch key
en.st_wpn_beretta_px4_descr:
A modern semi-automatic pistol known for its rotating barrel action, which enhances accuracy and reduces recoil. Designed for military, law enforcement, and civilian use, it features a lightweight polymer frame, ambidextrous controls, and modular grip options for improved ergonomics. Its combination of durability, smooth operation, and adaptability makes it a reliable choice for self-defense and tactical applications.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  Origin: Italy
  •  Manufacturer: Fabbrica d'Armi Pietro Beretta
en.st_wpn_beretta_descr:
The Beretta is perhaps best known as the standard pistol of the US Military that replaced the legendary M1911. Known for being accurate, durable and reliable, it's been adopted by several countries and has been setting the standards for military, police and tactical pistols for over a quarter century.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  origin: Italy
  •  manufacturer: Fabbrica d'Armi Pietro Beretta
en.st_wpn_benelli_m1014_descr:
A semi-automatic shotgun designed for military and law enforcement use, produced by Benelli and based on their renowned M4 design. It is chambered in 12-gauge and features a gas-operated action, allowing for fast follow-up shots with minimal recoil. The M1014 is highly regarded for its durability, versatility, and performance in close-quarters combat situations.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  Origin: Italy
  •  Manufacturer: Benelli
en.st_wpn_aug_a2_descr:
The AUG (Armee-Universal-Gewehr) is a modernized bullpup assault rifle known for its compact design, durability, and modular capabilities. Unlike its predecessor, it features a Picatinny rail in place of the fixed optic, allowing users to customize their sighting systems for various combat scenarios. Retaining the smooth handling and reliability of the AUG platform, it remains a versatile choice for military and law enforcement forces worldwide.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  Origin: Austria
  •  Manufacturer: Steyr Arms
en.st_wpn_aug_a3_custom_bas_descr:
The AUG (Armee-Universal-Gewehr) is the standard small arm of many Armed Forces and Special Units all over the world since 1977. It is famous for its modular concept “Bullpup“ design making it a short, well-balanced rifle with high accuracy and reliability. The A3 variant is fitted with four Picatinny slats with the Commando designation designed specially for Austria's Jagdkommando Special Forces. This model allows rails to be configured to take an array of optics, illuminators or pointers.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  origin: Austria
  •  manufacturer: Steyr Arms
en.st_af_gravi_descr:
Gravi is formed from metallic substances exposed to prolonged gravitation. This makes it capable of sustaining an powerful anti-gravitational field, which causes it to have various properties, among others reducing weight of all objects in its close proximity. For a long time, the artefact was a mystery, and it was scientist Sakharov at Yantar who first discovered that Gravi creates a minute singularity field of anti-gravitational nature, the phenomenon which occurs in intervals of 30 minutes. 
A dangerous effect of this artefact is the fact that it will increase electrical conductivity, so the probability of electrocution while wearing this artefact is much higher, especially during storms and in the vicinity of electrical anomalies. 
Another downside is that it will increase the negative effects of psy-waves and is a potent conductor. 

 Does NOT degrade over time.
en.st_wpn_aug_a3_bas_descr:
The AUG (Armee-Universal-Gewehr) is the standard small arm of many Armed Forces and Special Units all over the world since 1977. It is famous for its modular concept “Bullpup“ design making it a short, well-balanced rifle with high accuracy and reliability. The A3 variant is fitted with four Picatinny slats.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  origin: Austria
  •  manufacturer: Steyr Arms
en.st_wpn_aug_a3_descr:
The AUG (Armee-Universal-Gewehr) is an upgraded version of a bullpup rifle, featuring a full-length rail system for optics and attachments. It improves on the original with enhanced modularity, better ergonomics, and increased adaptability for modern combat needs. Retaining its compact and lightweight design, it remains a popular choice for military and law enforcement worldwide.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  Origin: Austria
  •  Manufacturer: Steyr Arms
en.st_wpn_aug_a1_descr:
The AUG (Armee-Universal-Gewehr) is a bullpup assault rifle with an integrated optic, designed for compact handling and superior accuracy. Its futuristic design and durable polymer construction make it a lightweight yet powerful option for modern combat. With its modular design, it can be adapted for various roles, from standard infantry use to specialized operations. The A1 variant is fitted with an integrated 1.5x scope.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  Origin: Austria
  •  Manufacturer: Steyr Arms
en.st_wpn_ash12_descr:
A dedicated CQB/Urban Operations rifle, developed by request of the Russian FSB for special units that operate in urban environments against heavily armed and organized targets that need to be killed in one shot. Therefore, the ShAK-12 is designed with extreme short-range stopping power in mind.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  origin: Russia
  •  manufacturer: Izhmash
en.st_wpn_ar15_freedom_descr:
After most of Colt's patents for the Colt AR-15 expired in 1977, many firearm manufacturers began to produce copies of the Colt AR-15 under various names. Despite the patents expiring, Colt retained the trademark of the AR-15 and is the sole manufacturer able to label their firearms as so. The HERA is a deeply modernized variant created by Hera Arms.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  origin: United States
  •  manufacturer: Hera Arms
en.st_wpn_sr1m_sr1upgr1_descr:
A semi-automatic pistol designed as an analogue of the famous Italian Beretta for the Russian military. However, the constructors decided to make their upcoming creation more powerful and effective in close combat. The result surpassed their greatest expectations, as the newly arrived SR-1 Gyurza was immediately adopted by Federal Protective Services. Includes a threaded barrel and laser designator.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  origin: Russia
  •  manufacturer: TsNIITochMash Institute
  •  tactical kit upgrade
en.st_wpn_amb17_descr:
A compact, integrally suppressed assault rifle designed for stealth operations and close-quarters combat. Its advanced suppressed system minimizes both noise and muzzle flash, making it highly effective for special forces and covert missions. Featuring a lightweight polymer frame and a modular rail system, it allows for easy customization with optics and tactical accessories while maintaining excellent maneuverability.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  Origin: Russia
  •  Manufacturer: Kalashnikov Concern
en.st_wpn_am17_descr:
A compact assault rifle designed for urban combat and close-quarters engagements, featuring a lightweight polymer frame for enhanced maneuverability. Its modular design includes a full-length Picatinny rail for mounting optics and accessories, allowing for greater adaptability in tactical scenarios. With a balanced combination of firepower and portability, it is well-suited for special forces, law enforcement, and military personnel operating in confined environments.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  Origin: Russia
  •  Manufacturer: Kalashnikov Concern
en.st_wpn_aks_descr:
The Avtomat Kalashnikova, is a gas-operated assault rifle developed by Russian small-arms designer Mikhail Kalashnikov. After more than seven decades since its creation, the AK-47 and its variants remain one of the most popular and widely used firearms in the world due to their reliability under harsh conditions, low production cost, and ease of use. All AKS-47 rifles featured a downward-folding metal stock.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  origin: Soviet Union
  •  manufacturer: Kalashnikov Concern
en.st_wpn_ks23_kaban_kab_up_descr:
At its core, the KS-23 is a manually-actuated, pump-action "shotgun" that fires unique 23mm shells. Though, while displaying an appearance more akin to a shotgun, the Russians designated the KS-23 as a "Special Carbine" due to its large-caliber rifled barrel when compared to the standard smoothbore barrels of conventional shotguns. The Drozd is a more compact version of the KS-23, featuring both a slimmed down 510mm barrel and pistol grip in pleace of the stand buttstock. The "Boar" features a threaded barrel for introduction of a suppressor and reflex sight for better target acquisition.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  origin: Soviet Union
  •  manufacturer: Tula Arms Plant
  •  tactical kit upgrade
en.st_wpn_ak74u_tac_descr:
The AKS-74U bridges the tactical deployment gap between a submachine gun and an assault rifle and was intended as a compact but relatively powerful automatic alternative to the AKS-74. It is significantly lighter and more maneuverable in tight quarters while still boasting the reliability of a Kalashnikov. This model has been extensively modified, including but not limited to a vertical foregrip extended magazine and laser designator. It's performance is exceptional.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  origin: Russia
  •  manufacturer: Kalashnikov Concern
en.st_af_cocoon_descr:
A lattice-like structure with a film covering the gaps, formed in gravitational anomalies. When equipped, it causes the skin to temporarily harden in response to physical trauma, impeding mobility but reducing harm.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  Perk Artefact
en.st_wpn_ak74u_old_descr:
The AKS-74U bridges the tactical deployment gap between a submachine gun and an assault rifle and was intended as a compact but relatively powerful automatic alternative to the AKS-74. It is significantly lighter and more maneuverable in tight quarters while still boasting the reliability of a Kalashnikov.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  origin: Russia
  •  manufacturer: Kalashnikov Concern
en.st_addon_sil_tgpv_descr:
A Russian suppressor developed for precision shooting, designed to enhance stealth operations with superior noise dampening.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  Origin: Russia
 
 COMPATIBILITY:
  •  7.62mm
en.st_wpn_ak74u_isg_descr:
A custom model developed on the foundation of the AKS-74U by the American company Rifle Dynamics. It is one of the most high-quality and modern weapons in the Zone. Several shipments of Rifle Dynamics' AK variants were sent to Ukraine for weapons trials with the goal of adoption by Ukrainian Special Forces, Rifle Dynamics was looking to sell manufacturing licenses to Eastern European Powers. However the trials were cancelled and the AK12 2016 was adopted along with the AEK for special forces. Several of these Rifle Dynamics Demonstration and Trial guns have slowly made their way to the zone over the years and are exclusively used by ISG special units.
 
 ATTACHMENTS: 
  •  Scopes: All scopes for picatinny.
  •  Silencer: Rifle Dynamics ISG Sound Suppressor
en.st_wpn_ak74u_descr:
The AKS-74U bridges the tactical deployment gap between a submachine gun and an assault rifle and was intended as a compact but relatively powerful automatic alternative to the AKS-74. It is significantly lighter and more maneuverable in tight quarters while still boasting the reliability of a Kalashnikov. Each AK-74UN is fitted with a side-rail bracket for mounting optics.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  origin: Russia
  •  manufacturer: Kalashnikov Concern
en.st_wpn_ak74m_descr:
An improved version of the AK-74 and the service rifle of the Russian Federation, designed with modern and composite materials to significantly reduce weight and improve accuracy. Each AK-74M is fitted with a side-rail bracket for mounting optics.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  origin: Russia
  •  manufacturer: Kalashnikov Concern
en.st_wpn_ak74_eot_descr:
Developed in the early 1970s by Mikhail Kalashnikov to replace the AKM, the AK-74 is an adaptation of the 7.62x39mm AKM assault rifle and features several important design improvements including the use of the newer, high velocity 5.45x39mm round. Compared with the preceding AKM, it has better effective firing range, accuracy and reliability. This special variant comes with an EOTech sight.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  origin: Russia
  •  manufacturer: Izhmash
en.st_up_stk_c3_descr: A light mobile component is installed in the inclined handle to stabilize the weapon by creating a counter-effect to recoil when the weapon is fired.
en.st_wpn_ak74_pmc_descr:
Developed in the early 1970s by Mikhail Kalashnikov to replace the AKM, the AK-74 is an adaptation of the 7.62x39mm AKM assault rifle and features several important design improvements including the use of the newer, high velocity 5.45x39mm round. Compared with the preceding AKM, it has a better effective firing range, accuracy and reliability. The "PMC" includes a laser designator, vertical foregrip and buzzle break in addition to an assortment of internal modifications.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  origin: Russia
  •  manufacturer: Izhmash
en.st_wpn_ak74_old_descr:
Developed in the early 1970s by Mikhail Kalashnikov to replace the AKM, the AK-74 is an adaptation of the 7.62x39mm AKM assault rifle and features several important design improvements including the use of the newer, high velocity 5.45x39mm round. Compared with the preceding AKM, it has better effective firing range, accuracy and reliability.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  origin: Russia
  •  manufacturer: Izhmash
en.st_wpn_ak74_n_descr:
Developed in the early 1970s by Mikhail Kalashnikov to replace the AKM, the AK-74 is an adaptation of the 7.62x39mm AKM assault rifle and features several important design improvements including the use of the newer, high velocity 5.45x39mm round. Compared with the preceding AKM, it has better effective firing range, accuracy and reliability.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  origin: Russia
  •  manufacturer: Izhmash
en.st_wpn_ump45_descr:
Developed as a more powerful, lighter and cheaper successor to the MP5, the UMP45 provides greater stopping power but also produces more recoil. To mitigate this issue, the UMP's cyclic rate of fire was lowered significantly. Though created to replace the MP5, both submachine guns still see production to this day with the UMP being used in more than 20 countries, worldwide.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  origin: Germany
  •  manufacturer: Heckler & Koch
en.st_up_bard_b1_descr: Treatment of the internal surface of the barrel protects it from mechanical damage.
en.st_tactical_knife_descr:
A distinctively curved blade known for its powerful chopping ability, traditionally used as both a tool and a weapon. Its weighted forward design makes it highly effective for cutting, making it a staple in survival, combat, and utility applications.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  Use: Field Dressing Mutants
  •  Melee Weapon
  •  Light Attack Power: 60
  •  Heavy Attack Power: 107
  •  Armor Penetration: 35
  •  Cuts Thick Mutant Skin?: YES
  •  Mutant Pelt Quality: 75% - 98%
en.st_knife_hunting_descr:
A versatile fixed-blade knife designed for skinning, cutting, and general outdoor survival tasks. Its sturdy construction and ergonomic handle make it an essential tool for hunters and outdoor enthusiasts.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  Melee Weapon
  •  Light Attack Power: 42
  •  Heavy Attack Power: 71
  •  Armor Penetration: 24
  •  Cuts Thick Mutant Skin?: YES
  •  Mutant Pelt Quality: 45% - 60%
en.st_wpn_ak105_shakal_descr:
A carbine version of the AK-74M rifle, the AK-105, like the AK-104, features a shortened barrel and is ideal for close quarters combat. The rifle is designed with modern and composite materials to significantly reduce weight and improve accuracy. This model has been extensively modified.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  origin: Russia
  •  manufacturer: Izhmash
en.st_knife_needle_descr:
A classic military knife originally designed for scouts and special forces, featuring a distinctive curved blade and a durable wooden or synthetic handle. Known for its balance and cutting power, it remains a favored close-combat and utility weapon.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  Use: Field Dressing Mutants
  •  Melee Weapon
  •  Light Attack Power: 45
  •  Heavy Attack Power: 55
  •  Armor Penetration: 18
  •  Cuts Thick Mutant Skin?: NO
  •  Mutant Pelt Quality: 35% - 50%
en.st_up_helm_chem_2_descr: Respirator for the total blocking of poisons.
en.ammo-12x76-zhekan_descr:
This heavy 12 gauge slug round is normally used for hunting big game, but is also good for other purposes. Instead of piercing, this hefty slug simply crushes through armour.
 
 -  Armor penetration power (AP): BR2 (24) 
 -  Nominal stopping power (DMG): 147
en.st_af_cell_descr:
A porous sphere with a star-like formation spinning in the center. Originates in gravitational anomalies. If the user of this artefact were to be hit with a fast-moving object, the Cell would instantly atomize some of its mass, protecting its bearer, but resulting in minor radiation exposure.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  Perk Artefact
en.st_sledge_hammer_descr:
A heavy, two-handed striking tool designed for powerful impact, often used for demolition, breaching, and melee combat in extreme situations. Its massive weight and solid construction allow it to break through obstacles, making it a formidable weapon or tool in survival and tactical scenarios.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  Melee Weapon
  •  Light Attack Power: 120
  •  Heavy Attack Power: 170
  •  Armor Penetration: 45
  •  Increased Range
en.st_axe2_descr:
A compact, sharp-edged tool designed for chopping wood, processing game, and general survival use. Its sturdy handle and balanced weight make it an essential companion for outdoor expeditions and wilderness survival.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  Melee Weapon
  •  Light Attack Power: 120
  •  Heavy Attack Power: 170
  •  Armor Penetration: 24
  •  Increased Range
en.st_wpn_wa2000_descr:
The Walther WA 2000 is a semi-automatic bullpup sniper rifle produced by the Carl Walther GmbH Sportwaffen company from 1982 until 1988. It was produced in three different calibers. Production of the rifle was limited and was shortly stopped because it was too expensive to achieve widespread sales and not robust enough for military use as a sniper rifle. Only 176 were built, making it one of the rarest and most sought out production firearms ever made.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  origin: West Germany
  •  manufacturer: Walther GmbH
  • Increased penetration: +5
en.st_wpn_ak5c_isg_descr:
A version of the FN FNC assault rifle made for the Swedish Armed Forces and modified to adapt to the partially subarctic Swedish climate. The AK 5C is the modernized version of the original AK 5 with improvements including a new rail system, iron sights and bolt catch. This model has been modified.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  origin: Sweden
  •  manufacturer: Carl Gustafs Stads Gevarsfaktori
en.ammo-7.62x54-ap_descr:
The 7.62x54mm calibre 7N13 armor-piercing machine gun round. It is a high-powered round and thanks to a hard steel core it possesses quite good penetrative capabilities.
 
 -  Armor penetration power (AP): BR6 (80) 
 -  Nominal stopping power (DMG): 62
en.st_wpn_svt40_descr:
A semi-automatic rifle that saw widespread service during and after World War II. Originally intended to be the Soviet Army's new service rifle, its production was disrupted by the German invasion in 1941, resulting in a change back to the Mosin–Nagant for the duration of World War II. After the war, the Soviet Union adopted new rifles, such as the SKS and AK-47.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  origin: Soviet Union
  •  manufacturer: Fedor Vasilievich Tokarev
en.st_wpn_ak12_mono_kit_descr:
The standard service assault rifle of the Russian army, designed to replace older AK-74M and AK-100 series rifles. This model is the pinnacle of AK system development, different from the previous generations by its elaborate ergonomics, all-day usability and increased accuracy and precision. Capable of a hyperburst fire mode. This model is very rarely encountered and is often found in the hands of high ranking Monolith. Featuring a giant magazine, ACOG scope, laser designator and a tablet's worth of internal modifications, the "Monolith's Light" is the pinnacle of Monolithian weaponry.
 
  •  origin: Russia
  •  manufacturer: Izhmash
  •  tactical kit upgrade
en.st_wpn_ak105_descr:
A carbine version of the AK-74M rifle, the AK-105, like the AK-104, features a shortened barrel and is ideal for close quarters combat. The rifle is designed with modern and composite materials to significantly reduce weight and improve accuracy.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  origin: Russia
  •  manufacturer: Izhmash
en.st_wpn_ak104_alfa_descr:
A compact version of the AK-103 rifle featuring a shortened barrel. The rifle is designed with modern and composite materials to significantly reduce weight and improve accuracy. The "Alpha" features a multi-point Picatinny rail and a vertical foregrip among a multitude of other internal modifications. This weapon has earned its name.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  origin: Russia
  •  manufacturer: Kalashnikov Concern
en.st_wpn_ak104_descr:
A compact version of the AK-103 rifle featuring a shortened barrel. The rifle is designed with modern and composite materials to significantly reduce weight and improve accuracy.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  origin: Russia
  •  manufacturer: Kalashnikov Concern
en.st_wpn_ak103_descr:
The AK-103 is an AK-100 derivative of the AK-74M chambered for the 7.62x39mm round. The rifle is designed with modern and composite materials to significantly reduce weight and improve accuracy.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  origin: Russia
  •  manufacturer: Kalashnikov Concern
en.st_wpn_ak102_descr:
Designed entirely for export purposes, the AK-102 is a shortened carbine version of the AK-101 rifle, combining the logistical compatibility and familiarity of the 5.56x45mm NATO round with the reliability of a Kalashnikov. The design of this rifle is similar to the AK-74 and is designed with modern and composite materials, including plastics that reduce weight and improve accuracy.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  origin: Russia
  •  manufacturer: Kalashnikov Concern
en.st_up_arty_1_descr: Installation of an armor attachment module.
en.st_wpn_aek971_descr:
Developed to participate in a competition announced by the USSR's Ministry of Defense, the internal design and layout is based on previous AK rifles and is equipped with a recoil-balancing mechanism, resulting in more controllable automatic fire. Small batches of this rifle were manufactured for the Russian MVD.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  origin: Soviet Union
  •  manufacturer: Degtyarev Plant
en.st_wpn_ace52_descr:
Built to meet the needs of the modern battlefield, the ACE-52 is a convenient choice for armies and agents seeking an advanced rifle. Heralded as the ultimate assault weapon, it has been battle-proven under the most adverse and extreme conditions. Although based upon the IMI Galils of old, advanced design and performance mechanisms have transformed the ACE-52 into a more reliable and highly accurate weapon for combat warfare.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  origin: Israel
  •  manufacturer: Israel Weapon Industries
en.st_stim_scientic_descr:
Created by the same defence research institute in Kiev which developed the well-known SEVA suit, this state-of-the-art solution constitutes the most potent health stabiliser available in the Zone. Best quality ingredients and perfected formula enable almost instant recuperation and ensure prompt radiation cleansing. Side effects are minimised. Extremely high cost practically limits the target group of the drug to most skilful and successful stalkers.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  • first aid H••••••••• T••••••••• A•••• L••••
  • post-heals H•••• T•••• A• L•
en.st_wpn_ace21_descr:
The Galil "ACE" series is based upon the original design of the IMI Galil, but with a modern design increasing accuracy and lowering weight while maintaining ergonomics, ease of maintenance and reliability under battle conditions. It has since been adopted as a standard service rifle in multiple countries, such as the Chilean Army and People's Army of Vietnam.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  origin: Israel
  •  manufacturer: Israel Weapon Industries
en.st_wpn_abakan_descr:
Designed as a potential replacement to the AK-74 series of rifles, it failed to fill its intended role due to its complex design and price. Still in use as a limited special purpose weapon, the AN-94 offers a unique two-shot burst function at a stated 1800 rounds per minute with the unique feature of delaying recoil for the first two rounds. Capable of a hyperburst fire mode.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  origin: Russia
  •  manufacturer: Izhmash
en.st_grenade_thermite_descr:
A grenade filled with 600 to 800 grams of thermite that produces intense heat by means of chemical reaction in which powdered aluminum and iron oxide react to produce a stream of molten iron and aluminum oxide.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  explosive
  •  origin: Russia
en.st_up_usmp_c1_descr: The arming component considerably reduces the amount of pressure required on the trigger, improving accuracy.
en.ammo-12x76-bull_descr:
12 gauge custom-made slugs for putting down dinosaurs and mutants. Slug inside is made of lead covered in copper that has steel, dart-like insert inside. Slug is very long and has got big powder load. It really can break your hands with recoil.
 
 -  Armor penetration power (AP): BR2 
 -  Nominal stopping power (DMG): very high
en.st_addon_scope_razorhd_descr:
The Vortex Razor II HD-E 1-6x24 is a high-performance LPVO built for speed and precision. Its 1-6x magnification allows rapid engagement from close quarters to mid-range targets. The second focal plane reticle keeps holdovers consistent, and the illuminated reticle ensures fast target acquisition. Rugged and reliable, it excels in dynamic combat scenarios.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  Origin: United States
  •  Manufacturer: Vortex
  •  Magnification: 1–6x
en.st_af_sandstone_descr:
Formed in anomalies of extreme temperatures. Contains trace amounts of gold.
 
 PROPERTIES:
en.st_up_pris_b1_descr: An adjustable stock with a cheek pad is useful for firing from both convenient and inconvenient positions.
en.st_grenade_launcher_scar_descr:
A modular 40mm grenade launcher developed by FN Herstal, capable of mounting on various rifles or operating as a standalone weapon. It provides infantry with enhanced firepower, supporting both high-explosive and less-lethal munitions.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  Origin: Belgium
 
 COMPATIBILITY:
  •  FN SCAR-H
en.st_grenade_launcher_monolit_descr:
A compact, Russian-made 30mm under-barrel grenade launcher, designed for use on assault rifles to provide additional firepower against fortified positions. It offers a lightweight and reliable solution for engaging enemy personnel and light vehicles.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  Origin: Russia
 
 COMPATIBILITY:
  •  AK-12 "Monolith's Light"
en.st_grenade_launcher_l85_descr:
A versatile single-shot 40mm grenade launcher used by modern military forces, featuring a side-loading design for faster reloading. It can be mounted on rifles or used as a standalone weapon with an adjustable stock and grip.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  Origin: Germany
 
 COMPATIBILITY:
  •  L85A2
en.st_grenade_launcher_descr:
The Kostyor is a single shot, front loaded, rifled under-barrel grenade launcher for assault rifles made in Warsaw Pact countries. Designed to greatly expand fire-power of a basic infantry squad. The firing mechanism is self-cocking, with a manual safety catch and automatic shot prevention if incorrectly installed onto a rifle.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  origin: Soviet Union
  •  manufacturer: Kalashnikov Concern
en.st_grenade_launcher_m203_descr:
A modified, shorter M203 that can be attached by means of a Picatinny rail. Although modern, it has similar properties as its Soviet counterpart, the GP-25.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  origin: United States
  •  manufacturer: Colt Defense
en.st_addon_sil_vihr_descr:
A custom suppressor built for the SR-3M compact assault rifle, designed to enhance stealth in close-quarters combat. It seamlessly integrates with the weapon, ensuring effective noise suppression without compromising maneuverability.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  Origin: United States
 COMPATIBILITY:
  •  9x39mm
en.st_addon_sil_veresk_descr:
A compact suppressor tailored for the SR-2 Veresk submachine gun, enhancing stealth while preserving ballistic performance.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  Origin: Russia
 
 COMPATIBILITY:
  •  SR-2M Veresk
en.st_wpn_ak74u_n1_descr:
The AKS-74U bridges the tactical deployment gap between a submachine gun and an assault rifle and was intended as a compact but relatively powerful automatic alternative to the AKS-74. It is significantly lighter and more maneuverable in tight quarters while still boasting the reliability of a Kalashnikov.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  origin: Russia
  •  manufacturer: Kalashnikov Concern
en.st_addon_sil_tgp-a_descr:
A Russian suppressor designed for various rifle platforms, known for its excellent noise reduction and battlefield reliability.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  Origin: Russia
 
 COMPATIBILITY:
  •  5.45mm
en.st_up_ret_a3_descr: Installation of an additional spring with a reverse coil to reduce recoil without sacrificing flatness.
en.st_addon_sil_surfire_descr:
A high-performance suppressor built for extreme durability and superior sound suppression, designed for military and law enforcement applications.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  Origin: United States
 
 COMPATIBILITY:
  •  M4A1 "Protector"
en.st_addon_sil_daniel_descr:
A durable and lightweight quick-detach suppressor featuring 3D-printed construction for enhanced strength and performance.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  Origin: United States
 
 COMPATIBILITY:
  •  Remington M700
en.st_addon_sil_sr25_descr:
A precision-engineered suppressor built for the SR-25 marksman rifle, designed to maintain accuracy while significantly reducing sound signature. Its advanced baffle system helps minimize recoil and muzzle flash, making it ideal for long-range engagements.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  Origin: United States
 COMPATIBILITY:
  •  7.62mm
en.ammo_23x75_shrapnel_descr:
Cartridge with buckshot charge. Application range up to 25 meters. It is used for firing from the KS-23 carbine. Due to the fact that the barrel has rifling in the KS-23 carbine, the buckshot flies over a large area, which allows you to shoot offhand, practically without aiming.
 
 -  Armor penetration power: BR3 (6 x 6) 
 -  Flesh damage power: 285 (47.5 x 6)
en.st_addon_sil_sr1m_descr:
A Russian suppressor designed for the SR1M Gyurza pistol, reducing its sound signature for special operations and covert missions.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  Origin: Russia
 
 COMPATIBILITY:
  •  Serdyukov SR1M Gyurza
en.st_up_auts_b1_descr: Often used in Western weaponry, a roller locking system reduces recoil and improves groupings.
en.st_addon_scope_gurza_up_descr:
A comprehensive upgrade package that includes grips, rails, stocks, and other enhancements to improve weapon ergonomics, control, and overall combat effectiveness.
 
 KIT INCLUDES:
  •  Trijicon RMR
  •  Quad Rail Mount
  •  LAM
 
 COMPATIBILITY:
  •  SR1M Gyurza
en.st_addon_sil_pmm_descr:
A Russian-made suppressor designed for pistols and submachine guns, balancing sound suppression with compact size and durability.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  Origin: Russia
 
 COMPATIBILITY:
  •  9mm
en.st_wpn_fal_aus_descr:
A assault-carbine variant of the paratrooper model FAL able to use any metric-measurement FAL magazines. Notable changes are the 21 inch barrel, Austrian foregrip and Nylon furniture. While civilians are limited to semi-automatic, military and law enforcement variants are equipped with a full-auto option.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  origin: United States
  •  manufacturer: David Selvaggio Arms
en.st_wpn_ithacam37_descr:
One of most recognized pump-action shotguns of the United States owning the longest production run for a pump-action shotgun in history, the Ithaca M37 was designed for police, military and general civilian use. It utilizes a novel combination ejection and loading port on the bottom of the weapon, leaving the sides closed to the elements. Sporting a shortened barrel and pistol grip, the "Riot" model is widely considered the standard issue M37.
 
 CHARACTERISTICS:
  •  Origin: United States
  •  Manufacturer: Ithaca Gun Company
en.st_addon_sil_pbs4_descr:
A refined variant of the PBS series, designed for use with AK-74 rifles, offering improved sound suppression and durability.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  Origin: Russia
 
 COMPATIBILITY:
  •  5.45mm
en.st_tea_descr:
Beard's popular hot tea made from a mixture of sugar, edible dried mushrooms and boiled water that is said to be radiation-free. Stalkers who can afford to buy the drink often take it for long trips in the Zone. It's a good and healthy way to stay on your toes when you're getting tired or out exploring on cold nights.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  Drink
  •  Alcohol Sobering Effect
en.st_addon_sil_pbs1_descr:
A Soviet-era suppressor developed for AK-pattern rifles chambered in 7.62x39mm, known for its reliability and effectiveness in stealth operations.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  Origin: Russia
 
 COMPATIBILITY:
  •  7.62mm
en.st_addon_sil_osp9_descr:
A distinctive, polygonal-shaped suppressor by SilencerCo, providing excellent sound reduction for 9mm pistols while maintaining a low-profile design.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  Origin: United States
 
 COMPATIBILITY:
  •  9mm
en.st_addon_sil_nato_descr:
A standardized suppressor used by NATO forces, designed for compatibility with a range of military firearms and optimized for durability and performance.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  Origin: Belgium
 
 COMPATIBILITY:
  •  .45, 5.56mm, 7.62mm
en.ammo-vog-25_descr:
Regular fragmentation grenade for the GP-25 Kostyor underbarrel grenade launcher. This round has a 2.5 metre kill zone. The VOG-25 grenade is also used in the OC-14 Groza complex and RG6 / 6G30 revolver-type grenade launcher.
 
 -  Blast power: medium
 -  Blast radius: 3.6 m
 -  Fragments' radius: 20 m
 -  Av. number of fragments: 81 (small shrapnels)
 -  Explosion delay: none (explodes on impact)
en.st_wpn_udp9_descr:
A tactical, 9mm platform designed for versatility and high performance in urban and open-zone environments. With its AR-style frame and simple controls, it offers a blend of precision and rapid-fire capability. Its modular design allows for easy customization, while its compact size makes it ideal for close-quarter skirmishes or as a backup weapon in intense firefights. Equipped with a reliable recoil system and accuracy at range, the UDP-9 is a solid choice for any seeking a balance of firepower and maneuverability.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  Origin: United States
  •  Manufacturer: Angstadt Arms
en.st_addon_sil_m42k_descr:
A quick-detach suppressor optimized for 5.56mm rifles, offering excellent noise reduction and minimal impact on accuracy.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  Origin: United States
 
 COMPATIBILITY:
  •  M4A1 RAS, L85A2
en.st_addon_scope_pn23_descr:
A variable night vision optic that doubles as a clip-on NV module for select sniper scopes. Lightweight but sturdy, it provides day/night flexibility: low-power settings for close work and a higher zoom for longer distances.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  Origin: Russia
  •  Manufacturer: NPZ
  •  Magnification: 1–6x
  •  Night Vision Toggle: press Mark Switch key
en.st_addon_sil_kzrzp_descr:
A Russian-designed suppressor optimized for reducing acoustic signature while maintaining accuracy and reliability in combat environments.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  Origin: Russia
 
 COMPATIBILITY:
  •  7.62mm
en.st_addon_scope_1p78gs_descr:
A post-Soviet 2.8x combat sight developed in the 1990s by NPZ as a low-power replacement for older Soviet optics. It pairs a wide field of view with a tritium-illuminated chevron reticle calibrated for common AK rounds, favoring rapid target acquisition and practical accuracy at typical infantry distances. Lightweight and durable, the Kashtan is fitted to service rifles and squad weapons where fast, dependable aiming matters.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  Origin: Russia
  •  Manufacturer: NPZ
  •  Magnification: 2.8x
en.st_up_opt_c3_descr: This modification allows the sight to be easily adjusted to the firing distance.
en.st_addon_sil_kac4_descr:
A Knight’s Armament suppressor designed for quick attachment to 5.56mm rifles, widely used by military forces for its reliability and performance.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  Origin: Japan
 
 COMPATIBILITY:
  • Howa Type 20
en.ammo-5.7x28-ss190_descr:
The FN 5.7x28mm is a high velocity cartridge designed and manufactured by FN Herstal. It is a bottlenecked centrefire cartridge that is somewhat similar to the .22 Hornet or .22 K-Hornet. The 5.7x28mm was developed in conjunction with the FN P90 personal defense weapon (PDW) and FN Five-seven pistol, in response to NATO requests for a replacement for the 9x19mm Parabellum cartridge.
 
 -  Armor penetration power (AP): BR4 (40) 
 -  Nominal stopping power (DMG): 23
en.st_wpn_toz34_mark4_23_descr:
Intended for professional and amateur hunting, the TOZ-34 is an over/under double-barreled shotgun that acquired the state quality mark of the USSR. It is heavy, dependable and packs a punch. This peculiar TOZ-34 was modified to support larger rounds and features a red dot sight.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  origin: USSR
  •  manufacturer: Tulsky Oruzheiny Zavod
en.st_addon_sil_gemtech_descr:
A well-known suppressor brand offering lightweight and efficient designs for various calibers, widely used in military, law enforcement, and civilian applications.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  Origin: United States
 
 COMPATIBILITY:
  •  9mm, .45
en.st_addon_sil_geks545_descr:
A multi-caliber suppressor known for its advanced baffle design and exceptional noise reduction capabilities.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  Origin: United States
 
 COMPATIBILITY:
  •  5.45mm, 7.62mm
en.st_af_elektron_descr:
A room-temperature superconductor generated in electrical anomalies. When worn, an Electron will reroute excess electrical energy into nearby batteries, capacitors, and the like. It also allows this energy to be used physically by its user.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  Perk Artefact
en.st_addon_sil_forester_descr:
A suppressor engineered for the Mauser 98k bolt-action rifle, enhancing stealth capabilities for precision shooting.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  Origin: Russia
 
 COMPATIBILITY:
  •  Mauser 98k Forester
en.st_addon_scope_march_f_shorty_descr:
A compact Japanese low-power variable optic with a dual-focal-plane reticle, letting shooters maintain accurate holdovers across all zoom levels. It's the world's lightest and shortest scope with a 10x magnification.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  Origin: Japan
  •  Manufacturer: DEON Optical Design
  •  Magnification: 1–10x
  •  Reticle illumination: press Mark Switch key
en.st_addon_sil_auga_descr:
A suppressor designed for the Steyr UMS, improving sound suppression while maintaining firearm balance and handling.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  Origin: Austria
 
 COMPATIBILITY:
  •  Steyr AUG
en.st_addon_sil_atg_descr:
A high-performance suppressor engineered for tactical applications, offering exceptional sound suppression and durability.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  Origin: Russia
 
 COMPATIBILITY:
  •  5.56mm, 7.62mm
en.st_addon_sil_aps_descr:
A suppressor specifically designed for the APS underwater pistol, allowing it to operate with reduced noise both above and below the surface. Its unique engineering makes it a rare but valuable tool for special operations forces operating in aquatic environments.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  Origin: Russia
 COMPATIBILITY:
  •  9mm
en.st_up_tele_1_descr: A closed band that has been demonstrated to provide partial protection against direct psy-emissions.
en.st_mine_descr:
