A small, air-dispersed mine designed to incapacitate enemy personnel by detonating under pressure (or proximity). Its lightweight design allows for wide-area deployment, making it a persistent hazard in conflict zones.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  Explosive
  •  Origin: Russia
  •  Triggering Mechanism: Proximity
en.ammo_23x75_barrikada_descr:
A cartridge with a steel pointed bullet. It is used to forcibly stop vehicles by damaging them. Application range up to 100 meters. It is used for firing from the KS-23 carbine.
 
 -  Armor penetration power: BR5 (51) 
 -  Flesh damage power: 133
en.st_addon_sil_apb_descr:
A suppressor specifically made for underwater APS rifles, designed to reduce noise and muzzle blast in aquatic environments.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  Origin: Russia
 
 COMPATIBILITY:
  •  APS Stechkin
en.st_addon_sil_9mm_descr:
A versatile and commonly used suppressor for 9mm firearms, providing effective noise and recoil reduction for pistols and submachine guns.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  Origin: Varies
 
 COMPATIBILITY:
  •  9mm
en.st_addon_sil_9a91_descr:
A specialized suppressor built for the 9A-91 compact assault rifle and the VSK-94 sniper variant, ensuring reduced noise and muzzle flash. It enhances stealth capabilities without significantly impacting weapon performance, making it ideal for urban and reconnaissance missions.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  Origin: Russia
 COMPATIBILITY:
  •  9x39mm
en.st_addon_sil_6p9_descr:
A dedicated suppressor for the Soviet 6P9 silenced pistol, designed to significantly dampen sound for covert operations. Its robust construction allows it to handle multiple shots with minimal sound leakage, making it highly effective for stealth engagements.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  Origin: Russia
 COMPATIBILITY:
  •  9mm
en.st_addon_sil_57_descr:
A compact suppressor designed specifically for 5.7x28mm firearms, reducing muzzle flash and sound signature while maintaining ballistic efficiency.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  Origin: Belgium
 
 COMPATIBILITY:
  •  5.7mm
en.st_up_binoc_b2_gamma_descr: An improvement to the night vision technology, introducing a better system light gain, system resolution and photo-sensitivity to increase visual quality.
en.st_addon_scope_galil_descr:
A fixed-power optical sight designed for use on Galil rifles, featuring a tritium-illuminated reticle for improved visibility in low-light conditions. Its prismatic design provides excellent clarity and rugged durability, making it a dependable choice for medium-range combat and precision shooting.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  Origin: Isreal
  •  Manufacturer: Israel Military Industries
  •  Magnification: 4.0x
en.st_addon_scope_pu_descr:
A compact and rugged scope originally designed for Soviet sniper rifles, offering fixed magnification and a simple yet effective reticle for long-range targeting. Known for its durability and ease of use, it remains a popular choice for marksmen using older rifles in the Zone.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  Origin: Russia
  •  Manufacturer: Soviet Union
  •  Magnification: 3.5x
en.st_addon_scope_po4x34_descr:
Fixed-power telescopic sight produced for Russian bullpup and specialized rifles (notably the OTs-14 "Groza"). Often fitted to the Groza with a purpose-made bracket, genuine examples were manufactured by the Zagorsk Optical-Mechanical Plant (ZOMZ) in the 1990s and show up in collector/sales listings as a period Russian optic.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  Origin: Russia
  •  Manufacturer: ZOMZ
  •  Magnification: 4x
en.st_addon_scope_sup_new_descr: KIT INCLUDES:\n  • Various tools, parts and attachments for upgrading a selection of guns.\n
en.st_addon_scope_spec_alt_descr: A compact kit pairing the dual-role ELCAN SpecterDR with a canted red-dot for immediate reflex shots and quick switching to a magnified view for accurate follow-ups.\n \n
en.st_meat_lurker_descr:
Tough slabs of mutant Lurker meat, slow cooked to tenderize the dense flesh, and seasoned with salt and various herbs. With the right marinade, it’s surprisingly flavorful, though most stalkers consider it an acquired taste at best.
 
 NOTE: The quality and healthiness of a meal is determined by how it is prepared.
  •  Zone-produced meals, while less contaminated, are still unhealthy.
  •  Stewed meals require the addition of clean water and are significantly less contaminated.
  •  Purified meals required the addition of vodka and are not only radiation-free but provide revitalizing effects.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  High-tier Cooked Meal
en.st_addon_scope_specter_hco_descr:
Holographic Combat Optic — prototype sight from ELCAN, using a laser-projected reticle similar to EOTech sights but housed in a solid, fully sealed aluminum body for durability. Offers a large viewing window with a circle-dot reticle, featuring three short subtension lines inside the 72 MOA circle and a 1 MOA center dot. It was designed for rugged, combat-ready use, though it remains a prototype and never saw mass production.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  Origin: Canada
  •  Manufacturer: ELCAN
  •  Magnification: 1x
en.st_addon_scope_skeet_descr:
Compact clip-on thermal monocular that converts day sniper scopes into a thermal sight; designed to mount in front of an existing optic. Features a true 1x base view with digital zoom options and a 640-resolution thermal sensor — optimized for target detection and acquisition rather than fine optical detail.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  Origin: United States
  •  Manufacturer: Trijicon
  •  Magnification: 1x
en.st_addon_scope_shakal_descr:
A comprehensive upgrade package that includes grips, rails, stocks, and other enhancements to improve weapon ergonomics, control, and overall combat effectiveness.
 
 KIT INCLUDES:
  •  Extended Forend
  •  Ergonomic Stock & Pistol Grip
  •  Trijicon ACOG Sight
  •  Trijicon RMR Sight
  •  AN/PEQ-15 LAM Laser Module
  •  45 Round Magazine Set
 
 COMPATIBILITY:
  •  AK-105
en.st_addon_scope_romeo4_descr:
Compact 1x red-dot sight in a sealed tube housing, built to military durability standards. What sets it apart from more basic red-dots are its selectable reticle patterns (dot, circle, or combined) and NVG-compatible brightness settings, making it versatile for both day and night use.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  Origin: United States
  •  Manufacturer: Sig Sauer
  •  Magnification: 1x
  •  Reticle switch: press Mark Switch key
en.st_addon_scope_rakurs_descr:
A durable and battery-free Russian prismatic sight with an etched reticle that remains visible in all lighting conditions. It provides a wide field of view and is designed for rapid target acquisition.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  Origin: Russia
  •  Manufacturer: NPZ Factory
  •  Magnification: 1.0x
en.st_bolt_carrier_3: Sliding Bolt Carrier with Turning Bolt Lock [NATO] (Carrier)
en.st_addon_scope_pk6_descr:
Compact open-reflex sight produced by BelOMO. The PK-06 is a 1x red-dot style optic with automatic brightness adjustment, selectable reticle patterns, and an improved drainage/sealing design compared with earlier PK-05 variants — built for simple, rugged use on Picatinny/Weaver rails. Widely offered by Eastern European suppliers and discussed in optics reviews, it serves as a lightweight, budget-minded combat/sport reflex sight.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  Origin: Belarus
  •  Manufacturer: BelOMO
  •  Magnification: 1x
  •  Reticle switch: press Mark Switch key
en.st_up_opt_a4_descr: Modification of optical scope for long range combat.
en.st_water_drink_descr:
Carbonated water stored in a bottle, providing a fizzy alternative to still water. A rare treat in the Zone, offering a momentary escape from the bleakness of daily survival.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  Drink
  •  Alcohol Sobering Effect
en.lttz_ll_wpn_gauss_quest_descr:
A highly experimental, extremely accurate, artefact-powered weapon made in the Zone. Instead of gunpowder, the gauss rifle utilizes electromagnetic forces to launch projectiles at incredible speeds similar to a railgun. Proportionate to its tremendous firepower, the recoil is surprisingly controllable. Among other weapons of its class, its accuracy and firepower is unmatched.
 
 CHARACTERISTICS:
  •  Origin: Russia
  •  Manufacturer: Redacted
en.st_addon_sil_aac762_descr:
A versatile quick-detach suppressor by Advanced Armament Corporation, optimized for 7.62mm rifles with minimal impact on accuracy.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  Origin: United States
 
 COMPATIBILITY:
  •  7.62mm
en.st_af_ear_descr:
Artefact with a bizarre shape. Within its core, a small structure shaped like a human body is visible. It grants the user an indomitable will to live, allowing survival and recovery from otherwise fatal injuries or blood loss.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  Perk Artefact
en.st_wpn_glock_modern_descr:
Reliability, durability and simplicity have made the Glock 19 one of the most widely used sidearms in law enforcement. Due to its reduced dimensions when compared to the Glock 17, it is ideal for use as a backup weapon or for concealed carry purposes. The "Hornet" is equipped with a 40-round extended magazine and fully automatic fire for an unprecedented amount of firepower in a small package.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  origin: Austria
  •  manufacturer: Glock Ges.m.b.H.
en.st_addon_scope_eotech_descr:
A holographic weapon sight designed for military and law enforcement, offering rapid target acquisition with a wide field of view. It features night vision compatibility and a durable waterproof construction.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  Origin: United States
  •  Manufacturer: EOTech
  •  Magnification: 1.0x
en.st_prt_o_ballistic_17: Polyethylene Fiber Layers w/ Polycarbonate Inserts
en.st_gamma_recipe_expert_4: The Art of Artefacts Fusion Vol. 3
en.st_prt_o_ballistic_1: Kevlar K129 Plates w/ Reinforced Ceramic Inserts
en.st_up_helm_rad_1_descr: Active filters can resist radioactive particles.
en.st_addon_scope_aimpoint_descr:
A high-quality, parallax-free red dot sight known for its long battery life and rugged construction. It provides quick target acquisition and is widely used by military and law enforcement units.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  Origin: United States
  •  Manufacturer: Aimpoint
  •  Magnification: 1.0x
en.st_stim_impro_descr:
Improvised stimpacks are popular among novice Zoners as they are easy to obtain and inexpensive. Produced in the Zone from commonly available ingredients, without proper equipment and purification. This is the cause of many side effects which include headache, paraesthesia and considerable increase in nutrition demand. Injected in the thigh.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  • first aid H••••• T••••• A••• L•••
en.st_addon_scope_aim_acro_descr:
Advanced Compact Reflex Optic — compact enclosed-emitter sight engineered for pistols and PDWs; the sealed optical channel protects the emitter and electronics from debris and slide impact. It uses a 3.5-MOA dot, offers multiple brightness levels including NVG-compatible settings, and is built to withstand heavy recoil and harsh environments.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  Origin: Sweden
  •  Manufacturer: Aimpoint
  •  Magnification: 1x
en.st_addon_scope_ac10632_descr:
A versatile electronic reflex sight designed for rapid target acquisition in close-quarters and mid-range combat. It offers a clear, illuminated reticle for improved aiming speed and accuracy.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  Origin: United States
  •  Manufacturer: Barska
  •  Magnification: 1.0x
en.st_addon_scope_23_up_descr:
A long, heavy-duty barrel designed for the KS-23 shotgun, improving accuracy and range while maintaining the weapon's hard-hitting power. Its robust construction enhances performance for both law enforcement and military applications.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  Origin: Russia
 
 COMPATIBILITY:
  •  KS-23
en.st_up_roun_a2_descr: Addition of diagonal cam slots onto the drum, which speed up rotation of the mechanism which uses gas energy.
en.st_addon_scope_cmore_descr:
The C-MORE Railway Red Dot Sight is a versatile, open-reflex optic designed for rapid target acquisition across various platforms. It offers an unlimited field of view, eliminating the tunnel vision common in tube-style optics. The sight mounts directly to Weaver or Picatinny rails, making it compatible with shotguns, rifles, handguns, and more. Its detachable rail base allows for easy installation and removal, enhancing its adaptability for different shooting scenarios.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  Origin: United States
  •  Manufacturer: C-MORE Systems
  •  Magnification: 1x
en.st_cigarettes_descr:
Marlboro cigarettes, with their distinctive red and white packaging, are a symbol of Western smoking culture. Their smooth blend provides a familiar respite for those traversing the Zone's hardships.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  Stimulant
  •  Alcohol Sobering Effect
en.st_ration_ukr_descr:
This ration pack provides Ukrainian troops with a balanced diet, featuring items like buckwheat porridge with chicken, biscuits, and jams. Its design emphasizes practicality and sustenance, catering to the demands of extended missions in the Zone.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  Food
en.st_gamma_recipe_basic_3: Fundamentals of Guns and Armors Upgrades Vol. 1
en.st_addon_scope_u2p2g0r_descr:
A comprehensive upgrade package that includes grips, rails, stocks, and other enhancements to improve weapon ergonomics, control, and overall combat effectiveness.
 
 KIT INCLUDES:
  •  Threaded Barrel (for Suppressor)
  •  Tritium Sights
  •  Viridian X5L Laser Module
  •  19 Round Magazine
 
 COMPATIBILITY:
  •  Sig Sauer P220
en.st_up_stvd_b5_descr: A special coating protects the weapon from the elements.
en.st_drug_booster_descr:
The main component of this product is an anabolic androgen, an artificial steroid, the chemical composition of which resembles testosterone. Often used by stalkers during long raids to reduce muscle fatigue. Significantly increases weight-carrying capacity. The effects of the drug are long-lasting.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  • mild dizziness removal
en.st_addon_scope_razor_mag_descr:
A fast 1x sight paired with a 6x flip-to-side magnifier, this kit gives immediate reflex aiming with a quick-on zoom for mid-range identification and follow-ups. Compact and modular, it keeps the primary sight usable when the magnifier is stowed and lets shooters extend engagement reach without swapping optics.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  Origin: United States
  •  Manufacturer: Vortex & EOTech
  •  Magnification: 1x / 6x
  •  Magnifier flip: set in MCM — Magnifier Switch
en.st_nuts_descr:
Assorted peanuts, hazelnuts, cashews and almonds. Offers a dense source of calories and healthy fats. Perfect for snacking on the move, they help maintain energy levels.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  Food
en.st_wpn_rpk_descr:
A light machine gun developed by Mikhail Kalashnikov as part of Soviet efforts to standardize the armory of the Red Army, the RPK replaced the RPD and is still in use as of present day. Featuring a similar design layout to the Kalashnikov series of rifles, it boasts modifications to increase its effective range and accuracy. It is also equipped with an improved barrel to improve sustained fire capability; a common issue with the RPD.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  origin: Soviet Union
  •  manufacturer: Vyatskiye Polyany Machine-Building Plant
en.ammo-7.92x33_fmj_descr:
The 7.92x57 Mauser round was adopted by the German Empire and then the Third Reich. It was one of the most popular cartridges in the period of two world wars. However, nowadays, the round is primarily used for hunting and sports.
 
 -  Armor penetration power (AP): BR3 (27) 
 -  Nominal stopping power (DMG): 69
en.st_af_bracelet_descr:
Bracelet is formed from common species of bryophytes plants under high exposure to radioactive and chemical anomalies, which explains its organic nature. 
It provides substantial protection against all types of acids by gradually increasing their pH to the level of water (pH of 7). 
When worn, the artefact is also known to slightly counter the harmful effects of psy-anomalies or psy-waves of some mutants. 

 Does NOT degrade over time.
en.st_up_damage_1_descr: Thinner sheets of armor are layered to increase wear-resistance.
en.st_gamma_recipe_advanced_3: Fundamentals of Guns and Armors Upgrades Vol. 2
en.st_up_m1a1_b6_descr: Installation of polymer handguard for weight reduction.
en.st_addon_sil_spec_isg_descr:
A suppressor designed by Rifle Dynamics for AK platforms, balancing durability with effective noise suppression.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  Origin: United States
 
 COMPATIBILITY:
  •  ISG Fire Arms: 5.45mm, 7.62mm
en.st_up_1921_b7_descr: Installation of anti-corrosive components to decrease weapon degradation.
en.ammo-9x19-fmj_descr:
This basic 9x19 calibre round with a jacketed bullet has good characteristics while being simple to produce. The round is popular due to the fact that international conventions prohibit the use of expanding ammunition in combat. Ineffective against body armour.
 
 -  Armor penetration power (AP): BR1 (17) 
 -  Nominal stopping power (DMG): 21
en.st_up_durability_2_descr: Used in suits to improve outfit durability.
en.st_up_ret_a2_descr: Installation of thickeners onto mobile parts of the mechanism ensure that the barrel deviates from the target less during firing.
en.st_up_stvd_b4_descr: A more modern and comfortable stock simplifies weapon handling.
en.st_af_ah_h1_descr:
A lump of shriveled clay and organic debris. Separation of individual lumps of material seems impossible, due to the presence of some unknown and incredibly strong binding agent. The gravitational properties of the artefact seem to have effects similar to that of hemophilia.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  Artefact
en.st_up_stvs_a1_descr: Intended for weapons that are used often, the jacket protects them from early wear.
en.st_up_stvh_c1_descr: Replacement of the barrel with a more modern version allows for a considerable increase in accuracy.
en.st_up_stvh_b2_descr: A technological improvement, finning requires extreme precision to prevent the formation of overheating points on the barrel.
en.st_up_bard_b5_descr: Replacement of a regular barrel with a longer one improves flatness.
en.st_up_stvd_a2_descr: Lighter version of the standard stock.
en.st_af_medusa_descr:
Very common in the Zone. This gravitational artefact is able to slightly shield the body and objects from physical impacts. 
It will slightly protect its user against extreme heat produced respectively by fire anomalies. 
This artefact is quite heavy as the gravitational field seems to increase mass. Another downside to this artefact is that it will increase the negative effects of psy-waves and is a potent conductor. 

 Does NOT degrade over time.
en.st_drug_psy_blockade_descr:
A drug that blocks avalanche-like nerve impulses. Consumption induces short-term loss of all emotion. Used exclusively in the Zone to counteract the effects of anomalous psy-fields. The effects of the drug are long-lasting. Take two tablets at a time.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  • improves morale and mind protection against horrors of the Zone
  • causes extreme dizziness
en.st_up_weight_4_descr: Replace fabric, clips and thickeners with lighter synthetic materials to reduce weight.
en.ammo-5.7x28-ss195_descr:
The SS195 FN 5.7x28mm is an expansive cartridge designed and manufactured by FN Herstal. It is a bottlenecked centrefire cartridge that is somewhat similar to the .22 Hornet or .22 K-Hornet. 
 
 -  Armor penetration power (AP): BR2 (25) 
 -  Nominal stopping power (DMG): 23
en.st_up_bar_a1_descr: Replacement of a regular barrel with a longer one improves accuracy and flatness.
en.st_up_bard_c1_descr: The barrel balancing system includes several mobile pistons that make a weapon more stable when held.
en.st_af_gold_fish_descr:
Direct successor to and a superior version of Gravi artefact. As was the case with Gravi, it was scientist Sakharov at Yantar who discovered its unique properties after a massive blowout/emission hit the Zone. 
Thanks to meticulous research that followed, it was established that this new artefact is produced when three Gravi artefacts interact and get sucked into one another's singularity fields. This phenomenon is extremely rare, due to which the artefact is highly valued. 
It is rumoured within Ukrainian Spetsnaz circles that in the Zone there are agents from the Ministry of Defence of the Russian Federation whose sole objective is acquiring and transporting Goldfish to specialised laboratories located outside of the Zone. 
The artefact creates a constant anti-gravitational singularity field which affects only its closest vicinity. However, some stalkers have been known to disappear for no apparent reason leaving only a Goldfish behind. 
Big downside, however, comes along with this powerful anti-gravitational field: the velocity of moving objects inside its radius will rapidly increase, causing dangerous impacts on surrounding objects, including the holder. 

 Does NOT degrade over time.
en.ammo-5.45x39-ep_descr:
Military 5.45x39 calibre HP is an hollow point round for automatic rifles of Warsaw Pact countries.
 
 -  Armor penetration power (AP): None (10) 
 -  Nominal stopping power (DMG): 58
en.st_up_prih_a1_descr: A larger rest allows for accurate fire.
en.st_morphine_descr:
An iron ampoule designed as field equipment for military field personnel for instant pain reduction. This ampoule contains a powerful dose of morphine. In clinical medicine, morphine is regarded as the gold standard of opioid analgesics used to relieve severe or agonizing pain and suffering. Like other opioids, such as oxycodone, hydromorphone, and diacetylmorphine (heroin), morphine acts directly on the central nervous system (CNS) to relieve pain. Injected into an arm or a thigh.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  • extremely large damage resistance bonus (15%)
  • causes slight dizziness
  • first aid H•••••••• T••••• A•••• L••••
en.st_up_stvd_c2_descr: A free-moving impulse counter-weight component, which moves from the bolt when the weapon is fired and absorbs some of the recoil.
en.st_wpn_mp153_bas_descr:
The first semi-automatic shotgun designed and manufactured by the Izhevsk Mechanical Plant, the MP-153 is one of the most popular semi-automatic shotguns of Russian origin and is widely used for various game hunting. Developed alongside the pump action MP-133 shotgun, it shares many of its parts and is known for its reliability and solid, heavy construction.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  origin: Russia
  •  manufacturer: Izhmekh Mechanical Plant
en.mdr_descr:
The Desert Tech MDR (Micro Dynamic Rifle) in STALKER GAMMA is a versatile, bullpup-configured rifle known for its compact design and exceptional modularity. Chambered for various calibers, it excels in both close-quarters and long-range combat. Its ambidextrous controls, lightweight frame, and high accuracy make it a reliable choice for those navigating the unpredictable dangers of the Zone. This version is chambered in 5.56x45 with a tan polymer body.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  Origin: United States
  •  Manufacturer: Desert Tech LLC
en.st_up_zatp_b4_descr: Improves flatness thanks to improved transfer of impulse to the bullet.
en.st_wpn_akms_descr:
An improved version of the AK-47 rifle featuring detailed improvements and enhancements that optimized the rifle for mass production. Among these changes, the AKM's weight was reduced, the accuracy during automatic fire was increased and several reliability issues were addressed. All AKMS rifles came equipped with an under-folding metal shoulder stock in place of the fixed wooden stock.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  origin: Soviet Union
  •  manufacturer: Tula Arms Plant
en.st_wpn_saiga12s_descr:
A 12-gauge combat shotgun recognizable by its Kalashnikov design, intended for engaging targets at short range or in confined spaces. Known for its effectiveness and lethality, it has replaced the Armsel Protecta for Russian riot control and infantry combat.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  origin: Russia
  •  manufacturer: Izhmash
en.st_glucose_descr:
Glucose shots are used in cases of severe diabetic hypoglycaemia, but can also be employed as a stimulant. Instant induction of carbohydrates entails a rapid boost of energy, thus allowing the user to undertake increased physical effort and withstand stress. Due to its convenient means of administration, they can be used in combat situations. This makes glucose shot a very good way to speed-up the healing process.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  • potent dizziness removal
en.st_addon_scope_1pn93_descr:
A late Soviet-era night vision riflescope adapted and produced in the 1990s for a variety of rifles and light machine guns. It gives shooters usable target recognition and aiming capability in low-light conditions. The scope features a crisp, illuminated reticle and simple windage/elevation controls, making it practical for patrols and tactical operations. Designed to mount on standard dovetail rails, the 1PN93 balances clarity, reliability, and ease of use, providing effective performance for medium-range night engagements.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  Origin: Soviet Union/Russia
  •  Manufacturer: NPZ
  •  Magnification: 1–4x
  •  Night Vision Toggle: press Mark Switch key
en.st_up_opt_a3_descr: Mounting of POSP 8x42 W scope for long range combat.
en.st_up_usmp_b3_descr: Allows the same pressure to be applied to the trigger from the first to the last shot, which has a positive effect on ease of use.
en.st_up_zat_a3_descr: Despite the name, it is the bolt that is replaced, as it has to endure the consequences of an improved rate of fire.
en.st_up_stvp_c2_descr: The possibility of choosing a suitable plate makes for a more ergonomic handle shape.
en.st_wpn_aug_a1_custom_bas_descr:
The AUG (Armee-Universal-Gewehr) is the standard small arm of many Armed Forces and Special Units all over the world since 1977. It is famous for its modular bullpup design, making it a short, well-balanced rifle with high accuracy and reliability. The A1 variant is fitted with an integrated 1.5x scope.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  origin: Austria
  •  manufacturer: Steyr Arms
en.st_wpn_vintorez_isg_descr:
A custom model developed on the basis of the VSS Vintorez by the Las Vegas-based American company Rifle Dynamics. It is one of the most high-tech weapons in the Zone and is built with an unprecedented level of precision and care and is often used by ISG special units. It has been modified to allow two-round burst fire.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  origin: United States
  •  manufacturer: Rifle Dynamics
en.st_medkit_descr:
The AI-2 medkit was developed as a standard service first aid kit for various defence and law enforcement agencies and civil defense forces of the USSR. Handy for treating injuries, wounds, chemical and thermal burns and various types of poison.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  • first aid H••••• T••••• A•• L••
en.st_up_stk_b1_descr: Installation of jackets helps to address increases in the weapon's rate of fire, which produce additional heat that must be controlled.
en.st_up_usm_c3_descr: The impactless system pierces the round instead of striking it by means of a special hammer, which makes the firing process considerably softer.
en.st_up_binoc_d1_descr: Experimental upgrade that allows the binoculars to detect and mark living beings within their field of view.
en.st_up_zat_b4_descr: The purpose of titled grooves on the receiver is to reduce friction and catch small particles, preventing contamination of the bolt section.
en.st_energy_drink_descr:
A canned beverage featuring an enhanced formula comprised of caffeine, taurine, and vitamins C, B5, B6 and B9. It's often used by Stalkers on long trips due to its sugar and caffeine content or to help sober after one too many alcoholic beverages.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  Drink
  •  Stimulant
  •  Alcohol Sobering Effect
en.st_up_binoc_a3_descr: Installation of new lens set for great distances, which offers x20 magnification power.
en.st_af_gimlet_descr:
The bowl-shaped petals of the artefact release a powerful gaseous stimulant resulting in a positive change in human hormones. If you found this, something has gone horribly wrong.
 
 PROPERTIES:
en.st_up_autd_b2_descr: Thanks to firm positioning of the round as it is fired, the bullet continues on a straight path and hits the target.
en.st_up_stvd_b2_descr: A more modern and comfortable handle simplifies weapon handling.
en.st_up_carry_2_descr: Relieves focused shoulder load from carried weight by distributing it across the body.
en.st_up_bard_a1_descr: High durability materials slow down wear and tear of the weapon's barrel.
en.st_up_stk_c1_descr: A modification used exclusively for barrels with solid bullpup receivers, which simplifies maintenance of the weapon.
en.ammo-m209_descr:
40 mm grenade for the M203 underbarrel grenade launcher. This round has a 3.5 metre kill zone. Also suitable for use in the FN F2000 integrated grenade launcher.
 
 -  Blast power: medium
 -  Blast radius: 4.1 m
 -  Fragments' radius: 28 m
 -  Av. number of fragments: 95 (small shrapnels)
 -  Explosion delay: none (explodes on impact)
en.st_af_chelust_descr:
A loop of tiny, glowing disks that generate a gravitational field disproportionately larger than their actual mass, leading to the artefact being effectively quite heavy. This artefact seems to be tied to a group of cultists in the Zone known as Sin, improving their health when they equip it.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  Perk Artefact
en.st_up_add_b1_descr: A complex, integrated alteration of the weapon's mechanical and automated parts, which allows its calibre to be changed at the cost of reliability.
en.st_up_add_b4_descr: A complex, integrated alteration of the weapon's mechanical and automated parts, which allows its calibre to be changed at the cost of reliability.
en.st_up_usmp_b2_descr: Partial arming allows firing accuracy to be improved.
en.mutant_psevdodog_meat_description:
Highly nutritious meat from a mutant Pseudodog, known to me more edible than its regular canine counterparts. Note that consuming uncooked mutant meat always carries the risk of contamination or radiation exposure.
 
 WARNING: Raw Meat
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  Low-tier Mutant Meat
  •  Cookable
en.st_wpn_ak5c_bas_descr:
A version of the FN FNC assault rifle made for the Swedish Armed Forces and modified to adapt to the partially subarctic Swedish climate. The AK 5C is the modernized version of the original AK 5 with improvements including a new rail system, iron sights and bolt catch.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  origin: Sweden
  •  manufacturer: Carl Gustafs Stads Gevarsfaktori
en.st_up_m1a1_b5_descr: Installation of polymer stock for weight reduction.
en.ammo-9x19-ap_descr:
This Russian 9x19 calibre bullet comes with a hard steel core and increased pressure. Designed to enhance armour penetrating capabilities of small arms and submachine guns.
 
 -  Armor penetration power (AP): BR3 (34) 
 -  Nominal stopping power (DMG): 21
en.st_up_zatp_b1_descr: Provides an increase in flatness thanks to improved transfer of impulse to the bullet.
en.st_up_add_b2_descr: A complex, integrated alteration of the weapon's mechanical and automated parts, which allows its calibre to be changed at the cost of reliability.
en.st_af_ah_r2_descr:
An artifact containing mostly plant matter found only in the Dead Forest, south of Lab X-9. It is believed that the strong psy-fields it was subjugated to during its formation heavily influenced its shape and properties. Wearing one seems to boost vitality.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  Artefact
en.st_wpn_p90_descr:
Developed in the late 1980s as a personal defence weapon, the P90 is an unconventional submachine gun with a futuristic appearance, featuring a compact bullpup design with an integrated reflex sight, a unique top-mounted magazine and fully ambidextrous controls. Utilizing the SS90 round, the weapon was developed specifically to achieve high penetration against armored targets while keeping recoil low.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  origin: Belgium
  •  manufacturer: FN Herstal
en.st_meat_tushkano_descr:
Skewers of grilled Tushkano meat, often heavily seasoned to disguise the flavor. Cheap, common, and just filling enough to keep a hungry stalker moving.
 
 NOTE: The quality and healthiness of a meal is determined by how it is prepared.
  •  Zone-produced meals, while less contaminated, are still unhealthy.
  •  Stewed meals require the addition of clean water and are significantly less contaminated.
  •  Purified meals required the addition of vodka and are not only radiation-free but provide revitalizing effects.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  Cooked Meal
en.st_up_bar_c1_descr: Polygon rifling is usually performed to improve accuracy.
en.st_antibio_sulfad_descr:
Sulfanilamide medication, effective against gram-positive and gram-negative bacteria. It acts on pneumococci, streptococci, staphylococcus, E. coli, Klebsiella stick (Friedlander's stick), causative agents of dysentery; is less active with respect to the protein; is active against the trachoma virus (an infectious eye disease that can lead to blindness); It does not act on strains of bacteria resistant to other sulfanilamide preparations. Adverse effects include headaches, digestive disorders, skin rashes, fevers and leukopenia. The effects of the drug are long-lasting.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  • causes slight dizziness
  • post-heals  L•
en.st_addon_scope_sr2_upkit_descr:
A comprehensive upgrade package that includes grips, rails, stocks, and other enhancements to improve weapon ergonomics, control, and overall combat effectiveness.
 
 KIT INCLUDES:
  •  Tactical Forend
  •  Picatinny Rail
  •  LAM
  •  KP-SR2 Reflex Sight
 
 COMPATIBILITY:
  •  SR-2M Veresk
en.st_up_barp_b4_descr: Installation of a barrel with additional threaded canals improves bullet speed and weapon accuracy at the cost of a considerable increase in recoil.
en.st_up_ace52_b1_descr: Installation of a cheek piece for more comfortable aiming.
en.st_up_zatp_b7_descr: Installation of a steel insert helps to reduce recoil.
en.st_up_ret_a1_descr: The reinforced spring is used to increase bullet speed.
en.st_wpn_mossberg590a1_descr:
A pump-action shotgun designed for military and law enforcement use, featuring a heavy-walled barrel and enhanced durability for extreme conditions. Its ergonomic design and ability to handle various ammunition types make it a versatile and dependable choice for close-quarters combat. With a reputation for reliability and rugged construction, it remains a staple in tactical and defensive applications.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  Origin: United States
  •  Manufacturer: O.F. Mossberg & Sons
en.ammo-50-bmg_descr:
The .50 Browning Machine Gun (12.7x99mm NATO and designated as the 50 Browning by the C.I.P.) is a cartridge developed for the Browning .50 caliber machine gun in the late 1910s, entering official service in 1921. Under STANAG 4383, it is a standard cartridge for NATO forces as well as many non-NATO countries. The cartridge itself has been made in many variants: multiple generations of regular ball, tracer, armor-piercing (AP), incendiary, and saboted sub-caliber rounds. The rounds intended for machine guns are made into a continuous belt using metallic links. 
The .50 BMG cartridge is also used in long-range target and anti-materiel rifles, as well as other .50-caliber machine guns. 
 
 -  Armor penetration power (AP): BR6 
 -  Nominal stopping power (DMG): very high
en.st_up_bar_b3_descr: This barrel is intended to increase the kill zone in close quarter combat and is therefore not suitable for accurate fire. Improves the rate of fire due to the simplification of the rifled part of the barrel.
en.mutant_flesh_meat_description:
A common source of mutant protein from the slow-moving Flesh creatures, surprisingly palatable when cooked properly. Note that consuming uncooked mutant meat always carries the risk of contamination or radiation exposure.
 
 WARNING: Raw Meat
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  Low-tier Mutant Meat
  •  Cookable
en.st_glucose_s_descr:
Glucose shots are used in cases of severe diabetic hypoglycaemia, but can also be employed as a stimulant. Instant induction of carbohydrates entails a rapid boost of energy, thus allowing the user to undertake increased physical effort and withstand stress. Due to its convenient means of administration, they can be used in combat situations. This makes glucose shot a very good way to speed-up the healing process.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  • Average dizziness removal
en.st_wpn_val_descr:
Engineered for Soviet special operations units, the AS Val is a gas operated, integrally suppressed weapon that was set to supersede the AK-47 and AKM rifles. It is easily disassembled and concealed, lightweight and comfortable to fire with the suppressor reducing bullet velocity to below subsonic levels. Today, the AS VAL sees widespread use among Russian special forces.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  origin: Soviet Union
  •  manufacturer: Tula Arms Plant
en.st_af_peas_descr:
The Moon, or Pea Pod artefact, is a crescent-shaped, dimly-glowing mass. Within the rubbery outer cover, three pearlescent orbs with unique crystalline structures are visible. Users of this artefact report their circadian rhythm rapidly and completely inverting.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  Perk Artefact
en.st_up_auto_b1_descr: Installation of a special mechanism to protect the weapon from dirt.
en.st_up_zatp_c7_descr: Improvement of the pistol's automatic parts suitable for three round burst fire.
en.st_up_auto_c5_descr: A synthetic component immediately in front of the bolt movement area, which compresses it significantly to improve firing accuracy.
en.st_bolt_12: Hammers from a Hammer-type Double-barrel Shotgun [R] (Bolt)
en.st_stim_military_descr:
Military stims constitute a part of standard-issue soldier equipment for field operations in the Zone. Easily available on the market and can be acquired for a moderate price. Popular among experienced Zoners. They are significantly more potent and faster working than their improvised counterparts, which makes them perfect for use in life-threatening situations. Produced from raw agents of high density which can take their toll on the body. Side effects include shock, extreme dizziness and increased hunger.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  • first aid H••••• T••••••• A••• L•••
  • post-heals H•• T•• A• L•
en.st_up_auto_c1_descr: A special component installed into the bolt mechanism to soften bolt movement and reduce recoil.
en.st_up_pris_a1_descr: A rubberized recoil-softening part is often used on factory-made stocks for large calibre sniper rifles.
en.st_addon_scope_archangel_descr:
A comprehensive upgrade package that includes grips, rails, stocks, and other enhancements to improve weapon ergonomics, control, and overall combat effectiveness.
 
 KIT INCLUDES:
  •  Archangel Polymer Stock
  •  20 Round Magazine Set
 
 COMPATIBILITY:
  •  Remington M700
en.st_af_electra_sparkler_descr:
This artefact has the appearance of translucent spider webs. Just as proteinaceous spider silk, it is sticky and has properties of glue. 
It can be found most commonly in or near electro anomalies and it seems to have absorbed their certain characteristics: it is able to smooth fluctuations in electric field density and acts as a weak resistor, protecting the wearer from electricity and reducing its damaging effects. 
On the other hand, it should be noted that the presence of this artefact increases the corrosiveness of acids, leading to accelerated deterioration of equipment and higher damage to tissues of any living organism. 

 Does NOT degrade over time.
en.st_af_ah_r3_descr:
An artifact containing mostly plant matter found only in the Dead Forest, south of Lab X-9. It is believed that the strong psy-fields it was subjugated to during its formation heavily influenced its shape and properties. Wearing one seems to boost vitality.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  Artefact
en.st_up_auts_b2_descr: A special mechanism takes on some of the impact during firing, which makes shooting the weapon more comfortable.
en.st_vodka2_descr:
Triple purification, a smooth texture and a unique taste. Following the tradition of naming vodka brands after Russian leaders, Putinka first went into production after Vladimir Putin was elected president. Produced in Russia from the finest grain and crystal clear water from Siberian springs.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  Drink
  •  Alcohol
en.st_up_weight_2_descr: Replace some frame pieces with lightweight aluminum.
en.st_up_pri_b2_descr: A more modern stock, which takes account of the specific nature of human physiology.
en.st_up_burn_4_descr: Nickel is sufficiently fire-resistant to be used for body armor inserts
en.st_up_rad_2_descr: Plexiglass absorbs two types of radiation while being a lot lighter than lead.
en.st_addon_scope_lapua700_descr:
A comprehensive upgrade package that includes grips, rails, stocks, and other enhancements to improve weapon ergonomics, control, and overall combat effectiveness.
 
 KIT INCLUDES:
  •  Threaded Barrel (for Suppressor)
  •  Magpul Pro Stock
  •  .338LM Magazines Set
  •  Improved Leupold Sight
 
 COMPATIBILITY:
  •  Remington M700
en.st_af_ah_g1_descr:
A lump of shriveled clay and organic debris. Separation of individual lumps of material seems impossible, due to the presence of some unknown and incredibly strong binding agent.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  Artefact
en.mutant_boar_chop_description:
A chunk of meat harvested from a mutant boar, tough and gamey but edible with proper cooking. Note that consuming uncooked mutant meat always carries the risk of contamination or radiation exposure.
 
 WARNING: Raw Meat
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  Low-tier Mutant Meat
  •  Cookable
en.st_af_glass_descr:
Firefly interacts with fields unknown to science, considerably speeding up regeneration of tissue and organs in living beings, as well as normalizing metabolic processes. 
This artefact can literally get a badly wounded stalker back on his feet in a matter of minutes. On the other hand, Firefly can spontaneously combust when exposed to potent radioactive sources. 
A big downside to this artefact is that it weakens the body and reduce the number of platelets in blood during heal process, thus increasing bleeding rate. 
It seems to drain stamina and decrease stamina recovery greatly as well. Some of those who used Firefly for its healing purposes have reported that they couldn't walk for hours afterwards. 
Unfortunately, Firefly is extremely rare. 

 Does NOT degrade over time.
en.st_gamma_recipe_expert_3: Fundamentals of Guns and Armors Upgrades Vol. 3
en.st_up_armor_4_descr: Mobile plates protect joints from gunshot wounds.
en.st_af_zhelch_descr:
An ellipsoid artefact with interesting psi properties. At first, its user will feel calm and relaxed, but as time passes, they will lose their mind. This state of madness is completely reversible, and the user will return to normal after the artefact is removed.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  Perk Artefact
en.st_up_rad_3_descr: Lead absorbs all three types of radiation.
en.st_wpn_mp155_descr:
The Baikal MP-155 is a semiautomatic shotgun that comes in 12 gauge, with 750 mm barrel smooth bore. In production since 2011 an is the most popular model for russian hunters. The version smuggled to the Zone came modified in factory with the 8 round magazine. 
 
 ATTACHMENTS: 
  -  Scopes: Most optics for the picatinny/weaver system.
  -  Suppressor: NATO Suppressor multicaliber compatible.
en.st_up_opt_dynamo_hand1_descr: Replacement of gear reducer for nylon reduces friction, which slightly improves the reliability and the longevity of the mechanism.
en.st_af_ah_e2_descr:
A shard of Silica Quartz formed exclusively in electro anomalies. It is remarkably pure, ranging from 99.5% to 99.9% purity and is known to provide the wearer with a feeling of youthfulness.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  Artefact
en.st_up_binoc_b1_gamma_descr: Night vision technology installation for low light conditions. Relies on night-useful spectral and intensity range techniques to sense radiation that is invisible to the human eye.
en.st_addon_sil_salvo_descr:
A shotgun suppressor designed by SilencerCo, significantly reducing noise and recoil for 12-gauge firearms while maintaining shot pattern integrity.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  Origin: United States
 
 COMPATIBILITY:
  •  12 gauge
en.st_af_ah_o1_descr:
An artefact created in fire anomalies consisting of mostly iron, bismuth, cadmium and nickel. If broken, the interior resembles an infinite fractal.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  Artefact
en.st_af_tlf_prometheus_descr: A unique artifact that was born in the Greek Fire after the stalker of the legend with the same name has been slain. It gives the user immense resistance to heat and makes the wounds heal faster.
en.st_addon_scope_trijicon_rmr_descr: A compact combat kit pairing a magnified ACOG with a canted 1x red-dot sight for fast transitions between close-quarters and mid-range engagements.\n \n
en.st_af_medallion_descr:
An artefact unique in that it appears almost man-made. It is a green ring with 4 lobes rotating around a central core. Sometimes, when the wearer of the Medal is injured, their injury will be completely transferred to another person nearby.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  Perk Artefact
en.st_af_black_descr: Truly, an amazing thing. The Black Stone protects against broadly considered adversity but instead is slowly killing the owner. Some stalkers suspect the artefact is a shard of the Monolith.
en.ammo-11.43x23-hydro_descr:
This unusual .45 ACP calibre round consists of a jacketed soft point bullet with a hollow steel core, possessing both their advantages and disadvantages.
 
 -  Armor penetration power (AP): None (10) 
 -  Nominal stopping power (DMG): 60
en.st_addon_scope_psicho_rmr_descr: Classic Dragunov-style PSO scope paired with a canted red-dot for rapid close-quarters response and a ready magnified sight for longer aimed shots.\n \n
en.st_bolt_carrier_4: Sliding Bolt Carrier with a Locking Bias (Carrier)
en.st_wpn_akm_alfa_descr:
Developed by a team of engineers and hand-picked Israel Defense Force snipers, the AK Alfa was built on the foundation of the AK and redesigned with the sole purpose of providing outstanding performance on the battlefield in an attempt to improve the ergonomics of the AK rifle while maintaining its reliability and ease of maintenance. 
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  origin: United States, Israel
  •  manufacturer: CAA Tactical
en.ammo-4.6x30-fmj_descr:
The HK 4.6x30mm cartridge is a type of ammunition primarily used in the Heckler & Koch MP7 personal defense weapon (PDW). It is designed to minimize weight and recoil while increasing penetration of body armor. It features a bottlenecked case and a pointed, steel-core, brass-jacketed bullet. 
 
 -  Armor penetration power (AP): BR3 
 -  Nominal stopping power (DMG): low - medium
en.st_up_health_3_descr: A wave emitter mounted on the neck that has a strong calming effect.
en.st_af_full_empty_descr:
Similar to Empty, this artefact consist of two disks of organic formation connected by a unique gravitational field in between. However, the said field in Full Empty is extraordinary: all atoms entering the centre, regardless of their nature, become interactive under the unknown effects of the field. Thus releasing photons (light emitting). 
Scientists usually refer to it as the "galaxy effect", which gives the artefact an exceptional orbit of light. 
The density increment of surrounding air caused by moving is higher comparing to Empty. Because of this, the artefact will greatly hinder its holder's movement. 
Being superior artefact to Empty, the protection against physical impacts is remarkable. Some claims that Full Empty is capable of stopping 9mm bullets fired at point blank. 

 Does NOT degrade over time.
en.st_bolt_carrier_2: Sliding Bolt Carrier with Turning Bolt Lock [R] (Carrier)
en.st_wpn_desert_eagle_descr: The IMI Desert Eagle is a semi-automatic handgun notable for chambering the largest centrefire cartridge of any magazine fed, self-loading pistol and also being the heaviest and blockiest gun of its type. You can use it to bludgeon your enemies to death because of its blockiness and weight. Rumour is that there's a stalker with a crowbar wandering around the Zone with a rechambered version of this gun.
en.st_wpn_toz34_mark4_descr:
Intended for professional and amateur hunting, the TOZ-34 is an over/under double-barreled shotgun that acquired the state quality mark of the USSR. It is heavy, dependable and packs a punch. The "Bison" is fitted with a reinforced barrel and Leupold Mark 4 scope for long distance big game hunting.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  origin: USSR
  •  manufacturer: Tulsky Oruzheiny Zavod
en.st_af_ah_r4_descr:
An artifact containing mostly plant matter found only in the Dead Forest, south of Lab X-9. It is believed that the strong psy-fields it was subjugated to during its formation heavily influenced its shape and properties. Wearing one seems to boost vitality.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  Artefact
en.st_prt_o_ballistic_2: Kevlar Protera Plates w/ Reinforced Ceramic Inserts
en.st_addon_scope_ac11090_descr:
A lightweight and compact reflex sight designed for rapid target acquisition, featuring a clear illuminated reticle for enhanced aiming in close to mid-range engagements. Its sturdy construction and adjustable brightness settings make it a reliable choice for both tactical and survival scenarios.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  Origin: United States
  •  Manufacturer: Barska
  •  Magnification: 2.0x
en.st_ecologist_report_2_of_3_name: Walking Dead Findings Field Report 39B rev. 2 (Part 2 of 3)
en.st_ground_coffee_descr:
A packet of finely ground coffee beans, ready to be brewed. Though often stale or scavenged from old stockpiles, a hot cup can keep a Stalker alert during long nights.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  Food
  •  Stimulant
en.st_addon_scope_usp1_descr:
The 1P29 (aka UPO-1 / USP-1) is a universal sight made for Soviet/Russian small arms. Introduced in the 1980s, it is a compact, rugged prismatic optic (inspired by the British SUIT/Trilux designs), often fitted with a tritium/ambient illumination element and a stadiametric range scale for quick distance estimation; it saw service with late-Cold War and post-Soviet forces.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  Origin: Russia
  •  Manufacturer: NPZ
  •  Magnification: 4x
en.st_wpn_mp5_descr:
One of the most famous and widespread firearms of its class, the MP5's compactness, accuracy and reliability have made it a favorite of numerous military, law enforcement, intelligence and security organizations the world over. The A3 variant is fitted with a retractable metal stock further increasing the weapon's CQB capabilities.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  origin: West Germany
  •  manufacturer: Heckler & Koch
en.st_up_ret_c2_descr: A link that is opened by gases and closed by the return mechanism itself, which allows part of the gas energy to be used to operate the return mechanism.
en.st_af_fire_loop_descr:
Created within a thermal anomaly. It has a bizarre tetrahedral appearance. Only rumors of disappearances, betrayal, and death surround this hellish artefact.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  Perk Artefact
en.st_addon_scope_0kp2_descr:
A modern Russian reflex sight with a unique open design, offering an unobstructed field of view and rapid target acquisition. It is lightweight and highly durable, making it suitable for various combat conditions.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  Origin: Russia
  •  Manufacturer: Various Manufacturers
  •  Magnification: 1.0x
en.st_wpn_mk47_descr:
The CMMG Mk47 Mutant is an American-made semi-automatic rifle chambered in 7.62Г—39mm caliber, made by CMMG Inc. It can accept all types of Kalashnikov pattern magazines, including steel, polymer and drum magazines. In 2015, CMMG released its first production Mk47s to stores throughout the US. According to CMMG Production Manager Tyson Bradshaw, he mentioned that CMMG made the rifle due to the need of "consumers to have a reliable, U.S.-made rifle that could properly handle the dimensions of the 7.62x39 mm cartridge. To do this properly, it required CMMG to build the rifle around the caliber. Using AK magazines was decided because they are the most reliable magazines. The Mk47 Mutant has an AR-10-sized bolt carrier, which was enlarged, with a CMMG RKM KeyMod handguard and an upper/lower receiver manufactured from 7075-T6 billet aluminum. The rifle has an AR-15-based pistol grip, safety selector, trigger group and a buffer tube. It was influenced by the CMMG Mk3 assault rifles. The Mk47 relies on a direct impingement gas system. 
 
 ATTACHMENTS: 
  -  Scopes: Most optics for the picatinny/weaver system.
  -  Suppressor: NATO Suppressor multicaliber compatible.
en.st_antirad_cystamine_descr:
A substance functioning as a radioprotector, used to weaken the effects of radiation on the body. The radioprotective effect of cystamine is based on the ability to bind free radicals - ionised and excited molecules formed in tissues upon irradiation - as well as the ability of the drug to interact with certain enzymes and impart resistance to ionising radiation. The effects of cystamine do not counteract already accumulated radiation. Contains painkillers and anti-inflammatory compounds.
 
 PROPERTIES:
en.st_addon_scope_trihawk_3x30_descr:
A compact fixed-power optic with unusually wide field of view for a 3x scope. Its etched reticle remains usable even without illumination, making it dependable in harsh conditions. Built into a rugged prism housing, it's designed for fast target acquisition on carbines while still giving precise shot placement at intermediate distances.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  Origin: United States
  •  Manufacturer: Swampfox Optics
  •  Magnification: 3x
en.st_af_ah_e1_descr:
A shard of Silica Quartz formed exclusively in electro anomalies. It is remarkably pure, ranging from 99.5% to 99.9% purity and is known to provide the wearer with a feeling of youthfulness.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  Artefact
en.st_up_health_2_descr: An integrated system that monitors the wearer's health and supplies vitamins, adrenalin or anabolic substances as required.
en.st_wpn_glock17_descr:
A widely used semi-automatic pistol known for its lightweight polymer frame, high magazine capacity, and exceptional reliability. Its simple yet effective design makes it a favorite among military, law enforcement, and stalkers alike. With a smooth trigger pull and low recoil, it provides a dependable sidearm for both defensive and offensive situations.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  Origin: Austria
  •  Manufacturer: Glock Ges.m.b.H.
en.st_addon_scope_mono_kit_descr:
A comprehensive upgrade package that includes grips, rails, stocks, and other enhancements to improve weapon ergonomics, control, and overall combat effectiveness.
 
 KIT INCLUDES:
  •  Ergonomic Forend for 30mm Under-barrel Grenade Launcher
  •  Trijicon ACOG Sight
  •  TNVC AN/PEQ-16 LAM Illumination Module
  •  60 Round Drum Mag
 
 COMPATIBILITY:
  •  АК-12 "Monolith"
en.st_af_ah_r5_descr:
An artifact containing mostly plant matter found only in the Dead Forest, south of Lab X-9. It is believed that the strong psy-fields it was subjugated to during its formation heavily influenced its shape and properties. Wearing one seems to boost vitality.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  Artefact
en.ammo-7.62x54_7n14_descr:
The 7.62x54 calibre 7N14 is an armour-piercing cartridge. The bullet has a steel core to penetrate body armour or light barriers, and a boat-tail base to increase accuracy.
 
 -  Armor penetration power (AP): BR4 (45) 
 -  Nominal stopping power (DMG): 62
en.st_antirad_kalium_descr:
A pharmacological compound, used in the Zone as a cheap means of countering the effects of radiation on the body. Causes numerous side effects, notably gastrointestinal tract blistering, numbness to pain and dysfunction of the thyroid gland.
 
 PROPERTIES:
en.st_up_m1a1_b8_descr: Installation of a heavier barrel to improve recoil.
en.st_antiemetic_descr:
Tablets coated with a shell, containing 4.6 and 10 mg of perphenazine. The drug is a neuroleptic - an antipsychotic agent that provides antiallergic, sedative, miorelaxing, antiemetic, weak anticholinergic, hypotensive and hypothermic actions. The efficacy of Etperazine is due to the blockade of D2 receptors in the mesocortical and mesolimbic systems. Rarely used in the Zone.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  • slightly improves morale and mind protection against horrors of the Zone
  • slight dizzines removal
en.st_addon_scope_pilad_p1x42_descr:
Open-reflex red-dot sight from the Pilad line, built around a large 34–42 mm viewing window for an expansive field of view and fast target acquisition. Offers selectable reticle patterns and a small, rugged aluminum body suited to hunting and service use; commonly supplied with Weaver/Picatinny or dovetail mounts. Manufactured under the VOMZ/Pilad brand in Russia and marketed as a no-frills, robust reflex option for short-range work.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  Origin: Russia
  •  Manufacturer: VOMZ
  •  Magnification: 1x
  •  Reticle switch: press Mark Switch key
en.ammo-357-hp_descr:
The .357 HP round is a hollow-point bullet. The purpose of the round is to slow down upon impact, which decreases its penetration, but at the same time causes larger internal tissue damage. 
 
 -  Armor penetration power (AP): BR2 (19) 
 -  Nominal stopping power (DMG):: 103
en.st_up_zat_b3_descr: Protective sputter increases reliability and, more importantly, ensures airtightness, which prevents excessive energy dissipation.
en.st_wpn_aps_descr:
The Stechkin APS is a Russian selective fire machine pistol, bearing the name of its designer Igor Stechkin. Originally chambered for 7.62x25mm Tokarev, the pistol was changed to use 9x18mm as it became clear that this cartridge was set to become the new service ammunition for handguns in the Soviet Army. In 1951, the Stechkin was introduced into the Soviet military arsenal, replacing the aging TT-33.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  origin: Soviet Union
  •  manufacturer: Tula Arms Plant
en.st_af_dummy_dummy_descr:
Shell is composed of two disk of bluish colour connected by semitransparent material of unknown nature. 
This strange artefact was considered devoid of any useful properties by many scientists for a long time. Only recently has it been discovered that it is indeed quite beneficial. 
When the artefact comes into contact with the body, it will make one feel rejuvenated and thus it increases stamina recovery. This effect has in case of some stalkers induced hyperactivity. One downside of this artefact, however, is that it reduces the number of platelets in blood, thus increasing bleeding rate. 
It provides a considerable level of psy protection and absorbs electromagnetic interference, acting as a grounding material. 
It will catch fire when exposed to open flame or even spontaneously combust. Caution must be taken when approaching heat sources with this artefact. 
Shell is extremely light and very portable. 

 Does NOT degrade over time.
en.st_sleepingpills_descr:
A package of small sleeping pills that will almost immediately induce sleepiness, which also helps reducing avalanche-like nerve impulses for a considerable period. Swallow some time before you want to rest and drink a few sips of water afterwards for maximum effect. Take two tablets at a time.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  • improves morale and mind protection against horrors of the Zone
  • induces sleepiness
en.st_up_stvd_a3_descr: A lighter poly-material allows the weapon's weight to be reduced.
en.st_up_damage_3_descr: Mobile plates protect joints from wounds.
en.st_af_spaika_descr:
A gravitational artefact that resembles a Meat Chunk and a Jellyfish fused together. If its bearer makes continues hits with a weapon, they will become increasingly more effective. If the user misses, however, it will shock their nervous system.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  Perk Artefact
en.st_af_black_spray_descr:
Being a rare artefact, little is known about its properties and origins. 
Black Spray shares a similar shape to other sapphire-like artefacts. However, the organic nature of the stem (which shares similar properties to Pin artefacts) suggests that its formed from vascular plants under exposure to dangerous psy-fields and electromagnetic waves. 
Another unique property is the ability to delay the transmission of light that enters it. The said mysterious mechanism is applied to psy-waves surrounding the artefact as well. For this particular reason, Black Spray significantly neutralises psy interferences in a large radius. 
These beneficial properties, however, come at a price. This artefact is extremely dangerous when exposed in toxic environments as it amplifies their effect and increases their potency. When exploring toxic areas, it is hence highly recommended to keep the artefact in your backpack. 
Due to the beautiful blue aura it emits, it is highly sought after by jewellers all over the world. 

 Does NOT degrade over time.
en.st_up_chem_4_descr: The lead mesh creates unbreachable chemical protection without sacrificing mobility.
en.st_wpn_ak_descr:
The Avtomat Kalashnikova, is a gas-operated assault rifle developed by Russian small-arms designer Mikhail Kalashnikov. After more than seven decades since its creation, the AK-47 and its variants remain one of the most popular and widely used firearms in the world due to their reliability under harsh conditions, low production cost, and ease of use.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  origin: Soviet Union
  •  manufacturer: Kalashnikov Concern
en.ammo-7.62x25-ps_descr:
The steel core 7.62x25mm cartridge is a Russian bottle-necked pistol cartridge widely used in former Soviet satellite states, China and Pakistan among other countries. This 7.62x25mm Tokarev cartridge displays a bullet with steel core (Pst) and a steel sleeve. It's very effective against medium armored targets and is thus appreciated in the Zone. 
 
 -  Armor penetration power (AP): BR2 (24) 
 -  Nominal stopping power (DMG): 21
en.st_up_damage_2_descr: An increased number of plates considerably improves body armor durability.
en.st_up_arty_2_descr: Installation of an additional armor attachment module.
en.st_up_helm_tele_1_descr: Hi-tech psy-protection that is said to have been invented by a scientist called Sakharov.
en.st_up_run_1_descr: Allows sprinting while wearing an exo-frame. Used for fourth generation exoskeletons.
en.st_wpn_l96a1m_descr:
The Arctic Warfare Super Magnum is a variant of the L96A1 chambered in .338 Lapua Magnum with a revised locking ring, extractor and magazine to work with the increased size and operating pressures of magnum rifle cartridges.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  origin: United Kingdom
  •  manufacturer: Accuracy International
  • Increased penetration: +5
en.st_up_durability_1_descr: Used in suits to improve outfit durability.
en.st_up_weight_1_descr: Replace metal with carbon fiber to reduce weight without sacrificing reliability.
en.st_up_burn_2_descr: Magnesium inserts protect the wearer from thermal dangers.
en.st_up_shock_2_descr: Constantan is capable of isolating against electricity and has a very high melting point.
en.st_up_health_1_descr: A generation A injector, developed by one of Kiev's research institutes. Regularly injects the bloodstream with tiny doses of adrenalin.
en.st_prt_o_ballistic_15: Carbon Nanotube Layers w/ Kevlar-49 Fabrics
en.st_up_shock_3_descr: This nickel and magnesium alloy is used in armor to prevent electric shocks.
en.st_up_chem_3_descr: Impregnated fabric should prevent chemical poisoning.
en.st_up_bleed_1_descr: A small wave emitter mounted on the back, effectively increasing blood clotting speed.
en.st_up_stamina_2_descr: An experimental running system model of a running system.
en.st_up_burn_3_descr: Fiberglass is used in bodysuits worn by natural disaster response teams.
en.st_af_kogot_descr:
A beautiful glass-like formation from electrical anomalies. Contrary to its delicate appearance, it imbues its user with a primal bloodlust, strengthening them in hand-to-hand combat. 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  Perk Artefact
en.st_up_bar_a2_descr: The lack of big gas chambers and barrel mounting on the foregrip has a positive effect on accuracy.
en.st_addon_scope_kashtan_rmr_descr: A low-power combat sight paired with a canted red-dot for instant close-quarters aiming and a quick switch to a stabilized magnified view for standard engagement distances.\n \n
en.st_up_auts_c1_descr: Sputter prevents energy from dispersing, which increases bullet impulse.
en.st_af_atom_descr:
A beautiful artefact that consists of four small, multicolored spheres orbiting a larger translucent center. It gives off a slight amount of heat and can convert small doses of radiation in the body into usable energy.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  Perk Artefact
en.st_up_auts_c2_descr: Installation of a long firing mechanism rod allows a sniper rifle to be fired in automatic mode.
en.st_up_stvs_b1_descr: A more technological and more recoil dampening component than used in regular automatic weapons.
en.st_up_stvs_b2_descr: A more modern and suitable barrel for sniper fire at very long range.
en.st_up_helm_stamina_1_descr: A set of filters used for breathing in contaminated air or air oat critical temperatures.
en.st_up_opt_a6_descr: Modification of optical scope for long range combat.
en.st_up_opt_c1_descr: A heat visor allows the wearer to detect and identify matching heat sources.
en.st_up_opt_c2_descr: Night vision devices have saved many a sniper since their inception. 0.27 kg increase in weight.
en.st_up_opt_b1_descr: A modification made to assault weapons with reflex sights by means of a simple improvement in sight contrast in the yellow range. Important for combat in twilight conditions and dim buildings.
en.st_chili_descr:
Canned chili beans cooked in a spicy chili sauce. Hardy and delicious, it provides a zesty alternative to standard fare. The added heat can be a morale booster in the cold, desolate environments.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  Food
en.st_up_auto_b2_descr: A special component seals the barrel in an airtight manner to increase pressure when a shot is fired.
en.st_up_auto_c3_descr: Installation of a mechanism with mobile components that increase round feeding speed when the weapon is fired.
en.st_af_ah_g2_descr:
A lump of shriveled clay and organic debris. Separation of individual lumps of material seems impossible, due to the presence of some unknown and incredibly strong binding agent. Gives off a slightly disorienting effect that is known to cause headaches.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  Artefact
en.st_up_pri_c1_descr: When the weapon is fired, some of the powder gases are removed from the barrel into the cavity behind the bolt, ensuring that it stops smoothly on the way back.
en.st_up_ret_b3_descr: A synthetic element installed onto rods ensures that they move strictly as intended, increasing accuracy.
en.st_up_zat_c5_descr: Often used in modern weaponry, a roller locking system reduces recoil and improves groupings.
en.st_up_zat_c1_descr: The weapon's bolt slides along the barrel, preventing upward movement of the muzzle section.
en.st_up_auto_a2_descr: The fashion for polymer components has not only paid off, but it has also become quite a popular upgrade.
en.st_up_auto_a1_descr: A counter-weight is installed as an additional component into the receiver to reduce recoil by means of counter force.
en.st_mre_descr:
The Meal, Ready-to-Eat is a self-contained, lightweight field ration originally developed for military personnel, providing a complete meal that requires no cooking. Its durability and convenience make it a favored choice among stalkers navigating the Zone's challenges.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  Food
en.st_up_auto_c2_descr: An integrated improvement that is normally used for sniper rifles in view of the considerable increase in the weapon's weight.
en.st_up_ret_b2_descr: Titanium rods can endure a much higher rate of fire than regular rods.
en.st_wpn_kiparis_descr:
Based on the Czechoslovak Skorpion vz.61, the OTs-02 is a blowback operated submachine gun used by the Russian Internal Affairs Ministry as a special purpose police weapon. Powered by free bolt recoil with shots fired from a closed bolt, the weapon's accuracy is surprisingly good, even under fully automatic fire. To further increase weapon stability, a folding stock is included that folds up on top of the receiver.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  origin: Soviet Union
  •  manufacturer: KBP Instrument Design Bureau
en.st_up_zat_a1_descr: This fairly expensive modification is actually common for new generation weapons.
en.st_up_zat_b5_descr: Reducing the gas chamber diameter by means of synthetic thickeners considerably increases bullet speed.
en.st_up_zat_b2_descr: A second piston moves the counter-weight, compensating for the bolt mechanism movement impulse.
en.st_up_stk_a1_descr: The advantage of this European standard modification is reduced weight without a fall in reliability.
en.st_up_stk_c2_descr: This sputter prevents the barrel from overheating, removes manufacturing defects and significantly increases the barrel's life cycle.
en.st_up_add_a3_descr: Installation of a mount for attachment of an underbarrel grenade launcher.
en.st_tetanus_descr:
Fentanyl is a powerful opioid used as a pain medication. It is also used as a recreational drug, sometimes mixed with heroin, cocaine, or methamphetamine, and its potentially deadly overdose effects can be neutralized by naloxone. Fentanyl works primarily by activating ?-opioid receptors.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  • causes slight dizziness
  • post-heals H••• T••• A••• L•••
en.st_up_usm_a1_descr: The purpose of the bolt hammer compensator is to absorb some of the recoil, improving groupings when firing in bursts.
en.st_up_zatp_a1_descr: Provides an increase in rate of fire without overloading other parts through additional recoil.
en.st_up_barp_b1_descr: Chrome plating improves the barrel's life cycle.
en.st_up_barp_c1_descr: Allows barrel heat to be reduced and increases the rate of fire without sacrificing flatness.
en.st_up_auto_b4_descr: A component installed on the rear side of the receiver that reduces bolt speed. Installed to improve effectiveness of aimed fire.
en.st_up_auto_c6_descr: A link fixes the position of the barrel and if the barrel moves, additional compensation holes are opened.
en.st_up_pri_c2_descr: Partial lengthening of the bolt frame into the stock allows flatness to be increased at the cost of more recoil.
en.st_up_helm_chem_1_descr: A filter with a reinforced anti-corrosive coating and an additional preventing layer for removal of poisons.
en.st_up_bar_b1_descr: Replacement of a dated component with a more modern one reduces recoil
en.st_up_zat_c2_descr: Installation of a gas pistol stops gases from entering the bolt frame, which considerably reduces weapon dirtiness.
en.st_up_usm_b3_descr: Removal of the combat spring allows the first shot to be made half a second earlier. It may not be much, but it can save your life.
en.st_up_stk_a2_descr: A high durability receiver helps assault rifles endure combat conditions on a daily basis.
en.st_up_zat_c3_descr: This system collects some of the gases using the bolt section to improve its movement.
en.ammo-9x39-pab9_descr:
The SP-5 is a subsonic rifle round with a bimetallic casing. The round contains a steel core with a gap behind it that is filled with lead. Requires a suppressor for stealth firing. Used by special services of Warsaw Pact countries.
 
 -  Armor penetration power (AP): BR3 (34) 
 -  Nominal stopping power (DMG): 43 
 
SPECIAL:
 
 -  sub-sonic ammunition
 -  greatly increased projectile drop with distance
en.st_up_zath_a1_descr: In absorbing some of the heat, the components reduce weapon temperature changes during firing.
en.st_up_zat_b1_descr: Gas vent comes with a block that moves at the same speed, taking on part of the recoil.
en.ammo-5.56x45-fmj_descr:
A standard-issue NATO 5.56x45 calibre M193 round specially designed for accurate automatic fire. Provides good ballistic characteristics, having been designed on the basis of a hunting round. Well known for being used in the Vietnam war and having great performance against tissue, but limited penetration.
 
 -  Armor penetration power (AP): BR3 (29) 
 -  Nominal stopping power (DMG): 35
en.st_antirad_descr:
Mexaminum radiation protection drugs are common in the Zone. When used, this drug induces contraction of peripheral blood vessels and oxygen deprivation, which serve to treat and prevent radiation exposure. The drug does not have severe side effects, although isolated cases of mild nausea, dizziness, cramps and stomach pain have been reported. It also contains opiates derivatives to prevent the pain.
 
 PROPERTIES:
en.st_up_zatp_b2_descr: Softens recoil by slowing down bolt section movement.
en.st_up_zatp_c1_descr: Short movement considerably increases the weapon's rate of fire without sacrificing flatness.
en.st_up_barp_a1_descr: Replacement of a regular barrel with a longer one improves accuracy and flatness, but reduces the rate of fire.
en.st_up_stvp_b1_descr: A technical replacement of the pistol frame with a lighter one does not affect the weapon's reliability.
en.st_up_usmp_b1_descr: One of the simplest and most popular modifications, which allows for trigger resistance to be reduced. Simple and handy.
en.st_up_add_a1_descr: External threading allows a silencer to be installed.
en.st_bottle_metal_descr:
A metal flask containing a portion of what seems to be Zone-produced vodka. While more affordable, the fumes are strong and the quality and taste is lacking, but it gets the job done.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  Drink
  •  Alcohol
en.st_wpn_bm16_full_descr:
A break-action double barrel shotgun intended for amateur hunting and general civilian use. Though heavy and unwieldy, it packs an undeniable punch.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  origin: Soviet Union
  •  manufacturer: Tula Arms Plant
en.st_addon_scope_226sig_kit_descr:
A comprehensive upgrade package that includes grips, rails, stocks, and other enhancements to improve weapon ergonomics, control, and overall combat effectiveness.
 
 KIT INCLUDES:
  •  Threaded Barrel (for Suppressor)
  •  Trijicon RMR Sight
 
 COMPATIBILITY:
  •  SIG P226R
en.st_addon_scope_vulcan_descr:
Compact Gen-3 night vision riflescope offering a true 3.5x magnification in a short, rugged housing built for weapon mounting. Features manual/automatic gain control, an internal reticle with illumination, and provisions for long-range IR illumination and remote control—designed as a hands-on, combat-grade NV module rather than a precision daylight optic.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  Origin: United States
  •  Manufacturer: Armasight
  •  Magnification: 3.5x
  •  Night Vision Toggle: press Mark Switch key
en.st_up_stk_a3_descr: A simple addition of weight to the front of the receiver to reduce recoil.
en.st_prt_o_ballistic_3: Kevlar K129 Plates w/ Polycarbonate Composite
en.st_up_bar_a3_descr: This modification is used to reduce the harm caused by excessive firing rate modifications.
en.st_up_bar_c2_descr: Allows barrel heat to be reduced and increases the rate of fire.
en.st_up_bard_c3_descr: Thickening with poly-materials allows barrel pressure to be increased, improving bullet speed.
en.st_wpn_trg_descr:
A firearm designed for serious long-range competitions, able to be equipped with a vast array of accessories to meet the most demanding requirements. Its consistent accuracy and reliability have made it popular both in long-range competitions and military sniper operations.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  origin: Finland
  •  manufacturer: Sako
  • Increased penetration: +5
en.st_af_dummy_glassbeads_descr:
Shaped like a DNA helix, Mama's Beads are created in the Burner anomaly. One of their most characteristic features is that they constantly pulsate, generating emissions beneficial to the human body. These emissions increase the metabolism of any living creature, accelerating coagulation and healing of wounds.The mechanism behind the effects of this artefact is still unknown. 
Mama's Beads also possess potent protective qualities: they are able to shield the body and objects from extreme heat. 
On the other hand, it should be noted that the presence of this artefact increases electrical conductivity, so the probability of electrocution while wearing this artefact is much higher, especially during storms and in the vicinity of electrical anomalies. 
The weight is also quite high for such a small artefact, which leads to a conclusion that is of high density. 

 Does NOT degrade over time.
en.st_up_autd_b3_descr: Often used in weaponry, a roller locking system reduces recoil and improves groupings.
en.st_up_autd_c1_descr: Protective sputter makes misfiring due to mechanism malfunction impossible.
en.st_up_autd_c4_descr: A unified blowback module is one of the best technological solutions for reducing recoil.
en.st_up_barp_a3_descr: A more technological shortened barrel improves the weapon's rate of fire without sacrificing flatness and accuracy.
en.st_up_stvp_a2_descr: In this case the frame is more reliable than composite.
en.st_up_stvp_b5_descr: A change in the rear section makes for a more ergonomic handle shape.
en.st_up_usmp_b4_descr: A modern modification which prevents the weapon from bolt section detachment.
en.st_up_binoc_a2_descr: Installation of new lens set for farther distances, which offers x15 magnification power.
en.st_af_death_lamp_descr:
"Big, red and cursed." 
This is how the locals prefer to describe the Death Lamp, while some refer to it as the "Seed of Satan". Many traders believe the rumours surrounding the artefact, thus refusing to buy it. Little is known about its origins, and nothing of value has been discovered so far. 
Death Lamp was first discovered few years ago by a group of three experienced stalkers. Shortly after delivering the artefact to the Ecologists in Yantar, two of them found dead with a horrific expression on their faces. Nothing is known about the fate of the third stalker. 
Following the accident, members of the science team who studied the artefact had reported having nightmare disorder in the days to follow. 
Apart from the mysterious effects, the artefact drains vitality and willpower from the user, often on such a scale that it induces dizziness and in extreme cases causes the user to faint. 

 Does NOT degrade over time.
en.st_up_binoc_c1_descr: Replacements to the housing style in order to reduce the overall weight by implementing an open-bridge and chassis made of an aluminium alloy.
en.st_up_usm_c2_descr: Boltless fixing allows for automatic load to be increased, considerably improving the weapon's rate of fire.
en.st_kukri_descr:
A distinctively curved blade known for its powerful chopping ability, traditionally used as both a tool and a weapon. Its weighted forward design makes it highly effective for cutting, making it a staple in survival, combat, and utility applications.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  Use: Field Dressing Mutants
  •  Melee Weapon
  •  Light Attack Power: 65
  •  Heavy Attack Power: 117
  •  Armor Penetration: 35
  •  Cuts Thick Mutant Skin?: YES
  •  Mutant Pelt Quality: 75% - 98%
en.st_up_bard_b2_descr: Synthetic thickening of the barrel cavity causes a considerable improvement in groupings.
en.st_up_bard_b6_descr: This sputter prevents the barrel from overheating, removes manufacturing defects and significantly increases the barrel's life cycle.
en.st_up_stvd_a1_descr: The cavity inside the handle allows the weapon's weight to be reduced.
en.st_wpn_grach_descr:
One of the standard military-issued sidearms in Russia, the MP-443 Grach is a double-action, short-recoil, semi-automatic pistol known for its reliability and versatility in the field. It is widely recognized for its smooth trigger pull and simplified design making it easy to disassemble and maintain.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  origin: Austria
  •  manufacturer: Izhevsk Mechanical Plant
en.st_up_autd_b1_descr: A low impulse firing mechanism ensures less recoil than older versions.
en.st_up_zatp_c3_descr: A replacement of the automatic parts is more of an optimization than improvement of the gas piston. This considerably improves the weapon's rate of fire.
